name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: Elections matter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
Biden was delivered a crushing defeat with Title 42, but he’s not giving up. | | |
---
---
Friend, Thanks to a team of Republican Attorneys General, a court in Louisiana declared that Joe Biden could not suspend Title 42 border protections.
---
[**We must keep our border safe!**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=8d1c37026b7d47a1b4a067ded16931c4&_e=HKJHFIjpKuxmhawVNXTlxhZUv97QFtrShAgSM3AM8fhCLDPQN8fGHk2qOzzOiclBP3u1nnHtcXCP-MY3B2MoTwhI4x7lQ4-dHtLPie2cZrC4etl4GfxsGb8QWdXoFH9dEUquDRyuqrP7no47CpEJWyd0JpMQ0rnqpFV0H7Zy2PUwglONsfVVQFAlkMeInCVEfG8WhdgpvrESz5EngaJPP8rOTeAok6Wm3ODOFbtlKCnHVmxe74jArNdiSh4q2OyaiKFuoREFVASWCId-RMcDfD1pa9brynJAqvHltXpxbVeMUGUNDodFPtpnjmmte9jGub5UZKSK4vVOCTXHCpLSY8CpSYYdLFB35FhUUPtd4cHrC2gJwH7KiEKuymDtybeN7nz3MfmBgEcpaKHyfOvhM9osgShQ8KlnLdeT1VY5DujvJEm6VTUVO6NzSWFFn2CoyabNTHT2FzsgqmZ1ts7yNy1rmt93ndyCxdqa71-Yvf9V3mjRlRSDnof0y6p9_acz)
---
Elections matter. If it weren’t for conservative attorneys general being elected across the country, Title 42 would be gone by now. With Biden threatening to challenge this ruling and Democrats ready to strike back, **it’s more important than ever that the next Arizona AG continues to take up this fight.** In a time when our border is in a state of crisis and communities like mine are ravaged by violence, Biden continues to make our problem worse. **It’s clear that the safety of my family and my community are of no concern to our President.** Friend, I’m running for Attorney General because I know that Joe Biden won’t prioritize securing our border. This isn’t about politics or talking points. This is about the safety of my family and millions of others whose communities are impacted by Biden’s porous borders. While my opponents want to wait for permission from Biden to enforce our laws, I’ll go on the offense. [**If Biden won’t enforce our laws, I will. If he doesn’t like that, we can hash it out in court.**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=8d1c37026b7d47a1b4a067ded16931c4&_e=HKJHFIjpKuxmhawVNXTlxhZUv97QFtrShAgSM3AM8fhCLDPQN8fGHk2qOzzOiclBP3u1nnHtcXCP-MY3B2MoTwhI4x7lQ4-dHtLPie2cZrC4etl4GfxsGb8QWdXoFH9dEUquDRyuqrP7no47CpEJWyd0JpMQ0rnqpFV0H7Zy2PUwglONsfVVQFAlkMeInCVEfG8WhdgpvrESz5EngaJPP8rOTeAok6Wm3ODOFbtlKCnHVmxe74jArNdiSh4q2OyaiKFuoREFVASWCId-RMcDfD1pa9brynJAqvHltXpxbVc7ygeLfpYo3J3gk2oFKNV9ZZwWIaiQ3GZBdUcZk_GboOqvODdWcJXgA6324unYDrvc7MbFMnNHPCTSXhn_9H7xom7liC8iWPHX2jlhBrQM_a3ktipyG9kKj52iCrp-eh6rfpGYSMDjvgXUNcAGiL_cSRZiBfzVWEtLBLL8KeKs_K77v0iDnlwaCrCcdnpdKi88uMFx_Jv4V7sxxQ2MFjCk) I’m the only candidate for Attorney General that has personal experience with our border crisis and will take action every day to protect Arizonans. Can you [**RUSH a donation TODAY**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=8d1c37026b7d47a1b4a067ded16931c4&_e=HKJHFIjpKuxmhawVNXTlxhZUv97QFtrShAgSM3AM8fhCLDPQN8fGHk2qOzzOiclBP3u1nnHtcXCP-MY3B2MoTwhI4x7lQ4-dHtLPie2cZrC4etl4GfxsGb8QWdXoFH9dEUquDRyuqrP7no47CpEJWyd0JpMQ0rnqpFV0H7Zy2PUwglONsfVVQFAlkMeInCVEfG8WhdgpvrESz5EngaJPP8rOTeAok6Wm3ODOFbtlKCnHVmxe74jArNdiSh4q2OyaiKFuoREFVASWCId-RMcDfD1pa9brynJAqvHltXpxbVeGTmYjBkdrO5c_dNl8sUlHlhLQeT0xPgqlzt2nuXiYv7-k0aDKf3ZXFC0DUABJWIYTbFZeEp__rLeDuXVk1fpTXBRkGuUKcrdEOl57KaPa9gCgO7nOleQ_UeLOew98S-kYu5LWRgit54i_TRh1IF8NMMhMn-3fXpsDdgUc--iV5rlCuBvOL1RqF_KaL_Fl2zVlBJuSHSk7bPY5xG_4iWTU) to help me fight for you, our border communities and all of Arizona? I’m sick of naysayers telling me I can’t get this work done. I’ll take this fight straight to Biden and make our government enforce our laws. Are you with me? Sincerely, Tiffany

name: =?utf-8?q?Melanie_D=E2=80=99Arrigo?=
subject: The freedom to live
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO
body:
| | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0o0WdcWOWKuu_7U-zCsN1cJZMkqnc87YpwWtfzOHZvedbOHrmwVC09O2c_quogiJDQ1FxHBAIo1rqINexEPzk7dsInagJDHlDDAJXXOsYQ46Yh83KAEkWQqy5eSRMumKHz1fHDVxerX7jYXhQwFWLeAsNoqDnS95FDPv6SnpiJjDkOxQhkj5IkxAOz7xHBx_XkCU0RUA-a2b15AwA29OSP9e_PtrcqYvv9D1Kxkix90fE_CtlZQoQ01ax-_7VTeU_Q/3md/AZM6FLREQUCCh6-hoHzC1g/h0/S-g67JOxy6tnzC_X4EOmcwEeAkhBkdkprMDirKcZ0vQ)
---
_Content warning: This email addresses the tragic mass shooting in Uvalde, Texas and the topic of gun violence. Please skip this email if the content is too distressing._
Peter Willis,
In Uvalde, Texas, an eighteen-year-old walked into a store on his birthday and bought an AR-15, a weapon of war. Yesterday, he used that weapon to massacre a classroom of 19 children. Two of their teachers died trying to protect them. It was the deadliest school shooting since Sandy Hook, which took place almost ten years ago.
This heartbreaking tragedy is the 213th mass shooting, and the 30th at a K-12 school, in the United States this year alone — happening just ten days after an 18 year old white supremacist shot up a supermarket in Buffalo, NY with a weapon of war, killing ten people in a predominantly Black community.
I am heartbroken, but I am also enraged.
**For these deaths, the NRA is responsible. The gun lobby is responsible. And the politicians who have sold their bodies, their votes, their integrity, their morality and our children to them are responsible.**
Enough is enough. We cannot lose more babies. And we cannot keep asking our teachers to put their bodies on the line for our children.
We should not be afraid of dying before we make it home to cook dinner for the kids. We should not be afraid of sending our kids to school and never seeing them again.
**Republicans talk about the freedom to own a gun;_I want my kids to have the freedom to live._**
And if Republicans refuse to prioritize our children over the NRA money that feeds their re-election campaigns, _they should never hold power again_.
**As a mother of three, organizer with Moms Demand Action, and community leader, I’m running for Congress to make sure that happens.**
Republicans across the country are already using this moment to capitalize on their pro-gun lobby agenda. In Texas, Ted Cruz is advocating for arming teachers—the last thing teachers want, and the one thing that won’t work. In New York, Lee Zeldin is blasting the most basic gun safety reforms as he runs as far to the right as possible in his race for Governor.
And right here in NY-03, we have a choice between a mother who’s a gun safety champion, who will fight every day to keep our babies safe—or we can send a Trump Republican with an A rating from the NRA who would rather be complicit in their deaths.
Until then, we must demand better from those in power NOW. **The Democratic-controlled Senate must pass a universal background check bill and federal red flag law ASAP.** Make Republicans and NRA-backed Democrats who offer their shallow “thoughts and prayers” vote on the record for or against legitimate action to save lives and stop a future massacre like this.
We must also come together to support the families and loved ones of those whose lives were ripped away. **[Consider making a donation to the Robb Elementary School Shooting Victims Fund on GoFundMe here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDK7b6Fqbor3bYFGUJCwWOAoNhCWWERZZsKewyc-sPNx8Muf53E-YnUbO75OIdRNzDgoSbUWPg2YRewnK0NgIVm4bTb6xUBHhxAtp-JU3BpjB-zp9YdsWGJYhCLcszFNPjLPliu6v6C4ru5MJPOxEf64ChjfX6CW3aO4rcrBrIY0NbZcOwjWLUoH8GVKhXChXFAvvWSz_YBoUbFuKuG4LvUeeuaYEBSGOQZ0QR_gnfowU5NHkChKkZPqj5qTmykxlMrBySbc_34mEmz8124sIr5yUeAKq9SSR_qTT2bePdebUchVuIEVq2I8Vy3Io6RrxORzvaDQUrgq1FC9FtbyMWY8/3md/AZM6FLREQUCCh6-hoHzC1g/h1/uTq8zaokvD06L6Ql2LVL0LTTY2DtLsrCyBuySRDc_YM)**
My heart goes out to each and every person impacted by this horrific tragedy, especially the parents who unknowingly dropped off their children at school for the last time.
This is not inevitable, but it will take action and political will to stop it. Let’s fight like hell to make it happen and start saving lives.
— Melanie

Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal.
---

Friend,
Our campaign just received a HUGE endorsement from 11th District Republican State Central Committeeman and former mayor of Bolingbrook Roger Claar.

Jerry Evans

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Biden Gets One Right and One Wrong
body:
Biden reached out and slapped them in the face! No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Biden Gets One Right and One Wrong](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-j/)
Over the weekend, Joe Biden reached out to Taiwan. With his other hand, he slapped them in the face. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [An Orwellian Idea](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-d/)
The Biden administration is contemplating setting up a Misinformation Governance Board, which sounds a whole lot like an Orwellian Ministry of Truth (from 1984.) God help us! You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Back in Burqas](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-u/)
The Biden administration surrendered Afghanistan to the Taliban about nine months ago. They apparently believed that this was a new, more moderate Taliban. How's that working out? You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Education - Another KEY Issue This Year](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-n/)
Democrats have traditionally polled stronger with the public on education than Republicans have. But not anymore. And there's good reason for that. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-c/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-q/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-a/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-f/) [ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-v/) [ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-tyiyhrud-kujkulhluu-e/) [ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-tyiyhrud-l-s) | Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. name: Herschel Walker
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC

body:
Let's make sure we're on the right path. | Hey Fellow American,

I haven’t heard from you yet and we’re really in a bind here with the opposition that we’re up against.

**I really need your support if we’re going to have any chance of beating back the Democrats who are trying to stop us from winning back America.**

[**If you’re with me then please chip in anything you can to help us bring the fight to them.**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=18e13e91b4164d88abc02af219bc1025&_e=oOK1DIiHFZ4VTR2hnqD5zEwDRmYnGMPGda8xzN14Vg0dqL_5eUVaxrEmOra6gq6ObGXGuh0MKyVZYFwjGioS-BOJk3UoJpgNjmLivXimyMojxv7mjbwIr-4tpBJNRIp6fbmb7b2F9mo4ZWTwWIpxZyspOciunmE61Zf2MoYxK2US5YQjW3WWwa47CmvofeaPNQ7aUHMUCExT_3hwn_ATPzKqUAZwQ402UwSplfP01R5oDAiS3ho8-63adzD_MILLYySqQus6xMgKBsl6yLWlGHpLW8zlKUiIMHCoEytBeE7B6n1FyxZNjzP_knBGANriWPiqkEZbMl25LkN81bEI42nVxQ-wBvaoMQ--URhoJIvV-L5kmyMRzFVTigB_RVGhE3g5-kpd0IDUPSqXs2jt3NbzGF9JjU1eYVxz0LjEpWNgPwQGMMvdNuSNh2zotS_F)

\-----Original Message-----
From: Joe Arpaio- America’s Toughest
Sheriff
Sent: Thursday, May 19, 2022 8:51 PM
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Subject: We’re at a Crossroads

Fellow American,

America is at a crossroads. It's either we keep allowing the Democrats to drag our nation down a dangerous path of censorship and hate, or we get our nation back on track to prosperity.

**_You'd think that would be an easy decision, and yet so many in this country still blindly support Biden and the radical left's agenda._**

We have to change course, and we have to do it now. Thank you for your time and support. \-- Joe Arpaio \-----Original Message----- From: Joe Arpaio- America’s Toughest Sheriff Sent: Thursday, May 19, 2022 8:51 PM To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Subject: We’re at a Crossroads Fellow American, America is at a crossroads. It's either we keep allowing the Democrats to drag our nation down a dangerous path of censorship and hate, or we get our nation back on track to prosperity. You'd think that would be an easy decision, and yet so many in this country still blindly support Biden and the radical left's agenda. We have to change course, and we have to do it now. The pressure is building for this cycle, and all you have to do is turn on the news to see their legions marching and mobilizing to fight Conservatives in every town across America. I need your support to take them on, and with your help, we can win back our America. Thank you, Joe Arpaio Experience. Principles. Leadership. | | Paid for by Joe Arpaio for Fountain Hills, Arizona Mayor. Authorized by Joe Arpaio.

name: Mark McCloskey
subject: Please, I’m asking respectfully
body:
[](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiythhy-bjututkitk-r/) Friends, As you may have heard, we just put up billboards across the state to advertise our America First campaign. We asked each person getting our message to [step up with a $100 donation to adopt one of the billboards](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiythhy-bjututkitk-y/) so we could afford to put these up. While several patriots stepped up to help fund this effort, not enough did, and now we are at risk of having to take them down. So, this is me coming to you again - respectfully - to ask for your urgent help... **We still need help to fund our billboards in**[**St. Louis**](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiythhy-bjututkitk-j/)**,**[**Jackson**](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiythhy-bjututkitk-t/)**,**[**Fulton**](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiythhy-bjututkitk-i/)**and**[**Springfield**](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiythhy-bjututkitk-d/)[**.**](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiythhy-bjututkitk-h/) [](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiythhy-bjututkitk-o/) Here are the specifics:We need 15 more supporters to help for the billboards in St. Louis, 5 people for Jackson, 2 people for Fulton and 3 supporters for Springfield with a donation of $100 each. Can I count on you to join the effort? [ADOPT A BILLBOARD IN ST. LOUIS](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiythhy-bjututkitk-b/) [ADOPT A BILLBOARD IN JACKSON](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiythhy-bjututkitk-n/) [ADOPT A BILLBOARD IN FULTON](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiythhy-bjututkitk-p/) [ADOPT A BILLBOARD IN SPRINGFIELD](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiythhy-bjututkitk-m/) If we don't get enough support here, we are going to have to pull these billboards down. With the election in just a couple months, that would be a disaster for our campaign. Please don't let me down!Thank you,Mark McCloskey [](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiythhy-bjututkitk-c/)[](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiythhy-bjututkitk-q/)[](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiythhy-bjututkitk-a/) | [McCloskeyforM](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiythhy-bjututkitk-f/)[issouri](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiythhy-bjututkitk-z/) | 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335, Saint Louis, MO 63108[Unsubscribe](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-u-tyiythhy-bjututkitk-v/) [Preferences](https://markmccloskeyformissouri.updatemyprofile.com/r-tyiythhy-9A790A88-bjututkitk-e) | [Unsubscribe](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-u-tyiythhy-bjututkitk-s/)
---

name: D'Esposito for Congress
subject: The Court Has Spoken
body:
The court has spoken and we now know the district that we will be running in this November.
No images? [Click here](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-e-bhtilo-iubikjttk-d/) [](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bhtilo-iubikjttk-r/) Peter, The court has spoken and we now know the district that we will be running in this November.As a Hempstead Town Councilman from Island Park, I'm excited about the result!The court removed the section of the district that had been in North Hempstead and, now, it's most of the Town of Hempstead plus the City of Long Beach.**And it includes my entire Town Council district, giving us a HUGE ADVANTAGE.** In March, we polled and we were _WINNING BY 12 POINTS_ over our likely Democrat opponent.Now that the redistricting process is finished, we have a great opportunity to take back New York's 4th Congressional District and elect a Republican Majority in the House of Representatives. Thank You,Anthony [Donate](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bhtilo-iubikjttk-y/) [Volunteer](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bhtilo-iubikjttk-j/) [](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bhtilo-iubikjttk-t/)[](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bhtilo-iubikjttk-i/) | | [ Share ](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-fb-bhtilo-iubikjttk-h/) | [ Tweet ](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-tw-bhtilo-iubikjttk-k/) | [ Forward ](https://despositoforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-iubikjttk-1C334D89-bhtilo-l-u)
---|---|---
[Unsubscribe](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-u-bhtilo-iubikjttk-o/)

---
| | Friend, With Jimmy busy preparing for the last two weeks of the election, we also have some big news! Today is Jimmy's 34th birthday. He shares his birthday with his younger brother and sister–same day, different years. Here they are blowing out their joint birthday candles when they could still fit all the candles on one cake!
---
| |
---
| | Earlier today Jimmy shared this tribute to his siblings on social media ([follow him here](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/07O3z-RIF/c?w=V99IXY_RQf5ToKWXOA-VXXzFzpKffUCIL_wuD2IUFCc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9qaW1teV9mcmVtZ2VuLyIsInIiOiJjMjNlZWZmZC1jMDYyLTQ0MDUtZWE3Yi04YTVmZjE3MGY5MjgiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlOWVhYzY4OS1hYjhmLTQ1MDYtOTlkNi0wYzQ1YWNiYjliZjgifQ)). "Today I turn 34. For 32 of these years I’ve shared my birthday with my little brother, and for 29 years we’ve shared it with our little sister. I truly love and admire my siblings. My brother is an incredible human and police officer, who has earned multiple commendations for saving lives under unbelievable pressure. Natalie is an incredible mother and I am proud that I get to brag about her grace under pressure as a mom and a marine. My siblings are my favorite people on the planet and I am so grateful that they continue to teach me how to be a better person." Click the [link here](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/07O3z-RIF/c?w=Vc3sKWSDoExIUlE3jsOU1GFKMrorsBvBHORojJfov0o.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2pmYmlydGhkYXkiLCJyIjoiYzIzZWVmZmQtYzA2Mi00NDA1LWVhN2ItOGE1ZmYxNzBmOTI4IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTllYWM2ODktYWI4Zi00NTA2LTk5ZDYtMGM0NWFjYmI5YmY4In0) to sign Jimmy's birthday card and make a donation to the campaign. "Today I turn 34. For 32 of these years I’ve shared my birthday with my little brother, and for 29 years we’ve shared it with our little sister. I truly love and admire my siblings. My brother is an incredible human and police officer, who has earned multiple commendations for saving lives under unbelievable pressure. Natalie is an incredible mother and I am proud that I get to brag about her grace under pressure as a mom and a marine. My siblings are my favorite people on the planet and I am so grateful that they continue to teach me how to be a better person." Click the to sign Jimmy's birthday card and make a donation to the campaign. With only two weeks left before this VERY competitive primary, there is lots to be done and we are excited to push through to the end! | | | | | One of the biggest barriers to the success of a grassroots campaign like ours is the influence that corporate money can have with blocking messages like ours. Click through to our Supporter Kit to see more ways you can help. | | | | | With only 28 days until Election Day, Jimmy Fremgen is fighting for solutions to homelessness, support for small business, to end corruption in politics, climate action, and a strong, stable, globally competitive economy that works for everyone. He’s standing up to corporate special interests and doesn’t take any money from corporate PACs or Fossil Fuel execs, so we rely on grassroots supporters like you pitching in when they can. He needs your help! Make a contribution today. | | | | | Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Jimmy Fremgen for Congress, 1809 S Street Suite 101-117, Sacramento, CA 95811. | | | | | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . If you feel you received it by mistake or wish to unsubscribe, please _.

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Re: Uvalde
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
The horrific news out of Texas is every parent’s worst nightmare. My heart breaks for the children, their families, teachers, and the entire Uvalde community in the wake of yet another preventable tragedy.

As a mom, I know the fear that grips parents when they drop their kids off at school and worry if they’ll come home safe. And I’m outraged that our leaders in Washington don’t have the backbone to take on the gun lobby and pass commonsense gun safety legislation. But I refuse to accept this as the status quo.

Every day, this is a crisis. And every minute that goes by, the tragedies pile up, the body counts rise, and communities are torn apart. **When will it be enough?**

Our kids should be able to go to school without the fear of being gunned down. And gut-wrenchingly, it’s not only the classroom: it’s the supermarket in Buffalo, the church in Charleston, the concert in Las Vegas, the synagogue in Pittsburgh, the club in Orlando — and the temple in Oak Creek, the brewery in Milwaukee, and the health spa in Brookfield. The list continues to grow.

**We know what to do to end the scourge of gun violence in America. We just need to elect leaders who have the courage to act.**

For too long, the gun lobby has had its grip on Washington Republicans who fail to protect our children and our communities from senseless violence at every turn. Thoughts and prayers ring hollow when they come from spineless politicians, like Ron Johnson, who don’t have the guts to stand up to the gun lobby’s corrupt influence — even at the expense of public safety and common sense.

As a kid in Eau Claire, I grew up in a family of hunters. I respect the rights enshrined in our Constitution — but that’s not what this is about. That’s the lie sold to us by politicians who are in the pocket of the big gun cartel. What this is really about is the staggering failure to protect the lives of our fellow Americans.

**If we want to combat this public health crisis and keep weapons of war out of the hands of domestic abusers, criminals, and terrorists, then we need comprehensive background checks, red flag laws, and a ban on high-capacity magazines.**

These are commonsense solutions supported by the vast majority of Americans — and U.S. Senators. And yet, the will of the people is trampled time and time again by Republicans in Washington, bought and paid for by the gun lobby, who filibuster any meaningful change to our lax gun laws — forcing the rest of us to accept mass shooting deaths as a normal feature of American life. _That must end now._

This epidemic is destroying our children’s futures and the hopes of our nation. We cannot let another minute go by without addressing the crisis of gun violence in America.

For the sake of our children and our country, Washington must act.

Thank you for reading.

Sarah Godlewski

body:

| | | | **Do you agree that we need to take action RIGHT NOW to pass commonsense gun safety reforms?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/signup/email-dscc-rr-gun-safety-petition-short-pros-2022/?t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220525-UrgentRequest-GunReformShort-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220525-UrgentRequest-GunReformShort-Pros-sl1&akid=4485%2E9716520%2ElrtWS8)

Team, 21 people were just killed in a senseless act of gun violence that left 19 children dead in Uvalde, Texas. This comes less than two weeks after 10 more lives were taken in an attack against Black Americans in Buffalo, New York.

We all agree that something needs to be done, but **Mitch McConnell continues to block commonsense gun safety measures despite their overwhelming bipartisan support across our country.**

Now is not the time to be silent. We need to show the gun lobby that we will not sit idly by as they refuse to save innocent lives from gun violence.

**So please, answer now:**

**Do you agree that we need to take action RIGHT NOW to pass commonsense gun safety reforms?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/signup/email-dscc-rr-gun-safety-petition-short-pros-2022/?t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220525-UrgentRequest-GunReformShort-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220525-UrgentRequest-GunReformShort-Pros-sl1&akid=4485%2E9716520%2ElrtWS8)

subject: Will you claim your signed copy of Ben Carson's new book?

body:
|
---
| | | **" Cancel culture and Jim Crow racism have much in common. The aim of both is to disenfranchise and control the targeted group." \- Dr. Ben Carson
**
Ben Carson goes into an in depth look at the current state of our nation in his new book _Created Equal_. From his upbringing in Detroit to serving in President Trump's cabinet, Carson brings his perspective on how we overcome the Left's weaponizing of the racial divide.

I came to America legally. I didn't rely on government assistance. I'm not oppressed or a victim. **I'm a proud American, and I love this country so much I put my life on the line in the Navy for 25 years alongside Special Forces and SEAL Teams in Afghanistan and Somalia.**

**And we took on career politicians to WIN our primary FOR THE PEOPLE.**

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z179mt8laodb3arimc1g4840t7hdhb6f0dfgrn40_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clim9oj2c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65ttimkq3fd3ks9ge6dj1e5qj2dj3cti63d1meapnddj3cdhr4sjkmaqrapbgs5jrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p36phhmiqr9ptim9j3ao5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zso9p3ecdg45g7ebom6odb9un6hm47unc54hc198_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clim9oj2c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeq9m1i4s6ejeidd1jjkjebaed5oeeko9etjmneo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clim9oj2c5h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuu63ut8lp2hbt6f6efb2gr8282nrnjk62qvsumg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clim9oj2c5h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: I'm suing Twitter and I need your help
body:
My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Te
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3i2tknde36k5j94i3or0qssnh1mvaejv6fc1050_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqr6phgslpndcpjcphm4s9meoon6tj6ehp60sjiceob1p33e8pmeo9lmpgjctln6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6dj33d5lmjjr5cj666ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clj6apb4s9h6aoh5u)
[](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c5af0b94d65ef8f59888b?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220524_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-ADN&utm_content=ADN) Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we’ve caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That’s why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties – _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c5af0b94d65ef8f59888b?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220524_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-ADN&utm_content=ADN)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O’Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c5af0b94d65ef8f59888b?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220524_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-ADN&utm_content=ADN) [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c5af0b94d65ef8f59888b?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220524_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-ADN&utm_content=ADN) [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c5af0b94d65ef8f59888b?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220524_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-ADN&utm_content=ADN) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for “violating the government’s rules about election integrity.” _Hopefully, I don’t need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment._ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris’ vacated seat in the U.S. Senate – and he was afraid that Rogan’s tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c5af0b94d65ef8f59888b?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220524_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-ADN&utm_content=ADN) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c5af0b94d65ef8f59888b?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220524_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-ADN&utm_content=ADN) That’s why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c5af0b94d65ef8f59888b?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220524_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-ADN&utm_content=ADN) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today’s left. We’ve taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes—out of school—during the pandemic. We’ve taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa’s vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we’re taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O’Handley’s freedom of speech.** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c5af0b94d65ef8f59888b?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220524_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-ADN&utm_content=ADN) I’m not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation – and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c5af0b94d65ef8f59888b?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220524_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-ADN&utm_content=ADN) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to “steal” the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left’s hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That’s why I’m urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c5af0b94d65ef8f59888b?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220524_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-ADN&utm_content=ADN) [**DONATE**](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c5af0b94d65ef8f59888b?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220524_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-ADN&utm_content=ADN) [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c5af0b94d65ef8f59888b?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220524_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-ADN&utm_content=ADN) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c5af0b94d65ef8f59888b?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220524_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-ADN&utm_content=ADN) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
© The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zts2hht3si5em4igv3ckk85qoehmfs820kjde600_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clim9oj2clh2bs) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Read/Act News
subject: Removing these classic stories from schools
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews._ZPBYzyjegEefJgw)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Classic children's literature is being ignored and eliminated from our nation's classrooms at an alarming rate. Beloved classics like _The Wind in the Willows_ , _Treasure Island_ , and _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ are just a few of the books that are rarely being taught to our nation's children today. Not only does this rob young people of classic tales of adventure and friendship, but they also rob children of fundamental lessons about the world and how best to live.
---
| | That's why Hillsdale College released a free online course titled **"Classic Children's Literature."** Perhaps you've had a chance to watch a few lectures. **Today, I'm excited to tell you that the course is now available on DVD! And you can get your very own box set right now!** [**"Classic Children's Literature"**](http://trk.readactnews.-MTUQV5M8CBmRwL1DQ) explores some of the greatest works of children's literature, from Aesop and the classic fairy tales to _Treasure Island_ and _Winnie-the-Pooh_ , and so much more. When you get your box set today, you will not only delight your family, but also evoke a sense of wonder while teaching timeless lessons to the young and old alike.
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | Speaking from my own experience, this course has brought great joy to my family. It has inspired us to read the classic works covered in this course together. And I hope you can share this same experience with your loved ones as you learn more about what makes these beloved stories so important. **You can get your DVD box set of "Classic Children's Literature" by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this secure link:** [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-classic-childrens-literature-today**](http://trk.readactnews.) And when you do, you'll also help expand nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, such as:
* Increasing the number of students taking free online courses.
* Growing the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty.
* Restoring excellence to K-12 education through an American classical curriculum.
* Promoting constitutional education through social media and the radio.

Thank you again for your support of Hillsdale College and for partnering with us to educate our fellow citizens, especially our youngest citizens. Without you, Hillsdale could not offer these courses free of charge to anyone willing to learn. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09Director of Online LearningHillsdale College P.S. These DVDs are an excellent gift for parents, homeschool families, and anyone who cherishes these timeless stories. **Get your DVD box-set of "Classic Children's Literature" by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this secure link:** [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-classic-childrens-literature-today**](http://trk.readactnews.-YXDzHP2Unrkmaw)
---
PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxNDYtYjE1M2E3MDJmMWQ1NGY3ZDhlNmVjYWM0YzhmNzVhNmIiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/4ML50Z5ZrHvjrjsRZ1410g) to unsubscribe.

name: Matt Gaetz (R-FL)
subject: Will you help us fire Liz Cheney?

body:
I’m heading back to Liz Cheney’s home turf - alongside PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP - to join his rally and support this import
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z365gker772mcdlmvgcs8b9ocse8a20rhmac0ico_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clim9oj2cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcdphc8pr0opjmkrr9dhk6mpbedtjegpm8o34sdinfdr26korap1nmhgedc5ge3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8pmccdkmmqefclicoon1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)

| | Did you hear the news?

I’m heading back to Liz Cheney’s home turf - alongside **PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP** \- to join his rally and support this important task...
[_**REMOVING RINO LIZ CHENEY FROM CONGRESS!**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z94met71dmcccc8guvnvq3asnmqcjv0o35n9k6co_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clim9oj2cth2bs)
In case you didn’t know, I rallied against this America Last politician in her home state last year since she’s more interested in impeaching Trump and joining with Nancy Pelosi to smear MAGA than serve our country’s interests.

We showed that the good people of Wyoming REJECT this Never-Trump politician - we sent a clear message with this record-setting rally that Republicans demand leaders who drain the Swamp, not swim in it!

**And this time, led by President Trump, this rally is going to be even BIGGER. So let us know if you’re with us before this MASSIVE rally to FIRE LIZ CHENEY!!! →**
---

| This year is our chance to finally reclaim our party FOR GOOD from the RINOs like Liz Cheney who want to drag Republicans back to the days of pushing us into Forever Wars and serving lobbyists over Americans.

And YOU can be a part of that fight by supporting this massive rally effort...

**So can I count on you to help me and Trump FIRE Liz Cheney?**

| Today is the day, please come meet us if you are in the Germantown area.
Hosted by the Montgomery County Hispanic Chamber of Commerce
Join us for a great night and meet a wide array of Montgomery County Candidates:
* Mariela Roca, Congress CD-06
* Reardon (Sully) Sullivan, County Executive
* Dan Cuda, County Council 2
* Harold Maldonado, County Council 7

All will be in attendance at Mi Rancho Restaurant in Germantown.
WHEN: Thursday, May 26th, 2022 @ 6:00 PM LOCATION: Mi Rancho Restaurant 19725 Germantown Rd A Germantown, MD 20874
This is a free event.
Complimentary appetizers will be provided.
PLEASE RSVP VIA THE LINK BELOW FOR A PROPER HEADCOUNT!

We have a GREAT group of volunteers but we could always use more! There are many things to do, and you can volunteer in a way that fits your style and schedule.
We can't let the Democrats in power continue to destroy our economy with sky-high inflation and out-of-control gas prices. This November, we need a fighter like me to get Democrat congressman David Trone out of office!

name: Sarah Palin
subject: Publicly endorse my campaign for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
Join President Trump and Elise Stefanik | Our movement is growing stronger by the day. In addition to President Trump's endorsement...
Peter,

Our movement is growing stronger by the day.

In addition to President Trump's endorsement, **I recently received the endorsement of Congresswoman Elise Stefanik, Chairwoman of the House Republican Conference.** Elise is a tireless advocate for the America First agenda, and I'm honored to have her support as I work to restore President Trump's America First agenda in Alaska and across the country.

During the course of this campaign, I've earned the endorsements of many great Republican leaders: President Trump, Newt Gingrich, Nikki Haley, and now Elise Stefanik. However, there's one endorsement that I haven't received yet, and that's **YOURS, Peter.**

Your support is critical to my success in this election. Without the support of every pro-Trump, pro-America patriot, I won't win.

_**[Sign your name before midnight tonight to PUBLICLY ENDORSE my campaign for United States Congress.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60465583:JgJ5uzoJN:m:1:3317145305:0485A3BCE4CDAC693A5FEF1B2CB59789:r)**_

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60465583:JgJ5uzoJN:m:1:3317145305:0485A3BCE4CDAC693A5FEF1B2CB59789:r)

There's a reason why so many prominent conservatives are joining our movement, Peter. They know that I'm the _**ONLY**_ candidate in this race who will fight tooth and nail for the hardworking people of Alaska.

My team is showing me an updated list of endorsements first thing tomorrow morning. I'm hoping to see _**YOUR NAME**_ at the very top of the list.

**[Add your name before 11:59 PM tonight to PUBLICLY ENDORSE my campaign for United States Congress.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60465583:JgJ5uzoJN:m:1:3317145305:0485A3BCE4CDAC693A5FEF1B2CB59789:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60465583:JgJ5uzoJN:m:1:3317145305:0485A3BCE4CDAC693A5FEF1B2CB59789:r)
Sarah Palin

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9038%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=2cBObl2O6mVLQYxuYfSDeA&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22146%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m2iYFMLwAOi9D2lUkGOnzw&sysid=1)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22147%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RdvaxJCHUAZblxcgbyIXWw&sysid=1) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think--and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22148%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NC9qH%2fmGx38wd3g7r4kGwA&sysid=1)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9038%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=2cBObl2O6mVLQYxuYfSDeA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9038%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=2cBObl2O6mVLQYxuYfSDeA&sysid=1)

name: Brad Finstad
subject: It’s official
body:
[](https://finstadforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qddbty-jrhhjlljll-r/) Dear Friend,I'm writing to extend my gratitude to you for your support in yesterday's MN-01 special primary election. Our efforts paid off and we were victorious in the hard-fought GOP primary race. Jackie and I are so grateful for everything you did to get us across that finish line.We also deeply appreciate the kind words from the other Republican candidates in the race and are working hard to unify voters across southern Minnesota. But as you know, yesterday was just the first step in our campaign to keep the 1st Congressional District red and help turn our country and state around. The field is now set, and the Special Election is coming up on Tuesday, Aug. 9. We need to redouble our efforts immediately to hold off the Democrats.The differences in this race could not be clearer. My opponent is a multi-millionaire Democrat who is prepared to pump millions into his campaign to get to Washington, D.C. to support Nancy Pelosi's agenda. Minnesotans can't afford the Biden-Pelosi agenda anymore - higher taxes, more government spending, record inflation and gas prices, and chaos at our southern border. I'm running for Congress to bring real change to D.C. and get things done for southern Minnesota families.It's going to be a sprint to the August 9 Special Election! I'm committed to working hard every day to get our message to voters - I hope I can continue to count on your support every step of the way.Thank you and we'll see you on the campaign trail! Sincerely,
Brad Finstad [](https://finstadforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qddbty-jrhhjlljll-y/)[](https://finstadforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qddbty-jrhhjlljll-t/) | | [Unsubscribe](https://finstadforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-u-qddbty-jrhhjlljll-i/)
---

Hello,
My mother worked alongside my dad in Lebanon Farm Shop well into their 70s. They refused assistance from their many children even after they lost their life savings in the Savings and Loan debacle of the 1980s. My mom in coveralls, petite as she was, handing tools to my dad is an indelible image I carry with me to this day.
My dad built a business repairing farm implements. In a way, I think he hoped that I’d stick around and take it over, but that wasn’t to be. I joined the Navy after getting a scholarship and my life as a machinist and welder came to a close.
Dad said very little about his service in the Second World War. He had the burns and shrapnel of his first ship sinking, and would provide some quips about surviving a night amongst the flotsam and death off Guadalcanal, but he didn’t dissuade me from enlisting. My mom had the bravery in saying quite simply, “The healthy bird flees the nest.” She wiped her eyes on her apron as I drove up the hill on my way to ‘boot camp.’ It took me some time to understand why.
You could say my mom and dad embodied rural Iowa values in their unique ways: Family, hard work, sacrifice, education, and honesty. And I think of them every day on the campaign trail, because it’s those values that drove me to run for political office.
**After nearly 4 decades serving in the United States Navy, I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because it’s time politicians in Washington fight for everyday people like my folks.**
The early polls all show this will be a close race, so of course, I’m facing down millions of dollars in Super PAC attacks. I don’t come from some political dynasty, and I’m not taking corporate PAC money. Instead, I’m relying entirely on the donations of generous grassroots donors like you.
**There’s less than 24 hours until our critical fundraising deadline, and right now we’re still short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to defeat Chuck Grassley and win. So I have to ask:**
[**Please, may I count on you to make a donation to my campaign today – before our fundraising deadline? Every dollar you can give today will help me build a campaign to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45744671/347314559/-42398318?refcode=em20220526am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzhhZWM1Zi1lYmRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q3cvr5ta8NRk1MeRDsAoXGIG9--7aouKCf5n7Qo3bIM=)

name: Shontel Brown
subject: It’s time for policy and action.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
We must address our gun violence crisis.
Peter,

This cannot continue.

I am greatly saddened by the tragic events that have occurred in our nation over the past two weeks.

Ten innocent Americans last week in Buffalo, 19 children and two adults yesterday in Texas. With more than 17,000 gun deaths in 2022 alone, we need action.

We must address gun violence as a public health crisis. I refuse to accept these shootings as the new status quo. Ban assault weapons. Institute universal background checks. Close the Charleston Loophole.

We’ve seen thoughts and prayers for too long. It’s time for policy and action.

In solidarity,

Shontel Brown Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress
PO Box 221232
Beachwood, OH 44122
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/SB_jCLuMXEGKMEGQua2C0A2?unsubscribedata=iparrv17raXeoBhfUS1w4zlxDx9V%2BV1jp8rtrMHGsGTGvDy2A%2B57nppAQeyFjnLFcb7Ku5kxXYfpd%2BnzcF%2FCiRWK%2FcEm7hIkhNbNbJAewd%2ByuJsNv1j4y0lR84DLdh7pvtmEDQRnaL4xCyoDoi3zdZOF%2FLperx%2FazvfGr0yCiCDtDInrd72%2BJFOCRB2SjD80uLbWIlNeySKJHEak1lcIt8bcqoFyzXUJFMrX6IbDQw3MaB2I4Zp93ny1PBTYw5pVLwl56FR8lUmnZqNcGg5RmP8kT4xfrK%2BglbTEYenPI0eOjzXVNW3q4VQQkbM8FCrC5ZB0Ln4wgT1UnrekxtpU4pAJ5E9FUwd0MXypGsqgaxIZ1bUpiyPVXNEMqQnjv%2Bh45OiJGR%2FXK4BZChvbeneJ7k8QElL8mHFMo7716JgsskFRx0I0B4PSZ4AebK75G89M).

subject: The Fight has Just Begun
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60465605:6hKi2zoPN:m:1:3317145305:BD3F4C01BDE450E93F0DC1890A3C40B0:r "MTG") Peter: We did it! Thank you! Despite every attempt by the RINOs primarying me and Deep State Leftists trying to kick me off the ballot, the voters listened to my American First message and made me victorious in last night's primary election. But while we won that battle, now comes the war. Because I had to spend money to defend myself in the legal battle to keep me on the ballot while also fending off my RINO opponents, I'm in desperate need to fund my campaign for the general election. **[That's why I'm asking you to help me have the resources I need to defend my seat against my Leftist opponent with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60465605:6hKi2zoPN:m:1:3317145305:BD3F4C01BDE450E93F0DC1890A3C40B0:r "That’s why I’m asking you to help me have the
resources I need to defend my seat against my Leftist opponent with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today.")** My Leftist Democrat opponent, Marcus Flowers has raised over $8 million to defeat me. In fact, he outraised me 2-1 in the latest quarter! To say the knives are out for me is the understatement of the year. Funny how that happens when you stand up for freedom, call out Pelosi and the Squad for their Marxist policies, and stand with President Trump on his claims of a stolen election in 2020. I could have played it safe and kept my mouth shut. Been a good back-bencher and not rocked the boat. But that's not what I promised to do. I told the people I would stand for the truth. I would call out the lies. **And I kept my promise!** Because of that, Pelosi tried everything she could to keep me quiet. Whether it was kicking me off my committees or fining me thousands of dollars over my refusal to comply with her unjust Mask Mandate, I would not bow down to her, the media, or the Deep State cabal, and their march to socialism. **[But that has put a huge target on my back. And if I have any chance of fending off my Democrat challenger, I'm going to need you right by my side with your donation of $50, $100, or $250 donation today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60465605:6hKi2zoPN:m:1:3317145305:BD3F4C01BDE450E93F0DC1890A3C40B0:r "But
that has put a huge target on my back. And if I have any chance of fending off my Democrat challenger, I’m going to need you right by my side
with your donation of $50, $100, or $250 donation today.")** There's a red wave coming. But more importantly, there's an America First tsunami that's going to flood Congress with leaders like myself, Matt Gaetz, J.D. Vance, and other Trump allies. But that's only going to happen if you go all-in with your support today. **[I can't defeat my Dem opponent and remove Pelosi from the Speaker's Chair with just a $5 donation from you. I need you to dig deep. Can you chip in $100, $500, or $1,000 today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60465605:6hKi2zoPN:m:1:3317145305:BD3F4C01BDE450E93F0DC1890A3C40B0:r "I can’t defeat my Dem opponent and remove Pelosi from the
Speaker’s Chair with just a $5 donation from you. I need you to dig deep. Can you chip in $100, $500, or $1,000 today?")** Help me win this battle of the ages and show the RINOs, the Deep State, and the radical leftists that the people stand with me and our America First principles! **[Please act today and help me set a path towards a November victory!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60465605:6hKi2zoPN:m:1:3317145305:BD3F4C01BDE450E93F0DC1890A3C40B0:r "Please act today and help me set a path towards a November
victory!")** Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

I could have played it safe and kept my mouth shut. Been a good back-bencher and not rocked the boat. But that's not what I promised to do. I told the people I would stand for the truth. I would call out the lies. And I kept my promise! Because of that, Pelosi tried everything she could to keep me quiet. Whether it was kicking me off my committees or fining me thousands of dollars over my refusal to comply with her unjust Mask Mandate, I would not bow down to her, the media, or the Deep State cabal, and their march to socialism. "But that has put a huge target on my back. And if I have any chance of fending off my Democrat challenger, I’m going to need you right by my side with your donation of $50, $100, or $250 donation today." There's a red wave coming. But more importantly, there's an America First tsunami that's going to flood Congress with leaders like myself, Matt Gaetz, J.D. Vance, and other Trump allies. But that's only going to happen if you go all-in with your support today. "I can’t defeat my Dem opponent and remove Pelosi from the Speaker’s Chair with just a $5 donation from you. I need you to dig deep. Can you chip in $100, $500, or $1,000 today?" Help me win this battle of the ages and show the RINOs, the Deep State, and the radical leftists that the people stand with me and our America First principles! "Please act today and help me set a path towards a November victory!" Thank you. God Bless America. Marjorie Taylor Greene Congresswoman (R-GA) | PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC. Mike Pence will be back in New Hampshire TONIGHT to headline a fundraiser that will raise massive amounts of money for far-right Republicans.

This is urgent, folks –
**Mike Pence will be back in New Hampshire TODAY to headline a fundraiser that will raise massive amounts of money for far-right Republicans.**
This is bad news. Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back the Senate majority, and Pence's visit makes clear that New Hampshire is their top priority.
My last race was the closest Senate race in the country, and a recent poll is showing me two points behind an extreme anti-choice opponent. If I lose, Democrats will lose any chance at protecting access to abortion.
With _Roe v. Wade_ on the precipice of being overturned, we can't allow that to happen. That's why my team is setting an emergency goal to raise $25,000 before Mike Pence steps on stage.

clean_body: Mike Pence will be back in New Hampshire TONIGHT to headline a fundraiser that will raise massive amounts of money for far-right Republicans. | | | This is urgent, folks – Mike Pence will be back in New Hampshire TODAY to headline a fundraiser that will raise massive amounts of money for far-right Republicans. This is bad news. Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back the Senate majority, and Pence's visit makes clear that New Hampshire is their top priority. My last race was the closest Senate race in the country, and a recent poll is showing me two points behind an extreme anti-choice opponent. If I lose, Democrats will lose any chance at protecting access to abortion. With Roe v. Wade on the precipice of being overturned, we can't allow that to happen. That's why my team is setting an emergency goal to raise $25,000 before Mike Pence steps on stage. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = If Mike Pence attacks my campaign, it will make headlines and invite even more dark money into New Hampshire. So it's critical that my team is prepared for whatever comes our way. $3 may seem like a drop in the bucket in a competitive race like this one, but with the Senate majority hinging on this seat, any amount goes a long way. = Thank you for stepping up. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can . name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Help Fire Liz Cheney!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz_
body:
Dear Peter,

Liz Cheney voted to impeach President Trump.

Liz Cheney is helping Democrats try and steal the 2022 midterms by conspiring with Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff, and the rest of the January 6 Witch Hunt committee to hit Donald Trump and his supporters with criminal charges.

**Liz Cheney even thinks you are a threat to democracy for supporting President Trump.**

This Saturday, I'm traveling with President Trump to Wyoming to rally conservatives to remove Liz Cheney from Congress in her primary election.

And I need your help to send a message to Liz Cheney and the rest of the Never Trump RINOs that this is Donald Trump's Republican Party.

**That's why I'm launching a "Fire Liz Cheney" Money Bomb to raise _$75,000_ by _Saturday, May 28_.**

**[Can I count on you to stand with myself and President Trump in the fight to fire Liz Cheney by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, or $100](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60220778:s-na3shEN:m:1:2365227053:3FF79802E23DC105F3CA65B63692803E:r)?** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60220778:s-na3shEN:m:1:2365227053:3FF79802E23DC105F3CA65B63692803E:r) **Liz Cheney's already raked in over $10,000,000 from swamp lobbyists, the Bush dynasty, the Big Pharma vaccine manufacturers, the military-industrial complex, and Big Tech companies that censor conservatives like Google.**

I need your help to show that the America First movement is mobilized and motivated to fire Liz Cheney.

_That's because even if a red wave sweeps Nancy Pelosi out of power_...

... Liz Cheney keeping her seat means America First conservatives cannot build Donald Trump's border wall, impeach Joe Biden over the catastrophe at the southern border, ban woke critical race theory from the U.S. military, or end the witch hunt to block Donald Trump from running for re-election in 2024.

**[That's why it's vital you chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or $2,900 to my campaign's"Fire Liz Cheney" money bomb ahead of the May 28 deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60220778:s-na3shEN:m:1:2365227053:3FF79802E23DC105F3CA65B63692803E:r).**

**President Trump and I need your help to mobilize the America First movement to take our country back.** [_**HELP MATT GAETZ FIRE LIZ CHENEY
CHIP IN BELOW**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60220778:s-na3shEN:m:1:2365227053:3FF79802E23DC105F3CA65B63692803E:r) | | | [ Chip in $10 immediately >> ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60220778:s-na3shEN:m:1:2365227053:3FF79802E23DC105F3CA65B63692803E:r) |
---|---|---
| [ Chip in $25 immediately >> ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60220778:s-na3shEN:m:1:2365227053:3FF79802E23DC105F3CA65B63692803E:r) |
| [ Chip in $50 immediately >> ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60220778:s-na3shEN:m:1:2365227053:3FF79802E23DC105F3CA65B63692803E:r) |
| [ Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60220778:s-na3shEN:m:1:2365227053:3FF79802E23DC105F3CA65B63692803E:r) |
| [ Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60220778:s-na3shEN:m:1:2365227053:3FF79802E23DC105F3CA65B63692803E:r) |
Sincerely,

Matt Gaetz
Congresman (R-FL)

body:
On Tuesday, we clinched our spot in the Alabama Senate runoff election.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6gpt5oc52qlq4pc75qn2j82g8ng3iqg4ulq1gqg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u1q7eo3i6gq32t71cooeecpi6gpm2p3kslhjatplm2or3d1leqqe2d1lm8qr6tpnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmapm8c3ie1j38oljcjjr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5cpimeo30cpie49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z37ugjq2mabku3fvr203hnk3qj2fvv7boen2bqd8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cljm0o36cjh2bs)
---
Friend, _**_We DID it!_**_ **On Tuesday, we clinched our spot in the Alabama Senate runoff election.** Thanks to the hard work of conservatives like you, our campaign fought a long, hard battle against _$12 million dollars_ worth of attack ads and countless lies and mistruths.
The forces of evil in Washington threw everything they had at us _**_and we’re still here._**_
---
[**SUPPORT MO BROOKS**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn6js9u74pkg4b60k2l91c1su9mkros34umdvh5o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cljm0o36cjh2bs)
---
I couldn’t be more grateful for everything grassroots conservatives like you have done for our campaign. But we don’t have a moment to rest, because it’s game on for the runoff starting now. Our strategy is simple...
---
| | **_MO BROOKS FOR SENATE _****| Confidential Strategy Memo |** 1] Unite the entire conservative base around Mo’s record2] Fight back against the lies (we know they are coming!) 3] Turn out the vote all over again and WIN
---
[**DONATE TO OUR RUNOFF CAMPAIGN NOW**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5moh1vi3pf2u0nahhcpbbk4j8agnfqku4j6ac80_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cljm0o36cjh2bs)
---
| | Friend, let me tell you a bit about myself – and my record.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuidk71qmgl45gmdpi3nioq4ojm7d82ih95r1uv8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cljm0o36cjh2bs)
---
**My name is Mo Brooks – I represent Alabama’s 5th Congressional District in the U.S. House. But I’m running for the Senate because I’m tired of seeing radical, destructive policies under Chuck Schumer’s feckless leadership.**
---
[**STAND WITH MO BROOKS**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjv052optpvpf8i6vl1s6cvhn0q20qu4j85uppmo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cljm0o36cjh2bs)
---
I have a proven track record of standing up and fighting for conservative principles – and the accolades to back it up:
* A+ national pro-life scorecard rating from Susan B. Anthony List
* 100% rating from the National Right to Life
* A+ rating from NumbersUSA, an immigration watchdog group
* 98% rating from Heritage Action for America
* 93% rating from FreedomWorks
* 93% rating from the NRA
* 91% lifetime rating from the American Conservative Union
* 86% rating from Club for Growth
* U.S. Chamber of Commerce Spirit of Enterprise Award
* 2018 American Trade Hero Award from Coalition for a Prosperous America

And I’ve received endorsements from well-respected conservative hard-hitters:
* Sen. Ted Cruz
* Sen. Rand Paul
* Congressman Jim Jordan
* House Freedom Caucus Chairman Scott Perry
* Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene
* Dr. Kelli Ward
* Mark Levin

---
[**JOIN THEM SUPPORT MO BROOKS**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z46i3a7tt8htfspct1uu3herqio53o01dvimfl8g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cljm0o36cjh2bs)
---
I’ve fought for the America First agenda in the House of Representatives, but I know there’s more work to be done... this time in the Senate. And I know I’m the man for the job.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zifnjjrlmsjmbon389bloaa41bke56cdt0rajh0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cljm0o36cjh2bs)
---
Fellow patriot, I would be honored to have your support in this run-off election. We’re in a battle for the heart and soul of our nation and we have to fight until the very end. [**Can I count on you to join my team and help me fight back against the Swamp?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z53eiffqbild0cqidthb7dhommartuqefjqppoig_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cljm0o36cjh2bs)
---
[**DONATE $100**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj4sgvp2qpj205a6quoa2on6bpbekqi1qh0geqdg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cljm0o36cjh2bs)
---
[**DONATE $75**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi6dfkalbf7k32a9e1k2bjqud5bih7t6uhq8jfro_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cljm0o36cjh2bs)
---
[**DONATE $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z23m1ujvdni4ug6l9cbgchdnlvgemojk8ntdksa8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cljm0o36cjh2bs)
---
[**DONATE $25**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z23pasq8cmaiuvm4h3rqk7gv385fijhspjba4618_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cljm0o36cjh2bs)
---
[**DONATE ANY AMOUNT**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdh6k2g50jmi97ecr23ls5d9vmdklfo2uvcbjp0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cljm0o36cjh2bs)
---
My sincerest thanks,
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6g57drm0tlpvbcvl86efb7anhpv2is95pbab43g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cljm0o36cjh2bs)

Mo Brooks _P.S. We need your support urgently — we’re already under attack, facing a ban from Big Tech censors on YouTube that threatens to cripple our ability to reach Alabama voters with our message._**_Donate now at this secure URL and help us win this runoff:[https://secure.winred.com/mobrooks/action-4338283/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvnbaq1vn5jjbvjeutsrs0pddm5qd93dmfbcp01o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cljm0o36cjh2bs)_**

| | **What can we do to reduce gun violence?** **Universal Background Checks for Firearm Purchases** Over **80%** of the Nation supports universal background checks, including most NRA members. The House recently passed HR8 without our Congressman's support. And after his "nay" vote, he stated, "I oppose any attempt to restrict legal access to firearms." **Research on Firearm Injury and Death** Research is needed to understand the causes and consequences of gun violence; identifying, testing, and implementing strategies to reduce these events is vital. [Read more. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45748039/347325016/2122667624?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGVjYzVjMS1mNWRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c5Bon4Wlz5YkojwEg4b9s3xaHfXQJzpenqK4gdGfXcQ=&emci=e5b6ac30-eadc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=78ecc5c1-f5dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=15167427) **Safe Storage of Firearms** Secure storage is essential to reducing the risk of unintentional or intentional injuries or deaths. **Decrease Rapid and Extended Shooting Capacities** Reducing casualties in mass shooting situations must effectively address high-capacity magazines and firearms with features designed to increase their rapid and extended shooting capacity. These weapons systems should be subject to special regulation. **Mental Health** Improved access to mental healthcare will save countless lives. [Read more. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45748040/347325022/137265220?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGVjYzVjMS1mNWRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c5Bon4Wlz5YkojwEg4b9s3xaHfXQJzpenqK4gdGfXcQ=&emci=e5b6ac30-eadc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=78ecc5c1-f5dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=15167427) **End Immunity for Firearm Companies** **Waiting Periods** Evidence indicates waiting periods reduce the rate of death by suicide.These common-sense, nonpartisan solutions are backed by science and data. Americans demand action, and we need a comprehensive plan of action. These common-sense, nonpartisan solutions are backed by science and data. Americans demand action and we need a comprehensive National plan of action. Our Congressman has yet to address the concerns of parents in our district who have legitimate fears about potential gun violence in local schools. His refusal to acknowledge Tuesday's tragedy or the victims shows a profound lack of leadership. His silence is deafening. Jack Bergman voted against universal background checks and against supporting law enforcement in investigating domestic terrorism. Our "Representative" is voting against us, not with us. We can do better. **It's time to act.**
