name: Tom Malinowski
subject: Notes From Tom: On Uvalde
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
body:
https://malinowskifornj.com/ [https://malinowskifornj.com/]
As Americans, we all are praying for the families of the children gunned down in their elementary school on Tuesday. But as a member of Congress, I was elected to act, not to mourn or pray.

I refuse to accept that America must forever be the only country in the world where parents have to fear that their children will be shot dead in school. In New Jersey, we have proven beyond doubt what works. We have no less crime, no less mental illness, no less evil, than other states. Yet we have one of the lowest gun fatality rates in the country — because we have some of the strongest gun laws.

I have voted and will continue to fight for the passage of similar laws to protect all Americans. Here are some steps we should take, all of which are supported by most Americans and consistent with the 2nd Amendment: *
We
need
to
require
violent
history
checks
for
anyone
purchasing
a
firearm,
with
appropriate
waiting
periods,
and
to
close
the
“boyfriend
loophole"
in
the
background
check
system
to
cover
domestic
partners
convicted
of
stalking
or
abuse.
*
We
should
require
safe
storage
of
weapons
for
people
living
at
home
with
children
or
someone
with
a
mental
illness
or
violent
history.
*
We
need
a
national
red
flag
law,
allowing
law
enforcement
to
confiscate
weapons,
with
a
court
order,
from
people
who
may
pose
a
danger
to
themselves
or
to
others
—
as
we
have
enacted
in
New
Jersey.
*
We
must
restore
the
federal
ban
on
military
grade
assault
weapons
that
was
saving
lives
in
the
decade
it
was
in
place.
No
criminal
should
be
able
to
outgun
police
officers.
*
The
minimum
age
for
purchasing
a
rifle
should
be
raised
to
21,
and
we
should
limit
the
size
of
ammunition
magazines
so
that
shooters
at
least
have
to
pause
and
reload.

I know that many of us are frustrated that with every mass shooting, we pledge to do something, and then nothing happens — so frustrated, in fact, that we lose motivation to keep trying. Please, please, please do not give up hope. It is hard, but not impossible, to negotiate meaningful legislation that can beat the filibuster in the Senate. And if we hold the House, while gaining two more seats in the Senate, we can reform the filibuster.

There are powerful forces in this country that would rather let more children die than to impose a single common sense obligation on gun owners. They want you to believe that you are helpless. They want you to disengage from politics. They know that there are more of us than there are of them, so destroying our confidence is the only way they can win.

This is a terrifying and heartbreaking time. But we have got to lift ourselves up and make the next election a referendum on this madness. I will keep doing what I can, for the families and children of Uvalde, and all the families and children who fear they are next. I am counting on you, too.

Thank you as always,

Tom Malinowski
Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district.
Tom Malinowski for Congress
P.O. Box 263
Somerville, NJ 08876
United States

# Thank You \- 5.26.2022
---
|
---
|
---
| **Friends: **It's been an incredible journey over the past year. As I’ve traveled around our District the overwhelming support and patriotism I’ve witnessed has been truly remarkable. I’ve been touched by the dedication of likeminded people who want to see our conservative values maintained and are willing to join the fight to do something about it! Thank you to everyone who voted for us and has supported us with prayer, financial provision, practical help, and words of encouragement – It has been an honor! There is still an extraordinary amount of work to be done in preserving the blessings of liberty now and for future generations. My mission has not changed and I look forward to joining you in the fight again soon!

body:
|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45766768/347391375/67411685?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTQ4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjIxOWUwMi0xNWRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9EnU27osmlZUyz_0yOtXfCNGMz6GGOup6DIVHvcp9k=&emci=fb28fdfb-95db-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=1f219e02-15dd-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=32238700)

Dear Friend,

I'm sure you've heard my team's crucial updates about our end-of-month fundraising deadline this past week. And they're right, it is urgent and vitally important we meet our end-of-month goals but I had a few minutes today so wanted to send you a message personally.

**I got into politics for Alaska, for jobs and the economy, for families and workers, and for affordable and accessible health care. I love my state and will bring Alaskan values to Washington.**

Throughout my campaign, I've been humbled by the outpouring of support from everyday people like you, who have helped me spread our message to Alaskans in every corner of this beautiful state. Recent polling has shown us beating Sarah Palin for this seat in Congress.

I'm writing this because _none_ of it would have been accomplished, or even possible, without you. **The support from this community, that's what has allowed this campaign to spread a message of unity that is clearly resonating with Alaska.**

I am not sending this email with a flashy donation button, but rather a link for you to get to know more about me: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2205_email_algross_eom?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45766769/347391376/1403725775?refcode=em22_220526_eom3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTQ4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjIxOWUwMi0xNWRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9EnU27osmlZUyz_0yOtXfCNGMz6GGOup6DIVHvcp9k=)**

Thank you for supporting me.

– Al Gross [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45766770/347391377/1403725775?refcode=em22_220526_eom3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTQ4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjIxOWUwMi0xNWRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9EnU27osmlZUyz_0yOtXfCNGMz6GGOup6DIVHvcp9k=)

name: Peter Franchot
subject: I’ve Been Endorsed By Delegate Nick Charles!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
I’m very excited to announce that I have been endorsed by the Chair of the Prince George’s County House Delegation, Delegate Nick Charles! As one of Prince George’s County’s most dynamic public servants, Nick has dedicated his career to improving the lives of District 25 residents.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nickcharlesendorsement?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nickcharlesendorsement?amount=20.22]
He’s fought to close the achievement gap in education, improve health outcomes, and empower our working families. Nick is the kind of consummate public servant that we need more of, and I am honored to have received his endorsement.
Nick, I can’t thank you enough for your trust and your friendship. As Governor, I’ll be your proud partner in the fight to lift all of Maryland’s communities into the high quality of life that they deserve. From combating the student debt crisis, to making Maryland the first carbon neutral state in the nation, to lowering the cost of healthcare and more, we’re going to redefine the promise and possibility of state government under my administration.
Fresh off the heels of this major endorsement announcement, will you chip in to power our campaign to victory? We’re looking to raise an additional $1,975 that will go towards the critical tools we need to reach out to voters, and a groundswell of grassroots donations can easily get us to our goal. So, what do you say?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nickcharlesendorsement?amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nickcharlesendorsement?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nickcharlesendorsement?amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nickcharlesendorsement?amount=100]
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nickcharlesendorsement]
The Washington Post has said that this could be the most expensive election in Maryland’s history – which means the impact of your donation cannot be overstated. I am so proud that the overwhelming majority of our donations come from right here within the state of Maryland. We’re building a truly grassroots movement composed of Maryland workers, activists, neighbors, and friends, and together we can secure a stronger future for our state in the years to come.
Our movement is leading in the polls, leading in endorsements, and leading in the battle of ideas. We are the frontrunners in this crowded race, and with your help, we can pull ahead even further in these final, critical weeks before the July 19 primary.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nickcharlesendorsement?amount=20.22]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: We need leaders who listen
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220526message?refcode=lpfe220526message_m [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220526message?refcode=lpfe220526message_m]
It is a sad day in Texas. With people across our state and across our country, I am devastated by the loss of the 19 children and 2 teachers murdered with a weapon of war at Robb Elementary in Uvalde and heartbroken for their classmates, teachers, and families. And I am heartbroken for every American who, for themselves and their families, fears going to school, to the grocery store, to houses of worship — to the places of community and connection in our country.
We must turn our heartbreak into action. The majority of Americans support common-sense gun safety legislation, but too many elected leaders are ignoring the will of voters.
We must elect leaders — up and down the ballot, in Texas and across the country — who listen to and champion our priorities, including gun safety.
Before I was elected to Congress, I worked with local and national gun-safety groups and community members to advocate for data-driven policies to reduce gun violence, and I took that fight with me to the House where I have co-sponsored legislation requiring universal background checks, closing gun purchase loopholes, and banning assault weapons. Two of these have passed the House. It is time for the Senate to act on them. And for the House to do more.
And we must do more. We must keep fighting for common-sense policies to keep our communities safe.
We must keep fighting so that people at another school, another place of worship, another grocery store, another concert, or another place of community do not go through the agony our fellow Texans are enduring at this moment. All of our hearts are with them now, and we must make sure our actions are too.
Together, we can do anything,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/sigblock.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220526message?refcode=lpfe220526message_m]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States

With people across our state and across our country, I am devastated by the loss of the 19 children and 2 teachers murdered with a weapon of war at Robb Elementary in Uvalde and heartbroken for their classmates, teachers, and families. And I am heartbroken for every American who, for themselves and their families, fears going to school, to the grocery store, to houses of worship — to the places of community and connection in our country. We must turn our heartbreak into action. The majority of Americans support common-sense gun safety legislation, but too many elected leaders are ignoring the will of voters. We must elect leaders — up and down the ballot, in Texas and across the country — who listen to and champion our priorities, including gun safety. Before I was elected to Congress, I worked with local and national gun-safety groups and community members to advocate for data-driven policies to reduce gun violence, and I took that fight with me to the House where I have co-sponsored legislation requiring universal background checks, closing gun purchase loopholes, and banning assault weapons. Two of these have passed the House. It is time for the Senate to act on them. And for the House to do more. And we must do more. We must keep fighting for common-sense policies to keep our communities safe. We must keep fighting so that people at another school, another place of worship, another grocery store, another concert, or another place of community do not go through the agony our fellow Texans are enduring at this moment. All of our hearts are with them now, and we must make sure our actions are too. Together, we can do anything, [] DONATE [] PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS Lizzie Fletcher for Congress 3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636 Houston, TX 77098 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Alicia Speedy
subject: I didn’t send my daughter to school yesterday.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/savechildren [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/savechildren]
I was born in Buffalo, New York. Last week there was a mass shooting at the local Tops. A store I’ve been in 100 times! Two days ago, 19 sweet, innocent, small children had their lives stolen in a Texas mass shooting.
Yesterday, I drove my daughter to school just to turn around and drive her all the way home.
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/savechildren [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/savechildren]
I know I’m not alone. I know every single parent struggled at carpool this morning. I know not every parent has the privilege to drive their child home or take them to work for the day. But I also know that our voices are all that we have.
“I decided it is better to scream. Silence is the real crime against humanity.”
― Nadezhda Mandelstam, Hope Against Hope
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/savechildren [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/savechildren]
I don’t believe I’m in the minority here. I believe there are thousands of us who feel the gut-wrenching feeling that I do today. We should be better!
If you have a story like mine, I need your help.
Sign on to stand up for children [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/savechildren]To every mother, father, grandparent, nanny, childcare provider, or human. If you’re heartbroken like I am, sign on and stand with me. [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/savechildren]
And, if you have a story, there’s a spot for that too...
SIGN ON [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/savechildren]Alicia Speedy
Mom of 3 & Campaign Finance Director
*️⃣ DIRECT AID FOR VICTIMS *️⃣
GoFundMe has established an online hub of verified fundraisers supporting victims and loved ones affected by the shooting. [https://www.gofundme.com/c/act/donate-to-texas-elementary-school-shooting-relief] Their link includes a fundraiser organized by VictimsFirst that provides victims' family members with no-strings-attached cash payments.
The City of Uvalde is seeking donations for medical expenses. [https://www.facebook.com/uvaldepd/posts/376362624524496]
The Uvalde community is seeking volunteer legal services. Reach out to volunteer at UvaldeResponse@sa-lsa.org. [UvaldeResponse@sa-lsa.org.?subject=Uvalde%20Legal%20Assistance%20]

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Our children are being murdered.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
The violence has to stop. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45768195/347397405/823540626?refcode=ea.7f693e48-18dd-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ms=ea.7f693e48-18dd-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjY5M2U0OC0xOGRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8vUroODLdYbnCxtN-KEUcTD_olb8T9fDQKw_gApS0xU=&emci=2d090fe3-fbdc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=7f693e48-18dd-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=1049176)
Peter, The community of Uvalde, Texas, just experienced the kind of tragedy that too many American communities have already suffered. Mass shootings in our grocery stores and our houses of worship. At concerts and movie theaters. And, horrifically, in our schools. Where teachers turn themselves into human shields. Where our children are murdered. Where our children _should_ be safe. We’ve seen this too many times. Over, and over, and over. **What on earth is more important than protecting our children? What on earth is more important than ending the slaughter?** I’m angry, and I know we all are. I’m angry every time this happens. It has to stop. As Governor, I feel a strong responsibility to do all I can to keep our children safe at school and to prevent these horrible mass shootings. That’s why I took executive action in 2019 to strengthen our background checks. We’ve mandated safety plans and helped schools coordinate with local law enforcement. I’ve vetoed dangerous bills that would have allowed guns in schools. But that’s not enough. We need stronger laws at every level. Republican leaders in Congress and in our state legislature need to stop the excuses and work with us to do more. **A strong law requiring universal background checks is now sitting in the U.S. Senate. Pass it and President Biden will sign it. And while they’re at it, they should ban assault weapons. Those guns must be kept out of the hands of private citizens.** Until they do, state legislators should close North Carolina’s permit loophole for these weapons. **Pass it and I’ll sign it.** I’ve proposed a red flag law that lets judges take guns away from violent criminals and people who are severely mentally ill. **Pass it and I’ll sign it.** I’ve had gun advocates tell me that the problem is not assault weapons, but mental health. Well, there’s a bill right now in the legislature that will provide billions of dollars for mental health through Medicaid expansion. **Pass it and I’ll sign it.** **We need Republicans in North Carolina and across the country to come to the table and pass these bills. Or we need to choose new leaders.** We cannot forget this tragedy when it fades from the news. We cannot normalize the mass murder of children. We cannot wait any longer. _It has to stop._ Thoughts and prayers are not enough. Governor Roy Cooper
* * *
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45768196/347397406/2039383177?refcode=ea.7f693e48-18dd-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ms=ea.7f693e48-18dd-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjY5M2U0OC0xOGRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8vUroODLdYbnCxtN-KEUcTD_olb8T9fDQKw_gApS0xU=&emci=2d090fe3-fbdc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=7f693e48-18dd-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=1049176) Cooper for North Carolina

clean_body: The violence has to stop. | Peter, The community of Uvalde, Texas, just experienced the kind of tragedy that too many American communities have already suffered. Mass shootings in our grocery stores and our houses of worship. At concerts and movie theaters. And, horrifically, in our schools. Where teachers turn themselves into human shields. Where our children are murdered. Where our children should be safe. We’ve seen this too many times. Over, and over, and over. What on earth is more important than protecting our children? What on earth is more important than ending the slaughter? I’m angry, and I know we all are. I’m angry every time this happens. It has to stop. As Governor, I feel a strong responsibility to do all I can to keep our children safe at school and to prevent these horrible mass shootings. That’s why I took executive action in 2019 to strengthen our background checks. We’ve mandated safety plans and helped schools coordinate with local law enforcement. I’ve vetoed dangerous bills that would have allowed guns in schools. But that’s not enough. We need stronger laws at every level. Republican leaders in Congress and in our state legislature need to stop the excuses and work with us to do more. A strong law requiring universal background checks is now sitting in the U.S. Senate. Pass it and President Biden will sign it. And while they’re at it, they should ban assault weapons. Those guns must be kept out of the hands of private citizens. Until they do, state legislators should close North Carolina’s permit loophole for these weapons. Pass it and I’ll sign it. I’ve proposed a red flag law that lets judges take guns away from violent criminals and people who are severely mentally ill. Pass it and I’ll sign it. I’ve had gun advocates tell me that the problem is not assault weapons, but mental health. Well, there’s a bill right now in the legislature that will provide billions of dollars for mental health through Medicaid expansion. Pass it and I’ll sign it. We need Republicans in North Carolina and across the country to come to the table and pass these bills. Or we need to choose new leaders. We cannot forget this tragedy when it fades from the news. We cannot normalize the mass murder of children. We cannot wait any longer. It has to stop. Thoughts and prayers are not enough. Governor Roy Cooper mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States | Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. body:
It’s not great tbh.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45768254/347397779/1141538894?refcode=EM_FR_220525Numbers_EOM_TNDP_90DO_8_NG_TESTB_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTc1YjZlNS0xOGRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FWVt7BbNfOUl02FeheiattVJPNdPNC0gjHsECzFt33w=) Tennessee has been under Republican control for over a decade. Let’s take a look at where that’s gotten us, shall we? _Compared to other states, Tennessee is:_
• #1 in medical bankruptcies
• #44 in education funding
• #1 in rural hospital closures
• #45 in working conditions That’s not to mention the minimal worker protections we have, including zero laws mandating paid leave. Oh, and we have some of the highest infant and maternal mortality rates in the nation. You’re getting the point here, right? [**_We’re tired of seeing the people of TN suffer under a government that refuses to support us, no matter how far we fall. That’s why we’re building a coalition of Democratic candidates for office that want to bring real change to our state. clean_body: It’s not great tbh. = Tennessee has been under Republican control for over a decade. Let’s take a look at where that’s gotten us, shall we? Compared to other states, Tennessee is: • #1 in medical bankruptcies • #44 in education funding • #1 in rural hospital closures • #45 in working conditions That’s not to mention the minimal worker protections we have, including zero laws mandating paid leave. Oh, and we have some of the highest infant and maternal mortality rates in the nation. You’re getting the point here, right? = = The fact is, this isn’t even a funding issue, it’s a priorities issue. We are sitting on a multi-billion dollar "rainy-day" surplus that Governor Bill Lee refuses to spend – even to fight a pandemic. We can’t sit and wait for Republicans to take action. We have to change our political landscape. Gaining power against the Republican supermajority is far from easy. We have strong candidates who are ready to rally their community. We have the experience and knowledge they need to run a successful campaign. What we need now are the resources necessary to win. Peter, Afghanistan. Ukraine. Communist China. Global terrorism.

Right now, we need leaders who will hold Joe Biden accountable and stop global catastrophes before they happen.

**America’s Green Berets were willing to die for the flag, and in Congress, we’ll roll up our sleeves and get to work to keep the country we love safe.**

Right now, I’m the _only_ Green Beret in Congress. **But I know that Pat Harrigan will change that.**

Pat put his life on the line for our country as a Green Beret in Afghanistan, and he’s ready to bring the same ethos of valor, patriotism, and service to Congress.

clean_body: | | | Peter, Afghanistan. Ukraine. Communist China. Global terrorism. Right now, we need leaders who will hold Joe Biden accountable and stop global catastrophes before they happen. America’s Green Berets were willing to die for the flag, and in Congress, we’ll roll up our sleeves and get to work to keep the country we love safe. Right now, I’m the only Green Beret in Congress. But I know that Pat Harrigan will change that. Pat put his life on the line for our country as a Green Beret in Afghanistan, and he’s ready to bring the same ethos of valor, patriotism, and service to Congress. Pat Harrigan knows what it means to put service before self, Peter. We have too many self-interested career politicians in Washington who put fame and fortune above their duty to hardworking Americans like you. But Pat and I say enough is enough. It’s time for leaders who treat their roles as an honor and a privilege, not a star-studded career. America needs Green Berets, and Pat Harrigan is up for the challenge. In Service, Col. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeff?=
subject: We're In A Rhythm!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
Be Part Of A GREAT Team! | | | |
---
|
# **Newsletter-May 26 Vol. 2, #14**
---
| | |
##
26 May 22

**Only 7 Weeks Until The July 19 Primary.**

**Memorial Day**
We give a heartfelt Thank You to those who have made the ultimate sacrifice. Freedom is not free.
As Thomas Jefferson said, "The Tree of Liberty must be regularly nourished with the blood of patriots and tyrants."
This is a day to reflect and remember with grateful hearts.

**Inflation**
Remember, excess government spending is the cause of inflation. Excess government spending will not reduce inflation. We can't spend our way out of debt! Inflation is a tax on everyone and everything. I'm running, in part, to help reduce inflation.

The campaign is in a great rhythm. Door Hangers are distributed to targeted areas Tuesdays and Wednesdays, Meet & Greets on Thursdays and Team Door Hanger Distribution & Sign Waving on Saturdays. Texts and calls are made to voters throughout the week. Thousands and thousands of voters have been impacted. Thank You!

**Meet & Greet**
Another Meet & Greet will be held tonight, Thursday, May 26.
7-8p
Mission BBQ in Laurel
(14712 Baltimore Ave., Laurel, 20707)
Come and learn about our historic movement and meet Jeff.

**Sign Waving - One Power Hour**
THIS, Saturday, May 28, you're invited to sign wave for one power hour with the Jeff Warner For Congress campaign.
Noon-1p
The intersection of Route 193 (University Blvd) & Rt 650 (New Hampshire Ave.)
Consider parking at McDonald's
7911 New Hampshire Ave, Langley Park, 20783
Please park as far as possible from the building so we don't limit customer access.
Meet at the intersection of University Blvd & New Hampshire Ave.
You should see Jeff there.

If you have a sign, please bring it. If you have a sign and are not planning on sign waving or posting, please let us know so we can put it to use and stretch our limited funds. Be sure to bring your BIG smile.

**Phone Calling**
Phone Calling is a key strategy to impact voters and is very simple. Many of the voters have received a door hanger and met Jeff. The pre-recorded voicemail from Jeff is an important part of our strategy to reinforce our messaging that Jeff is "Standing With You And For You!"

You can make an impact no matter where you live in the nation. Please email the campaign at info@JeffWarnerForCongress.com if you’re in interested in getting trained. It's easy.

**Social Media**
The campaign is taking steps to build Jeff Warner's social media presence.
You can find Jeff under RepJeffWarner on Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/RepJeffWarner) & Twitter (@RepJeff Warner).
Be sure to like, share, subscribe, follow, etc. to help us grow his following.

Thank You for your support. The campaign continues to make and break records. Come and be a part of this amazing team. Imagine how good it will be to say you were part of this team in November as we celebrate our historic victory!

[**Donate Here**](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=b127c4e414&e=12a37459a2)

Remember, Jeff Warner is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "We The People" can make a real difference. Now is our time to act. THERE IS HOPE!

Standing with you,

Jeff
---
| [Jeff Warner For Congress Website](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=b3632b6d6d&e=12a37459a2 "Jeff Warner For Congress Website")
---

P.O. Box 634 Greenbelt, MD 20768

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=9071a5bc87) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=9071a5bc87).

---
Friend,
---
I wanted to provide you with an important update... **_I just testified before Congress for roughly NINE hours._**
---
_But the Left is furious that I _rightly_ invoked the attorney-client and executive privilege that I have with President Trump._
---
Of course, the Left doesn’t care about attorney-client privilege. Frankly, they don’t have much regard for the rule of law.
---
**Let’s not forget that it was Biden’s FBI that violated President Trump’s attorney-client privilege – and there’s no doubt they would do it again.**
---
_With the battle for my freedom and justice ongoing, I recorded a video for you to talk about the injustice I’m facing for successfully defending President Trump as his lawyer._
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – as the Deep State tries to ruin me financially, personally, and professionally through a mountain of legal bills and lawsuits.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlssqt5kmqg5s2o1j12s3ecrapfpjudmtho7thho_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clge6oj4c9h2bs)

This should NEVER be allowed to happen in America.

---
**They’d love nothing more than to take down the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from endless witch hunts – especially when other lawyers were too afraid to go forward.**

Here’s President Trump in his own words:

But I cannot win this battle all on my own.
---
The Deep State has an endless number of arrows they can pull from their quiver to try and take me down.

Thanks to your support, I’m still standing. But now I need your support more than ever before.

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6062%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=22Pm1N%2fBXHWgxBtD%2fk%2fwnw&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62610%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lieAgzKwoG1LW2ekoPZ%2fSw&sysid=1)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62611%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vfIzsb%2bE0lNIY9OvRKLmXw&sysid=1) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think--and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62612%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WDO12B9qsuFL%2bFDI%2bQzg7g&sysid=1)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

name: Ralph Rebandt For Governor
subject: Mike Lindell Endorsement
body:
Mike Lindell Endorses Ralph Rebandt

| [ ](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mike_lindell_email&n=1)
---
## Exciting Announcement!
###
**Mike Lindell, founder and CEO of MyPillow has endorsed Ralph Rebandt for Governor!** We are pleased to announce that Mike Lindell has endorsed Ralph to be our next governor of Michigan. Michigan needs a leader like Ralph who will emphasize integrity, honesty, and **TRUTH.****** Whitmer has been covering up her actions since the beginning of her administration, and it is time for a change. We must restore transparency to the office of governor as it is an office **for the people.******
### **Upcoming Events**
This weekend Ralph will be up in the UP for the Marquette Gubernatorial forum on Friday the 27th and in Traverse City for the gubernatorial debate on Saturday the 28th. We would love to have our supporters attend these events and bring energy in the crowd. Further details can be found at the following links: Marquette: [https://michigancoalition.org/27-may-2022-forum](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=Tp2ckCqFjQrsItcx2CmDaAj52s-vJ04-M39KY0MztnROvV2CwjJQnHS4ksmt5LJQ&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mike_lindell_email&n=2) Traverse City: [https://northernmidebate.com/?page_id=6&event_id=4&lang=en](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=cmcgkkarD7x9W-7LaAC6wz0h9cxGTYaorFFdP2rAB7VxafHhWqXcwZ5nAdYFbOyIaOsWUqUD6Lf1YG8s65kgOw&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mike_lindell_email&n=3)
## **SUPPORT THE CAMPAIGN**
Things are gearing up as we get closer to the primary on August 2nd. We need **YOUR** support in order to defeat Whitmer and **Make Michigan A Lighthouse To The Nation.** Sign up on our website to volunteer or donate to help the campaign.

DeSantis is soft on COVID and more concerned with restricting reproductive freedom and suppressing voting rights than he is with protecting Florida from the impending threat of climate change. **If he wins another term, things will only get worse — which is why we MUST elect Charlie this November!**

The good news is that _Insider Elections_ calls this race a **“battleground,”** and a recent poll from _USA Today_ shows support for DeSantis falls below 50% when he's up against Charlie. Victory is well within reach, but we need to keep building a winning grassroots movement to get the job done!

**That’s why we’re coming to you, team. Ron DeSantis has far-right billionaires from out of state bankrolling his campaign, and we’re counting on YOU to help us fight back. Can we count on your support right now to help Charlie flip Florida BLUE?**

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Friend, I’ll always tell it to you straight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/QlfSzzrHusbl3Yd-DaS5tpU2FyYgkp5Swf1aQJNS4zo=/uUaozbuq-gou_1JA6IDVB9xXhqcnbyqBtjshFlONik4=?amount=4&refcode=em_fr_2022.05.26_b1_gs_all) Hey friend,

**I 'll be blunt: I'm running in one of the toughest races in the whole country.** Today, the nonpartisan Cook Political Report changed their rating for AZ-04 from likely Democrat to only lean Democrat. I hope you'll let me explain why this is so important, but if you're already with me you can [**chip in $4 now ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/QlfSzzrHusbl3Yd-DaS5tpU2FyYgkp5Swf1aQJNS4zo=/uUaozbuq-gou_1JA6IDVB9xXhqcnbyqBtjshFlONik4=?amount=4&refcode=em_fr_2022.05.26_b1_gs_all)
| [CHIP IN $4](https://act.myngp.com/el/QlfSzzrHusbl3Yd-DaS5tpU2FyYgkp5Swf1aQJNS4zo=/uUaozbuq-gou_1JA6IDVB9xXhqcnbyqBtjshFlONik4=?amount=4&refcode=em_fr_2022.05.26_b1_gs_all)
---

I've never been focused on scoring political points or giving a nice speech: My singular focus in Congress is on making your life better. That's why I'm committed to leading bipartisan efforts in the House, like funding for infrastructure investment and relief for small businesses after the pandemic.

Unfortunately, MAGA Republicans don't care that I've been working across the aisle to deliver solutions for Arizonans. **They gerrymandered my seat to make it more competitive, but I know we can still win this race with your help.

[This race isn't going to be cheap, and with this Cook rating shift, it's clear that this will be my toughest election yet. Will you chip in $4 to help me keep AZ-04 blue?](https://act.myngp.com/el/QlfSzzrHusbl3Yd-DaS5tpU2FyYgkp5Swf1aQJNS4zo=/uUaozbuq-gou_1JA6IDVB9xXhqcnbyqBtjshFlONik4=?amount=4&refcode=em_fr_2022.05.26_b1_gs_all)**

[CHIP IN $4](https://act.myngp.com/el/QlfSzzrHusbl3Yd-DaS5tpU2FyYgkp5Swf1aQJNS4zo=/uUaozbuq-gou_1JA6IDVB9xXhqcnbyqBtjshFlONik4=?amount=4&refcode=em_fr_2022.05.26_b1_gs_all)
---

Thank you!

\-- Greg

` A tireless advocate for Arizona, Greg was elected to Congress in 2018. Since then, he has built a reputation for working across the aisle and getting things done in Congress. As the former Mayor of Phoenix, he knows the issues of his state and district inside and out. name: Elaine Luria
subject: Why this means so much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45769100/347402048/-2135409409?refcode=lur_template_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTcxYmVhYi0xZGRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=avLv4f10gR1QimzpJvRC7GO-j_SyFLHNxwAKf16dLSg=)

| | Folks, I’m going to take a moment to let you know what’s at stake this election cycle, and by the time you’re done reading I hope you’ll consider **[chipping in $25 or whatever you can to my battleground race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45769102/347402050/1679455200?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220526_FR_EOM2_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTcxYmVhYi0xZGRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=avLv4f10gR1QimzpJvRC7GO-j_SyFLHNxwAKf16dLSg=)** **Our Climate** Experts agree that we need to act now to avoid the most severe consequences of climate change, but an increasing number of Republicans in or running for office are climate-deniers who would rather line their own pockets with the money of special interest groups than vote for legislation that will protect our climate for future generations. **The Right to Vote** Your Democratic House Majority voted to pass legislation protecting and strengthening the right to vote numerous times over the last two years, only to have the legislation blocked by Senate Republicans. And in Republican-controlled states, legislators are chipping away at voting rights protections and making it more difficult to vote. We need federal legislation to strengthen this fundamental right. **National Security** Republicans are perpetuating harmful, divisive rhetoric and lies that are emboldening extremists to take violent action. At the same time, GOP lawmakers are trying to make it easier for radicalized individuals to get their hands on firearms. Our national security is at serious risk. In short, there’s a lot at stake, folks. body:

| | |
**Hey Peter,**
**IMPORTANT NOTICE:
Your 1776 Donor Club Membership MUST be renewed
**

_Kindly renew before midnight TONIGHT so there 's no lapse in your membership!_

---

**AS YOU KNOW, the America First Patriot movement is unstoppable.** From Florida to California, millions of freedom-loving Americans have shown their support for conservative values. But only the most dedicated were invited to join the 1776 Donor Club: **including you!**

Will you decide to step up to the plate one more time for America and renew your 1776 Donor Club Membership? **We are ONLY inviting our TOP Patriots to re-up their status as a member.**
**[Chip in $17.76 to help freedom loving patriots across the nation fight back against the Left's attacks.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60469579:JIleHzoNN:m:1:3317145305:D522C394720D07B654EA181FD5ECF81C:r "Chip in $17.76 to help freedom loving patriots across the nation fight back against the
Left’s attacks. ")**
245 years ago, our Founding Fathers declared independence and embarked on the greatest experiment in history: _**AMERICA**_. They laid the plans for a new nation built on the ideals of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. _**But now, those freedoms are under attack. And the Radical Left will not stop until they have dismantled this great nation from the inside out.**_

That's why we're asking top patriots, like yourself, to fight the good fight and keep America free from Pelosi's socialist agenda. We will not win this fight alone. We are depending on you to renew your membership...

1776 Donor Club

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60469580:JIleHzoNN:m:1:3317145305:D522C394720D07B654EA181FD5ECF81C:r "Can we count on you to step up?")**

name: Jessica Hanson
subject: Rebecca Dow Crossed The Line
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer
body:
We’ve all seen negative campaigns. We’ve seen politicians stretching the truth. But Rebecca Dow has crossed the line. Dow sent out a mailer that com| | |
---
| | Dear Peter,
We’ve all seen negative campaigns. We’ve seen politicians stretching the truth. **But Rebecca Dow has crossed the line.** Dow sent out a mailer that completely manufactures a quote by Mark Ronchetti on Trump’s impeachment. **It’s a total lie and it’s designed to trick Republicans into voting for her.** When members of the media have called her and her campaign the last few days trying to get her to substantiate the claim, she and her campaign have hidden. They won’t answer calls, or emails. **That’s because they know it’s a lie**. They’re just hoping you won’t learn the truth. Dow is also falsely claiming Mark isn’t pro-life. Mark is STRONGLY PRO-LIFE. That’s especially rich coming from Rebecca Dow who was one of only a handful of Republicans who voted for the Obamacare mandate requiring coverage of the morning-after abortion pill and said in a forum in 2020 when she was trying to appear moderate that “we have to uphold Roe vs Wade.” Dow will simply say anything to win an election. Once again, Rebecca Dow can not be trusted. Unfortunately, this is what desperate politicians do when they know they’re losing. **And for Rebecca Dow, this lack of ethics is a disturbing pattern**. It’s why she was sued. It’s why she is facing an ethics trial after the primary for abusing her power for her own personal gain. And it’s why she’s doing what she’s doing now. The Democrats would love for Dow to be the nominee because they know her ethics scandals will sink her immediately in the general election. To be blunt, they know a vote for Dow in the primary is a vote to re-elect MLG in the fall. But we’re winning this campaign because Mark is focused on fighting for New Mexicans with his conservative agenda. Mark will continue to make his case to voters about what he will do as governor. He’s laid out his plans to tackle border security, inflation, crime, taxes, education, and on and on. But we won’t stand idly by while a politician engages in outright lies. **Voters have the right to know the truth about the candidates running for governor. ** We’re humbled by the support our campaign has received and Mark will continue to take the fight to MLG and the Democrats. Because at the end of the day, winning the governor’s race and putting our conservative agenda to work for New Mexicans is what matters most. **[We hope you will consider making a generous contribution now to help in the last two weeks of the primary election.](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=d3f283288f384cfebde039703b4e76c4&_e=U0St3oQeeQ28n1xCYXzOQif2-PQ2aoAacfAVCCFtOe-UShbJXEwDyRIxwob4MesUeN7VBTzlw-6VV2CQpp2E_hjzTlYE5Wa94rVuc2PfghHLSfT1yoy_BXM7PLT-KT_UHQOI8l61WXOF7Pju6PWe0hyv8ReQ9_fxLMoNMSmzJerkOf7rmOylqZpSM4Y7pIRxkbXGLqISPnTjIaZTZsIJLnY3zsxjSnOs1kYFevcf_dw-Wrow4UmX8R7NZITOgyTw19QBejm0x0HD7QUag5c3PMX1xG4fbCnMOIvtI016UP-h3vTDo5LI5EEO2YyxqQPT8Vq89UfbB0S_D4993DpmOoJ3jSP5waqFxJCEOPwcThKW3GRnMDUBexPFilqEWUHC4xLI8Q3FGqjiXdk3P7VUGN-oOHSyJP7BeFwnmUizxJX9_Xkdgaf2hlNHWMPe4SBK-8VEUwSSof_JI-yvcIcdyttuekq1ELtm4xeh0Yh5ao9EVqTZ5sTTdNvQXepVYa__wrvvX0StGlbGq0ZRA2SUbQ%3D%3D)** Thank you for your continued support! Jessica Hanson, Campaign Manager

---

---

I’ve been a top target for the National GOP since I took office and Republicans started calling me the “accidental senator.” I won my last midterm re-election by just 1.7%. 1.7% is a small margin that shows just how important it is to reach every voter and make my case. But a recent poll shows me down by 1% to a GOP opponent, and right now, my GOP opponents are a January 6th insurrectionist who wants to strip Coloradans of their health care coverage and a self-funding opponent who wants to restrict reproductive rights. I’m not afraid of a challenge. I’ve fought back against personal attacks and Mitch McConnell’s partisan obstruction to ban surprise bills after medical emergencies, give parents a tax cut through the expanded Child Tax Credit, and create good-paying jobs while repairing roads and bridges here in Colorado. I’m the only Senator running for re-election that isn’t taking a penny from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists because I don’t work for them: I work for you. My campaign is facing a critical end-of-month deadline on Tuesday, so I have to ask: **Will you make a donation of $10 to my campaign before this Tuesday’s end-of-month deadline? clean_body: I won my last midterm re-election by just 1.7%. | = = Folks, I never expected this race to be easy. I’ve been a top target for the National GOP since I took office and Republicans started calling me the “accidental senator.” I won my last midterm re-election by just 1.7%. 1.7% is a small margin that shows just how important it is to reach every voter and make my case. But a recent poll shows me down by 1% to a GOP opponent, and right now, my GOP opponents are a January 6th insurrectionist who wants to strip Coloradans of their health care coverage and a self-funding opponent who wants to restrict reproductive rights. I’m not afraid of a challenge. I’ve fought back against personal attacks and Mitch McConnell’s partisan obstruction to ban surprise bills after medical emergencies, give parents a tax cut through the expanded Child Tax Credit, and create good-paying jobs while repairing roads and bridges here in Colorado. I’m the only Senator running for re-election that isn’t taking a penny from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists because I don’t work for them: I work for you. My campaign is facing a critical end-of-month deadline on Tuesday, so I have to ask: Will you make a donation of $10 to my campaign before this Tuesday’s end-of-month deadline? Your support powers my work, so I can’t thank you enough. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thanks to your feedback and support, I’ve worked to lower housing costs, expand mental health care access, and now I’m working to cap out-of-pocket insulin costs at $35 and restore the Child Tax Credit that cut child poverty by historic numbers. My team tells me we’re $17,566.56 short of our goal, but if everyone reading this message pitches in, we’ll close the gap and hit our goals. = Thank you, Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxU9aigPsiSZkgMz5-Qej-TzNK37N2348DnDFklrsO0FqY&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220526_harass&n=1) Hi, it’s Marcus Flowers, an Army Veteran and the Democratic nominee in GA-14 running against against Marjorie Taylor Greene in November. On the eve of the primary election in Georgia, my opponent and three of her cronies stormed into my campaign headquarters to try to harass and intimidate our staff. I wouldn’t have believed it if I didn’t see it with my own two eyes \-- [**take a look:**](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8ToRxxFpHNcfbF9l53-mtXQwjNeoYfWYwGk1gX3QwrtYTb8kb1IbxVWGI2r4sRp_WpA&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220526_harass&n=2) [****](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8ToRxxFpHNcfbF9l53-mtXQwjNeoYfWYwGk1gX3QwrtYTb8kb1IbxVWGI2r4sRp_WpA&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220526_harass&n=3)**If she was trying to intimidate us, I will tell you this: It didn’t work worth a damn.** **Our team is tough as nails, so she can do whatever she wants to us. But I’m sick and tired of her harassing the American people in Congress.** [**Look, I'm fired up to beat her in November -- but I can't do that without your help. So please, rush a donation of any amount right now and send a message to Marjorie Taylor Greene that we won’t be intimidated.**](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxU9aigPsiSZkgMz5-Qej-TzNK37N2348DnDFklrsO0FqY&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220526_harass&n=4) | [](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxU9aigPsiSZkgMz5-Qej-TzNK37N2348DnDFklrsO0FqY&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220526_harass&n=5 "DONATE NOW >>") [DONATE NOW >>](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxU9aigPsiSZkgMz5-Qej-TzNK37N2348DnDFklrsO0FqY&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220526_harass&n=5)

clean_body: | Hi, it’s Marcus Flowers, an Army Veteran and the Democratic nominee in GA-14 running against against Marjorie Taylor Greene in November. On the eve of the primary election in Georgia, my opponent and three of her cronies stormed into my campaign headquarters to try to harass and intimidate our staff. I wouldn’t have believed it if I didn’t see it with my own two eyes \-- she was trying to intimidate us, I will tell you this: It didn’t work worth a damn. Our team is tough as nails, so she can do whatever she wants to us. But I’m sick and tired of her harassing the American people in Congress. | "DONATE NOW >>" Let’s send a message that it’s time to end Marjorie Taylor Greene’s divisive brand of politics, Marcus Flowers Paid for by Marcus for Georgia PO Box 532 Rome, GA 30162 United States Marcus Flowers for Georgia · GA 30162, United States

| | | Peter, In the fight for America’s future, we need to put our best conservative warriors to the front lines.

**That’s why I’m proud to endorse Hung Cao for Congress in Virginia.**

Hung is a Navy combat veteran, a Naval Academy graduate, and a survivor of communism. He knows the price of freedom better than most, and he’ll never give up protecting it for our children.

Hung is in one of the most competitive races in America, and if he wins, we’ll FIRE Nancy Pelosi. It’s as simple as that — but he needs our help to win.

On Tuesday, a shooter walked into an elementary school in Uvalde, Texas, and murdered 19 school children and two teachers.
Headlines like this don't need to be the status quo. We **_DON 'T_** have to ACCEPT THIS.
Congress has the ability to pass laws requiring universal background checks and banning assault rifles -- common-sense laws that would prevent tragedies like this. AND THEY AREN'T DOING IT.
Republicans, Joe Manchin, and Kirsten Sinema are making up excuses while children _die_.
**[Enough is _enough_. Join us in demanding that Congress ends the filibuster so they can pass gun reforms by adding your name here >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/iT4nrkWz4XDsvqAW2HKTADFvzccwpsaXzJuABwv6NyE=/cuEVk5RH1xKvPiSKgKupvsceF2cXA8O1mjBKlI6ClaI=?source=2022GunReform_HT&referrer=group-her-time&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fhtfrontline%3Frefcode%3DX_GunFilibusterJA)**
In solidarity,
-- _Katie_
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/iT4nrkWz4XDsvqAW2HKTADFvzccwpsaXzJuABwv6NyE=/cuEVk5RH1xKvPiSKgKupvsceF2cXA8O1mjBKlI6ClaI=?source=2022GunReform_HT&referrer=group-her-time&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fhtfrontline%3Frefcode%3DX_GunFilibusterJA)

Friend, this is important: **Herschel Walker (R) is now officially the GOP nominee for Senate here in Georgia, meaning he and I will be facing off this November.**
With the entire GOP establishment behind Walker, keeping this seat and the Senate blue will come down to your grassroots support. **So I’m urgently asking:[Will you split $5 or more right now between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand’s so we can keep Georgia and the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45770873/347408959/1384586616?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3470-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjdlNjU5My0yMmRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7UIU-UXthb1MAs1dTj8eJ5jlzWj9VbubFFNxgMNeNrY=)**

That’s why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the GOP are coming after me as their top target for defeat. Even before the primary, they had already poured nearly $15 MILLION into Walker’s campaign to flip this seat – **and now, recent polls show me 1 point down.**
With the general election officially here, it’s never been more urgent to fight back against the GOP’s attacks and pull ahead in this must-win race. **That’s why we set a rapid-response goal to raise $100,000 by midnight tonight, but right now, we’re dangerously short.**

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We must stop McConnell’s agenda in its tracks.
#
We need to be clear about the urgency of this moment, Peter.
**Right now,_Roll Call_ is calling Patty Murray the sixth most vulnerable Democrat in the Senate.** And we already know that Democrats can’t afford to lose a single seat if we want to hold onto our majority.
**[A Republican Senate is our nightmare scenario – and this campaign _needs_ to be a stronghold to help stop it from happening. That’s why we set a $50,000 end-of-month fundraising goal to keep up our momentum. Pitch in $5 or whatever you can now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45770931/347409216/-379223437?refcode=pm_em_220526_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjlhMGRmMy0yMmRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K0uQ2wkNvmW9kUQunhdBrGZQjZbyDn2nINVbo29aOWk=)**

Team Patty

name: Cora Neumann
subject: What 1 week looks like on the trail [PHOTOS]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cora for Montana
body:
From forums to meet and greets, it’s been a busy month leading up to the Montana primary election. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45770935/347409251/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjQyYWYxOS0yM2RkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1gdZH8IWuaiYyF6AFBWHH_3cCttnUdNBeLw4iWwMT5g=) Friend, The countdown is officially on: **we’re less than 2 weeks from the June 7th primary election!** The past month has been a whirlwind -- every day has been jam packed with events, lunches with community leaders, forums, and meet and greets. I wanted to send through a few pictures to give you a taste of what just _one week_ looks like for us on the campaign trail. It’s busy and sometimes tiring, but I don’t take one second of it for granted. I hope you enjoy the updates, and can’t thank you enough for your support. Cora | **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45770936/347409252/-10092236?refcode=em-5.26.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjQyYWYxOS0yM2RkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1gdZH8IWuaiYyF6AFBWHH_3cCttnUdNBeLw4iWwMT5g=)**
---
* * *
**On Monday we had a great meet and greet in Kalispell where we talked about supporting our educators and what we can do to better our communities together.**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45770937/347409253/-10092236?refcode=em-5.26.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjQyYWYxOS0yM2RkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1gdZH8IWuaiYyF6AFBWHH_3cCttnUdNBeLw4iWwMT5g=)
**Tuesday, I met with nonprofit leaders and health workers in the Flathead Valley and learned just how much work they’re doing to keep our communities safe and healthy. I know firsthand how hard this work can be, and I’m ready to continue supporting their efforts in Congress. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45770938/347409254/-10092236?refcode=em-5.26.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjQyYWYxOS0yM2RkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1gdZH8IWuaiYyF6AFBWHH_3cCttnUdNBeLw4iWwMT5g=) **Wednesday, I was in Missoula for the Missoula Dems Forum! I’m so grateful to all of the organizers for hosting such a great event. I enjoyed the conversation and getting to share more about myself and our campaign with everyone.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45770939/347409255/-10092236?refcode=em-5.26.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjQyYWYxOS0yM2RkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1gdZH8IWuaiYyF6AFBWHH_3cCttnUdNBeLw4iWwMT5g=)
**Thursday, I participated in my 6th forum – this one with Western Native Voice. I’ve spent my career working with rural and tribal communities, and I could not be more grateful for all the work WNV is doing for our state. I’ll keep working hard to deliver for them in Congress.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45770940/347409256/-10092236?refcode=em-5.26.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjQyYWYxOS0yM2RkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1gdZH8IWuaiYyF6AFBWHH_3cCttnUdNBeLw4iWwMT5g=)
**And Friday, we celebrated ballots going out all across Montana! I can’t help but feel so grateful for all of the support and momentum we are seeing across the district. Make sure to return your ballot before June 7th!**

clean_body: From forums to meet and greets, it’s been a busy month leading up to the Montana primary election. | = Friend, The countdown is officially on: we’re less than 2 weeks from the June 7th primary election! The past month has been a whirlwind -- every day has been jam packed with events, lunches with community leaders, forums, and meet and greets. I wanted to send through a few pictures to give you a taste of what just one week looks like for us on the campaign trail. It’s busy and sometimes tiring, but I don’t take one second of it for granted. I hope you enjoy the updates, and can’t thank you enough for your support. Cora | = On Monday we had a great meet and greet in Kalispell where we talked about supporting our educators and what we can do to better our communities together. = Tuesday, I met with nonprofit leaders and health workers in the Flathead Valley and learned just how much work they’re doing to keep our communities safe and healthy. I know firsthand how hard this work can be, and I’m ready to continue supporting their efforts in Congress. = Wednesday, I was in Missoula for the Missoula Dems Forum! I’m so grateful to all of the organizers for hosting such a great event. I enjoyed the conversation and getting to share more about myself and our campaign with everyone. = Thursday, I participated in my 6th forum – this one with Western Native Voice. I’ve spent my career working with rural and tribal communities, and I could not be more grateful for all the work WNV is doing for our state. I’ll keep working hard to deliver for them in Congress. = And Friday, we celebrated ballots going out all across Montana! I can’t help but feel so grateful for all of the support and momentum we are seeing across the district. Make sure to return your ballot before June 7th! = = As always, I so appreciate your continued generosity and support. Cora =** Paid for by Cora for Montana Cora Neumann is a public health and economic development expert running for Congress in Montana's new 1st Congressional District. To learn more about Cora, visit her website Consider supporting Cora's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Cora for Montana PO Box 428 Bozeman, MT 59771 United States

Gary Sinise with WWll Veteran Parade Attendees
---
The heroes of the Greatest Generation deserve the gift of attending the largest Memorial Day commemoration in the country -- the American Veteran Center's National Memorial Day Parade. **But many of these veterans can 't afford the expense of traveling across the country to Washington, D.C. for just one day.** That's why the American Veterans Center is flying out more World War II veterans and their chosen guests for the National Memorial Day Parade -- but I need the help of patriotic Americans like you to make it possible. [**Please, Fellow American****\-- chip in your urgently needed gift of**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z1vguudr5svaqhkmepol8tr99o74nrhbdisi8ctg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clge9p71c5h2bs)**[**$25, $50, $75, or $100**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zc9ii6ljkf0ik71l476fp3leq4vbdgiuhuf8nk90_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clge9p71c5h2bs) right now. I must receive your donation as soon as possible to fly out these veterans for the National Memorial Day Parade.**
---
[**Send a WWII veteran to the Parade**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zovhu3vknqdnuk5nabj3m66qdn4r6pjsjflp4c68_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clge9p71c5h2bs)

| | Time is of the essence for these heroes. We are hours away from determining if we will have the resources available to cover the airfare and travel expenses for these World War II veterans to attend the National Memorial Day Parade. **Will you sponsor a veteran by making a small sacrifice to honor the U.S. military men and women who have sacrificed so much to protect our country? ** **[Please make your most generous gift of](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ztl1us2fn1r42ucmhqrkd6v9pn37ed69tfn0dp5g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clge9p71c5h2bs)[$25, $50, $75, or $100](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ztl0217vghe3h47t9uocte7330jvq1jvi1cqd4io_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clge9p71c5h2bs)[right now.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zpuevn3b17nn7vkn9cq9p8h8gri58f2sb3ki0mc0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clge9p71c5h2bs) Every dollar makes a difference for our brave heroes.** Your personal support will mean the world to them and to our country. Please, if you can, **[make a contribution to this important project right now.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zidg9iqslqtc34sl57p5a3rt8e0ebr31gec7h3go_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clge9p71c5h2bs)** Jim Roberts President American Veterans Center

name: Giffords
subject: We are writing to ask you to contribute $3 to help us take on the NRA before their convention starts tomorrow.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Tomorrow afternoon, the 2022 NRA convention kicks off just a few hours’ drive from Uvalde, Texas.
#

Friends -
Tomorrow afternoon, the 2022 NRA convention kicks off just a few hours’ drive from Uvalde, Texas.
Donald Trump will speak. Texas Governor Greg Abbott and Senator Ted Cruz are featured guests.
Daniel Defense — the manufacturer of the assault weapon found in Robb Elementary School — is an exhibitor and sponsors a pair of featured events at the conference, including one with a former NRA-TV personality.
And if history is any guide, Wayne LaPierre and others will peddle the fiction that the only way to stop gun violence in America is by selling more guns.
This is what we’re up against — a gun lobby and the politicians they pay for that are so committed to the profits of gun manufacturers that the impact on our communities is simply the cost of doing business.
And what’s clear is that even in the wake of some of the deadliest mass shootings ever, they are going to keep pushing to sell more guns and block calls for action.
When we started this work 10 years ago, most politicians, even Democrats, were afraid to take on the NRA.
But slowly, surely, we have been making it clear that standing up to the NRA and the gun lobby is the path to victory in political campaigns. It is also the way we save lives by passing bills in legislatures around the country.
So please. As the NRA begins its convention, help us fight back. Especially today:
[**Please make a contribution to Giffords PAC — $3 or whatever you can afford — as a way of saying you have had ENOUGH of the gun lobby’s influence on our politicians and the legislation they vote on.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may22?refcode=em220526-1-15&t=1&refcode2=2058_3935704_41PgS5&akid=2058%2E3935704%2E41PgS5)

name: Max Steiner
subject: re: Uvalde, TX
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45771131/347410244/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmVhYTNmMi0yNGRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kR8DgaxpePghNBE0kwmnyI2lBjrPnf_3k4YO-a23p4g=)
Friend,

This week, an 18-year-old gunman killed 19 elementary students, 2 teachers, and his grandmother before dying in a firefight with police. This is a tragedy.

I'm tired of "prayers for the victims" and "moments of silence" from public figures. The questions are - how do we stop this from happening again and who do we elect to get us there?

There are two big lessons from Uvalde. **1.) We need stronger background checks and psychological checklists to owning semiautomatic weapons.** This 18-year-old loner with few friends had no business owning two AR-15's. There's no indication that he had a criminal record, but it seems that everyone in his life knew that something was "off". The fact that he was able to buy guns legally mean that the system failed.

**2.) We need an easier way to report, identify, and disarm gun owners who are seem dangerous.** Apparently Ramos posted threatening messages on Instagram and sent disconcerting texts to an internet acquaintance. Neither of these were reported to the police. Mentally ill individuals often allude to their future crimes in public comments. We need to build a Law Enforcement infrastructure that can act on this. California has Gun Violence Restraining Orders (GVROs), which allow police to seize weapons for up to 21 days after getting a court order. This should be a national policy. We will also need to inculcate a "see something, say something" culture to encourage people to report potential criminals before they kill. I want to protect schoolchildren, grocery shoppers, and church-goers. I also want to protect our constitutional rights. We can best balance those two through background checks and enforcement systems to keep guns out of the hands of the mentally-ill, not by banning weapons. You may disagree - that's fine, but I want to make my position clear.

I have no idea what LaMalfa thinks about this topic. His cowardly silence is deafening. CD-1 needs a better leader. America needs better gun laws.

Thank you,

Max
---

Team, Today, we’re just 54 days away from Maryland’s extremely competitive primary election on July 19, and **less than a week away from our next end-of-month fundraising deadline.** **[Before I ask if you can pitch in towards our May fundraising goal, I hope you’ll let me explain why your support is so critical right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45771247/347410959/-1651203132?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220526eom1_wm_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzViZjJiMy0yNWRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YUuCdoGVCQlYHJ5xHP7g_6PmErNjdqy5jrhB2B5hI20=)** We’ve made amazing strides in the past year. As a first-time candidate, I knew I had my work cut out for me. But by building a diverse, truly people-powered movement of supporters from communities all over the state, we have defied the odds and become a top contender in this race for Maryland’s next governor. I’ve defied the odds all my life: I was raised by a single mother with help from my grandparents after my father died from a treatable illness when I was just three years old. After getting into some trouble, my mom sent me to military school and onto a new path in life: I went on to serve as a U.S. Army combat veteran in Afghanistan and become a Rhodes Scholar. From there, I became a small business owner and went on to serve as an executive at one of the nation’s largest poverty fighting organizations. **My mission in life has always been to lift people up, and leave nobody behind.** Together, that’s what Aruna and I will do as your Governor and Lieutenant Governor in Annapolis, getting to work on day one to address issues like economic opportunity, quality public education for our children, public safety, action on climate change, and so much more. We have just 54 days left to show the voters of Maryland that in this extremely competitive and expensive primary, we are the best candidates for the job. **[So, here’s where I have to ask: Can you pitch in a grassroots donation of $10 or more right now to help us reach our May fundraising goal and fuel our campaign to July 19?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45771248/347410960/-1651203132?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220526eom1_wm_90da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzViZjJiMy0yNWRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YUuCdoGVCQlYHJ5xHP7g_6PmErNjdqy5jrhB2B5hI20=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: My primary opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45771835/347413468/-528360723?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220526_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGNiMGI1MC0yNmRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpvX9ymZmzqBYZ-Tjow8MRDuL4_rSIL99V32ZF1Lb5I=)

Team,
I first ran for office because I didn’t see enough leaders prioritizing the issues that impacted my community the most — the crushing costs of health care and housing, the corporate assault on workers and their families, the worsening climate crisis, and the systemic racism that compounds these and other challenges.
I know these experiences because I’ve lived them. I grew up poor, Black, and gay in Section 8 housing and on food stamps, raised by a young, single mom. I never imagined that one day someone like me could run for public office, let alone hold public office.
That’s why during my first term in Congress, I have fought hard to not only bring bold solutions to these problems into the mainstream conversation, but to make them a reality through legislation and movement-building.
You may have heard by now about my decision to run in NY-10, an open seat in a newly created district covering lower Manhattan and parts of Brooklyn.
I love this district. I have not only worked in it, but it is the district that taught me how to live an authentic life as my full self. When I was closeted, I found refuge in the gay bars of the West Village, finally in a place that felt accepting to me. And I will never forget attending my first Pride.
In NY-10, I found myself.
NY-10 is the birthplace of the LGBTQ+ rights movement. Since long before the Stonewall Uprising, queer people of color have sought refuge within its borders. Yet, this community has never sent an LGBTQ+ person to represent it in Congress. When I’m elected, I’ll be the first.
**To do so, we have to win our tough primary on August 23 and prepare for the fight ahead.**
You may have heard that former New York City Mayor Bill de Blasio announced he wants to take a crack at yet another run for office by competing in NY-10.
I’ll always be honest with you, team. Bill de Blasio will pose a serious challenge to my race for re-election this year. We know he’ll have the backing of the 1% and corporations — we need to ensure we can match that with a wave of grassroots support from the people.
De Blasio will, undoubtedly, have the resources to launch bad-faith attack ads against me and our progressive movement, and our campaign needs to run on all cylinders to fight back and spread our bold, inspiring message.
This grassroots movement has consistently spoken truth to power and supported our words with bold action — in Congress and throughout our community — and we can’t let up now.
[**If you’re all in for making our bold ideas a reality, will you chip in today so we can win this primary and help build on the progressive grassroots momentum we’re seeing across New York?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45771836/347413469/-528360723?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220526_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGNiMGI1MC0yNmRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpvX9ymZmzqBYZ-Tjow8MRDuL4_rSIL99V32ZF1Lb5I=)
