clean_body: = Team, I first ran for office because I didn’t see enough leaders prioritizing the issues that impacted my community the most — the crushing costs of health care and housing, the corporate assault on workers and their families, the worsening climate crisis, and the systemic racism that compounds these and other challenges. I know these experiences because I’ve lived them. I grew up poor, Black, and gay in Section 8 housing and on food stamps, raised by a young, single mom. I never imagined that one day someone like me could run for public office, let alone hold public office. That’s why during my first term in Congress, I have fought hard to not only bring bold solutions to these problems into the mainstream conversation, but to make them a reality through legislation and movement-building. You may have heard by now about my decision to run in NY-10, an open seat in a newly created district covering lower Manhattan and parts of Brooklyn. I love this district. I have not only worked in it, but it is the district that taught me how to live an authentic life as my full self. When I was closeted, I found refuge in the gay bars of the West Village, finally in a place that felt accepting to me. And I will never forget attending my first Pride. In NY-10, I found myself. NY-10 is the birthplace of the LGBTQ+ rights movement. Since long before the Stonewall Uprising, queer people of color have sought refuge within its borders. Yet, this community has never sent an LGBTQ+ person to represent it in Congress. When I’m elected, I’ll be the first. To do so, we have to win our tough primary on August 23 and prepare for the fight ahead. You may have heard that former New York City Mayor Bill de Blasio announced he wants to take a crack at yet another run for office by competing in NY-10. I’ll always be honest with you, team. Bill de Blasio will pose a serious challenge to my race for re-election this year. We know he’ll have the backing of the 1% and corporations — we need to ensure we can match that with a wave of grassroots support from the people. De Blasio will, undoubtedly, have the resources to launch bad-faith attack ads against me and our progressive movement, and our campaign needs to run on all cylinders to fight back and spread our bold, inspiring message. This grassroots movement has consistently spoken truth to power and supported our words with bold action — in Congress and throughout our community — and we can’t let up now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = | = Thank you, friend. Your support makes all the difference. — Mondaire Jones = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 122 C Street NW Suite 360 Washington, DC 20001 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvnanqo1k9rkuv74ubcm1bgenl62ul7pp3u1l7l0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clie8or6c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4ddlmjimeodjeupj3dbhm9pjbd3j68o68s9l6aqncd72mph38t3j6lgb8tlhe1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8pmccdkmkoefcjjcoqm1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6jdgd3mu4qnrlhqrgfue1ahg6pto1jj8vtvhh5o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clie8or6c5h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zigsheorisomc0fj4qvt72tgfak3rsmdb0eer3ng_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clie8or6c5h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z13c8u5k6fq9grgf2u2h2lk3kbkd93tjmgu7u96g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clie8or6c5h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Ban Assault Weapons (via Left Action)
subject: Sign the petition: BAN ASSAULT WEAPONS NOW! >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign the petition: BAN ASSAULT WEAPONS NOW! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T052f43be-ab64-4f09-bc45-3ba3d566c5d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcbf7c29b-8799-4d0a-bc80-c7be00ab80b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | This week, 19 children and 2 teachers were murdered at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde, Texas in a massacre that was carried out with an AR-15 semiautomatic assault weapon. As we mourn this incalculable loss, we must demand action from our leaders. Mass shooting after mass shooting, we’ve seen no meaningful action from Congress to put an end to gun violence. The NRA has many of our representatives in a chokehold. Our children deserve better – we must make this country a safer place for them to grow up in. The AR-15 is designed to kill many people quickly – and that’s exactly what we’ve witnessed in Uvalde, Parkland, Las Vegas, San Bernardino, Sandy Hook, and so many more. These assault weapons are tearing our country apart and don’t belong on our streets – there is no reason for any civilian to have a weapon of war in their possession. We’re fed up with Congress’ inaction. We need an assault weapons ban immediately. No more “thoughts and prayers.” Too many lives have been lost to senseless gun violence. [Sign your name now: Demand Congress ban assault weapons >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbc7677da-d820-42b6-888f-cc07dc14ab78/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Getting Results in Court!
body:
Judicial Watch just announced a major victory for cleaner elections! We settled our federal lawsuit against North Carolina after the state removed over 430,000 ineligible names from its voter rolls!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

On May 16th, a California court found California's gender quota law for corporate boards _unconstitutional_ in _Robin Crest et al. v. Alex Padilla_ , a lawsuit that **Judicial Watch** filed in 2019 on behalf of three California taxpayers.
The verdict in this case comes after a 28-day trial, and it follows a similar ruling in **Judicial Watch 's** favor last month finding California's diversity mandate for corporate boards unconstitutional.
Thanks to the generous commitment of our members across the country, we are winning major victories for the core American value of equal protection under the law!
And today, [I urge you to join with us](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58990&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=) so that we can _keep __winning_ on behalf of the rule of law and for the American people.
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58990&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
---

Our most recent victory came out of our challenge to a 2018 law, known as Senate Bill 826, which requires every publicly held corporation headquartered in California to have at least one director "_who self-identifies her gender as a woman_ " on its board of directors by December 31, 2019. The law also requires corporations to have up to three such persons on their boards by December 31, 2021, depending on the size of the board.

Judicial Watch argued that the quota for women on corporate boards violates the Equal Protection Clause of the California Constitution...and California Superior Court Judge Maureen Duffy-Lewis agreed with us!

The Court found that "_putting more women on boards demonstrated that the Legislature 's actual purpose was gender-balancing, not remedying discrimination_."

And, "_There is no Compelling Governmental interest in remedying discrimination in the board selection process because neither the Legislature nor Defendant could identify any specific, purposeful, intentional and unlawful discrimination to be remedied. "_

This is the second California court decision finding that quotas for corporate boards are unconstitutional. The radical Left's _unprecedented attacks_ on anti-discrimination laws have suffered _another_ stinging courtroom defeat at the hands of **Judicial Watch** attorneys!

**Judicial Watch 's** legal team is helping protect the civil rights of every American with these successful lawsuits.

But every one of our lawsuits come with real price tags attached.

[That's why I am sohopeful you will make a tax-deductible contribution and join the Judicial Watch team today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58990&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=) Your donation will help us take on new challenges to the rule of law whenever and wherever they arise, and help keep us on track with all our current lawsuits and investigations

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58990&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
---

I urge you to join with us today!

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58990&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: How concerned are you about rising gas prices in America?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsq6a9gdvsivnmdc498km96k0j6rtbqli3rij6f0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqb0tlhehj39ddi6jgjbc9nc4q31opnm8q7fdblmsor6sj0c5gjecplclpmccjn6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6dj33d5l63jr4tb662ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clj6ap74cdim8oh5u)
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs6al4n08a8bkhbr13llfhvkk58qodd9vi8cnrho_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clie8or5chh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za805vejftofa69d20nb9he9p8hpsuvbvtcvfjng_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clie8or5chh2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z242i2hca01banlpvgtae2f16nbpg07hamgjcn3o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clie8or5chh2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

---

Our plan to RESCUE AMERICA isn’t just going to tackle our problems, it’s going to bring conservative solutions that keep America strong, thriving, and safe.

body:
Today is Garrett's Birthday! | | |
---
| Team --

Today is Garrett's birthday!

Thousands of supporters have already signed our virtual card - [click here to add your name](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=5db7efee5d&e=fe4b890356) and wish Garrett a happy birthday!
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=9a4459ca50&e=fe4b890356)
---
| [Add Your Name to Birthday Card](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=088e08affd&e=fe4b890356 "Add Your Name to Birthday Card")
---
| If you can believe it, Garrett is spending this morning in Jury Duty, but he will be back on the campaign trail this evening to speak at the Tuscola County GOP meeting!

See our full schedule and RSVP to upcoming events at [GarrettforMichigan.com/events.](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=cdd0b29d8a&e=fe4b890356)

Thank you for your support!

**_Team Soldano_**

---
|
\---- Forwarded Message ----
From: Jennifer Soldano
Date: Wed, May 25th at 1:38 PM
Subject: Tomorrow is Garrett's Birthday...
To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
---
|
---
| | Peter,

**Tomorrow is Garrett's birthday.**

You know Garrett - he is spending his birthday on the campaign trail, and has a jam-packed day of interviews and events. This campaign has been a full time job, and Garrett is as motivated as ever to win this race and bring meaningful results to Michiganders.

For Garrett's birthday, I asked our campaign team to come up with a virtual card that our movement members could sign.

[Click below](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=aabe7c429d&e=fe4b890356) to add your name to our card and join me in wishing Garrett a Happy Birthday!
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=fe3928e6e3&e=fe4b890356)
---
| [Add Your Name to Garrett's Birthday Card](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=41d40a3b56&e=fe4b890356 "Add Your Name to Garrett's Birthday Card")
---
| _Defeating Gretchen Whitmer and restoring freedom to our state is the best present Michigan could receive this year._

Now more than ever, 'We the People's campaign' for Governor is primed for victory. But Garrett needs our help to raise the financial resources it will take to win big in the Republican primary and take on Whitmer this fall.

If you are able, [please consider chipping in $10, $20 or whatever you can](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=71df92407e&e=fe4b890356) to help build up our movement and to celebrate Garrett's birthday.
---
| [Chip in $10](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=1b5a7d99e8&e=fe4b890356 "Chip in $10")
---
| [Chip in $20](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=043e1ce75d&e=fe4b890356 "Chip in $20")
---
| [Donate Any Amount](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=fe83ea67a9&e=fe4b890356 "Donate Any Amount")
---
| Garrett truly appreciates each and every Michigander who has taken a stand alongside us to fight for a better future for our state.

This journey into politics was an unexpected one, and Garrett and I are so grateful for the support, prayers and encouragement that have kept this campaign moving forward.

_Thank you for being a part of this, Peter._
---
|
Best,

[](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=f332a8b042&e=fe4b890356)

Jennifer Soldano
---
|

1151 WEST MILHAM AVENUE, UNIT 2546, PORTAGE, MI 49081

**AS YOU KNOW, the America First Patriot movement is unstoppable.** From Florida to California, millions of freedom-loving Americans have shown their support for conservative values. But only the most dedicated were invited to join the 1776 Donor Club: **including you!**

Will you decide to step up to the plate one more time for America and renew your 1776 Donor Club Membership? **We are ONLY inviting our TOP Patriots to re-up their status as a member.**

help freedom loving patriots across the nation fight back against the Left’s attacks. ")**
245 years ago, our Founding Fathers declared independence and embarked on the greatest experiment in history: _**AMERICA**_. They laid the plans for a new nation built on the ideals of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. _**But now, those freedoms are under attack. And the Radical Left will not stop until they have dismantled this great nation from the inside out.**_

That's why we're asking top patriots, like yourself, to fight the good fight and keep America free from Pelosi's socialist agenda. We will not win this fight alone. We are depending on you to renew your membership...

name: Sheriff Joe Lombardo
subject: Important Update: Voting is about to start…
body:
First off, I want to say thank you for everything you’ve done to support our campaign.
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u4sXfOK54aUUSA-Hcu_AGuob2dVdaFT5qc9DzAOaRD1zUbrxbmtLFfnTCLSpEJMR3r8I1Tc6sjCRLREYn3sooG897b8h9S_tWh6B0CdO0X0KsdqeoWbI1_FaXQSZ2FAES2WFd29127v4egQyGb16mfjTUMb0_JVXLeTxXq8ZUpjpHgZz5ph8-HLWxy9M6WPJ_z6cHJnHtpVzpXLE8YspRlwdAcpSbRq4oasv-tNptYi9JwY9f6R91AeR2A9o-vQj&c=3Q4iIm1OdsR5xM-qpWLCu4QHq1ywT5xx40MxwxhMFvd5fQlQ--MDDw==&ch=iDXEj_xPJcRvitlTxSNpHF_TR_0JqIDlwwegUW38AUOEujxwkBV8kQ==)
---
| Hey there Peter,
First off, I want to say thank you for everything you've done to support our campaign. We couldn't have gotten here without our generous donors, volunteers, and supporters!
---
| | | [Keep It Up!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u4sXfOK54aUUSA-Hcu_AGuob2dVdaFT5qc9DzAOaRD1zUbrxbmtLFfnTCLSpEJMR3r8I1Tc6sjCRLREYn3sooG897b8h9S_tWh6B0CdO0X0KsdqeoWbI1_FaXQSZ2FAES2WFd29127v4egQyGb16mfjTUMb0_JVXLeTxXq8ZUpjpHgZz5ph8-HLWxy9M6WPJ_z6cHJnHtpVzpXLE8YspRlwdAcpSbRq4oasv-tNptYi9JwY9f6R91AeR2A9o-vQj&c=3Q4iIm1OdsR5xM-qpWLCu4QHq1ywT5xx40MxwxhMFvd5fQlQ--MDDw==&ch=iDXEj_xPJcRvitlTxSNpHF_TR_0JqIDlwwegUW38AUOEujxwkBV8kQ==)
---
| My mission in this run for Governor is the same thing it was during my time in the Army, the National Guard, and over a 30+ year career in law enforcement...
Keep the communities I love SAFE - that means apprehending and deporting violent criminals, standing up for what's right, and using every tool at my disposal to restore Law and Order.
As Governor, it also means fixing our economy, our education system, and our elections as well - all of which are broken right now under single-party Democrat rule.
And I'm reaching out today with an IMPORTANT UPDATE from that mission:
Nevadans are about to be casting their ballots... Starting in just 2 DAYS!
If you're wanting to make sure we overcome a big push from Socialist Democrats in Washington, D.C. - who tried to take us out at the last minute with a BIG ad buy, hoping they would bail out Sisolak from having to face us - then [SUPPORT OUR CAMPAIGN](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u4sXfOK54aUUSA-Hcu_AGuob2dVdaFT5qc9DzAOaRD1zUbrxbmtLFfnTCLSpEJMR3r8I1Tc6sjCRLREYn3sooG897b8h9S_tWh6B0CdO0X0KsdqeoWbI1_FaXQSZ2FAES2WFd29127v4egQyGb16mfjTUMb0_JVXLeTxXq8ZUpjpHgZz5ph8-HLWxy9M6WPJ_z6cHJnHtpVzpXLE8YspRlwdAcpSbRq4oasv-tNptYi9JwY9f6R91AeR2A9o-vQj&c=3Q4iIm1OdsR5xM-qpWLCu4QHq1ywT5xx40MxwxhMFvd5fQlQ--MDDw==&ch=iDXEj_xPJcRvitlTxSNpHF_TR_0JqIDlwwegUW38AUOEujxwkBV8kQ==) before Nevadans go vote!
There's still time for them to hear our message before early voting begins - and YOU can be the reason why we secure the resources to get the word out!
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45772402/347416464/429136084?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YThkY2Q4ZC0yOWRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BleJFYfdAAlFLL70fH5Y1Qt1F9KAv7_G_hKfXf8rqUY=&emci=75ac8c86-9edb-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=7a8dcd8d-29dd-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
As an unapologetically pro-Mom candidate, the baby formula shortage worries me. And while Republicans market themselves as the party of "family values," their vote to deny $28 million in aid to the Food and Drug Administration to address the shortage of baby formula says other wise.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45772403/347416465/558373307?refcode=X_052622_BabyFormulaShortageVote&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YThkY2Q4ZC0yOWRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BleJFYfdAAlFLL70fH5Y1Qt1F9KAv7_G_hKfXf8rqUY=)
---
It's the same tactic we've seen over and over again — say one thing, do the other. Republicans complain about the baby formula shortage. Then they vote against funding for baby formula. Because the truth is: **they don’t want solutions,_they want problems to campaign on._**
I am determined to win this seat and protect this district from being-rubber stamped by the GOP's harmful agenda. I know we can bring real solutions to the issues Arizonan families are facing — but in order to do that we must first win this race.
[**With less than a week from another critical fundraising deadline, I'm asking you to step up and chip in, even if it's just a couple of dollars.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45772404/347416466/558373307?refcode=X_052622_BabyFormulaShortageVote&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YThkY2Q4ZC0yOWRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BleJFYfdAAlFLL70fH5Y1Qt1F9KAv7_G_hKfXf8rqUY=)

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Let’s secure our elections
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
In 2020, Michigan held the most secure and transparent election in state history. But as we know too well, the aftermath of that election has bred an organized and, at times, violent movement against our elections and the public servants who administer them. For faithfully executing my duties as secretary of state, Donald Trump allegedly called for my arrest and execution. And I’m not the only target. Local election officials - including Republicans, Democrats and Independents all across Michigan - are facing threats and harassment just for doing their jobs with integrity. These threats cannot be tolerated or dismissed.

I’ve made $8 million available for Michigan clerks to bolster election security, but this past week I asked the state legislature to pass four more key policies that will help cement trust in our elections and protect our crucial election workers. Check them out below, friend. We’ve already done historic work in protecting our elections, but there is still more work to be done.

We need to get our election results on election night. Due to the large influx of absentee ballots, we had to wait until the next day to get our election results. Let’s fix that by getting the state legislature to pass a bill that will allow election officials to process absentee ballots ahead of Election Day.

Let’s make sure our election administrators have the resources they need from the top down. Every local clerk in Michigan should have the resources they need to deliver safe and secure elections. That’s why I’m asking the state legislature to dedicate $100 million annually to ensure that our elections (and our democracy) continues to have the tools it needs to thrive.

This one’s a no-brainer: we need to protect the voting rights of our soldiers overseas. Many other states allow for service members and their spouses to return their ballots electronically. Michigan needs to join them. In 2020, we lost up to 25 percent of our military ballots due to unpredictable international mail. In 2022, I want to make sure we never disenfranchise the members of our military who are serving our country and defending our freedoms overseas.

We also have to ensure the safety of our election officials. As I said earlier, the widespread harassment against our election workers must end. The people who work on the front lines of our elections are the gatekeepers of our democracy, and they should be treated as such. That’s why the state legislature needs to increase penalties for those who threaten and harass our election officials.

That's it, friend. My plan is simple and based on common sense. Every election requires a thorough evaluation of our policies and rules to ensure that our election system is able to adapt to the problems of the moment. This plan will help make sure that everyone - Republicans, Democrats and Independents - can have trust that their vote is counted and counted accurately in a free and fair election.
I’ve dedicated my career to understanding and protecting Michigan election administration, and I want to make sure I’m able to continue serving you as Michigan Secretary of State. Please consider supporting my re-election campaign today so I can continue working to make sure our elections are safe, accessible and secure. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=0522622]
secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=0522622 [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=0522622]
-Jocelyn

name: Jeff Ettinger
subject: Onward!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS
body:
On Tuesday, we won our primary. ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45772434/347416728/-1607675525?refcode=headerlogo&amount=30&ms=ea.e6373d1f-2add-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjM3M2QxZi0yYWRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iZXfRmBgcz9svOM76OAYnTktSONZgTJwjroDFWATd8I=) | We’ve WON our special election primary! Now, onward to the next election in August!

[_Donate to support our campaign through August and beyond >>>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45772435/347416729/-1607675525?amount=25&refcode=ea.e6373d1f-2add-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ms=ea.e6373d1f-2add-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjM3M2QxZi0yYWRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iZXfRmBgcz9svOM76OAYnTktSONZgTJwjroDFWATd8I=)
---
Folks,

**I’m so proud to announce that we have officially won the DFL primary for the special election!**

Our victory in the primary was truly a team effort. With your support, we’ve built a grassroots movement of support from Democrats in every county of MN-1.

I know that my friends, family, and neighbors here in the district are just sick and tired of the same old same old from Washington. We know that it’s time to end the gridlock in Congress, cut through the partisanship, and make sure the people here in MN-1 really have a voice back in D.C. **That’s why, above all, I pledge to be a representative who _listens_ to every one of my constituents, not only those who vote for me.**

Minnesota’s first district has been my home for my entire adult life. It’s where my wife and I raised our kids, where I worked for almost 30 years at Hormel, and where I’ve focused my philanthropic efforts since retiring. Now, I’m proud to be the first district’s DFL-endorsed candidate.

**This is my community, and I’m ready to serve it in Congress.**

We’re one step closer after our primary victory.

But we can’t sit back and relax. Now, we take on a greater challenge.

Our next election is on August 9th, so for the next two and a half months, Republicans are going to go all out in a bid to keep this seat red. **We can only defeat them with you on our side.**

clean_body: On Tuesday, we won our primary. ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS | = | We’ve WON our special election primary! Now, onward to the next election in August! = Folks, I’m so proud to announce that we have officially won the DFL primary for the special election! Our victory in the primary was truly a team effort. With your support, we’ve built a grassroots movement of support from Democrats in every county of MN-1. I know that my friends, family, and neighbors here in the district are just sick and tired of the same old same old from Washington. We know that it’s time to end the gridlock in Congress, cut through the partisanship, and make sure the people here in MN-1 really have a voice back in D.C. That’s why, above all, I pledge to be a representative who listens to every one of my constituents, not only those who vote for me. Minnesota’s first district has been my home for my entire adult life. It’s where my wife and I raised our kids, where I worked for almost 30 years at Hormel, and where I’ve focused my philanthropic efforts since retiring. Now, I’m proud to be the first district’s DFL-endorsed candidate. This is my community, and I’m ready to serve it in Congress. We’re one step closer after our primary victory. But we can’t sit back and relax. Now, we take on a greater challenge. Our next election is on August 9th, so for the next two and a half months, Republicans are going to go all out in a bid to keep this seat red. We can only defeat them with you on our side. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = Thank you so much for all your support thus far. Hi team — I have awesome news to share with you!

These are always my favorite emails because it is such an honor to see how our movement is growing and the new voters connecting with Ann's message.
**I am excited to share that NARAL Pro-Choice America has endorsed Ann!**
This endorsement is such an honor, and at a time when we are doubling down on our efforts to fight for the right to choose, it feels like an important moment that NARAL recognizes Ann as an advocate for reproductive freedom.

**Ann always has and always will support the right to choose.** When she is elected to Congress in November, she will continue to fight for people to have the right to decide what happens to their bodies.

**[The Republicans in our state would be more than happy to take away our reproductive freedom. We need a leader in Congress who will represent and defend our rights. "NARAL Pro-Choice America is proud to endorse Ann Roe for election to the U.S. House of Representatives to represent Wisconsin’s First Congressional District. **NARAL Pro-Choice America President Mini Timmaraju**

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: I'm heartbroken for Uvalde – and determined
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
These senseless acts of gun violence are preventable, but only if the Senate finally takes action – and we must.
| | |
---
Friend,

On Tuesday, a gunman murdered 19 children and two teachers at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde, Texas – now the second-deadliest school shooting in our country's history.
As a mom, I'm devastated for these young children who are gone, for the families whose loved ones were taken from them, and for the students whose lives will never be the same. I'm heartbroken for this entire community that has been shattered by gun violence this week.
As a U.S. Senator, I'm more determined than ever to push for action on commonsense legislation that will put a stop to these tragedies. America simply cannot continue to be the only country in the world where this is allowed to happen.
Our schools. Our grocery stores. Our concerts and movie theaters. Where does it end? How many more lives must be taken? Enough is enough.
These senseless mass shootings and acts of gun violence are preventable, but only if the Senate finally takes action – and we _must_.

For those in Uvalde, in Buffalo, in Las Vegas, and the countless other communities torn apart by gun violence, I promise that I will keep fighting in the Senate to find a path forward and build a safer future for our children and families.
– Sen. Jacky Rosen
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45772784/347417946/1493062117?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjkyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTA0YjVmZi0yYWRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3po51y-1uTTsdCt36fPx6AsluuvL3_uvFyugNylD4Hc=)
Huge news out of Orange County:

**For the first time since new district lines were formed, elections analysts at the _Cook Political Report_ have UPGRADED Democrats’ outlook in California’s 40th District to "Leans Republican." We are now just one rating away from a "Toss-Up."**

If you're familiar with OC politics, then you understand how big this is.

Our Republican opponent Rep. Young Kim is considered the incumbent in this race, but CA-40 is a brand-new district. _New polling suggests local voters once represented by Rep. Katie Porter are not willing to give this district up to a Trump-Republican so easily._

**As you read this email, Young Kim and a Kevin McCarthy-aligned super PAC are teaming up to spend well north of $1 million in deceptive attacks trying to buy a win here.** Meanwhile, our campaign is working around the clock to generate resources to flip this seat and send Dr. Mahmood to Congress.

We need some help:

**[The GOP has never been more vulnerable. We’ll be blunt, friend.

2022 is not expected to be a year that is favorable to Democrats. If we want to keep the House blue, it won't be enough to defend Democratic seats -- **_we need to be aggressive in districts where the GOP is vulnerable._

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjv052pclgvl6qjcuvtmdhrgbd28f8adkdrf76mg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbor5db36mq33dblepqb1cb0cgob4t3jccorbcdhmho7dc3k66rbep3mc1ge2tdnmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6dj33d5l6orr4cr66lgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clj6ap76c5j62oh5u)
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbj9jrn7bspdsm817vfoiv2mblr4t1if0i2ul9q8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cliecob6c5h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1n3ggpl40ehpfavf7vhm8s179vgfcsbgjcq8kng_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cliecob6c5h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm6m84nqprn36ep3mm6boq7to6qvqv52an2hjr8o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cliecob6c5h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The school shooting in Texas is now the third deadliest school shooting in modern U.S. history
#
Derek,
Our nation’s schools should be the safest places in our communities, full of learning, fun and happy memories.
They should not be places of horror and nightmares.
This week’s school shooting in Texas is now the third deadliest school shooting in modern U.S. history, behind only Virginia Tech and Sandy Hook.
Speaking is still physically difficult for me, but my feelings are crystal clear: I am furious.
I am furious with those who have the power to act and save lives but are afraid to do anything to end this uniquely American epidemic.
I know there are members of Congress who are afraid of what will happen if they cross the gun lobby and vote for any piece of gun safety legislation.
But I also know that fear is nothing like the fear those children in Texas felt as their lives and the lives of their classmates ended in a hail of bullets.
Or the fear the parents must have felt when they were alerted that there was an active shooter situation happening at their kids school.
Senator Chris Murphy said it best to his colleagues in the Senate, “What are we doing?”
Congress knows how to solve this problem.
Congress knows the steps we can take to protect our kids in their classrooms.
They know because this is the only country in the developed world where this kind of slaughter happens on a routine basis.
They just need the courage to act.
And if they do not act, then we must elect a Congress that will.
John Fetterman has been a leader in the fight to make our communities safer from gun violence, and I am proud to stand with him in this fight. But we cannot do this alone. We need your help to get it done.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220526-1?amount=5&refcode=em20220526-5996&refcode2=5996_434096_RZOske&akid=5996%2E434096%2ERZOske)
**[Please split a $5 contribution between my work at Giffords PAC to change our gun laws and John Fetterman’s campaign for U.S. Senate, where he will continue to lead on the fight to make our communities safer from gun violence.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220526-1?amount=5&refcode=em20220526-5996&refcode2=5996_434096_RZOske&akid=5996%2E434096%2ERZOske)**
**[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220526-1?amount=5&refcode=em20220526-5996&refcode2=5996_434096_RZOske&akid=5996%2E434096%2ERZOske)**
I will not rest until we have righted the wrong our elected officials in Congress have done, and until we have changed our laws so we can finally look our parents in the face and say: we are doing everything we can to keep your children safe.
Thank you for standing with me and John in this struggle.
With courage,
Gabby Giffords

* * *

Giffords PAC works to reduce gun violence and save lives by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. Split a contribution between Giffords PAC and John Fetterman today.
[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220526-1?amount=5&refcode=em20220526-5996&refcode2=5996_434096_RZOske&akid=5996%2E434096%2ERZOske)
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220526-5996-footer&t=1&refcode2=5996_434096_RZOske&akid=5996%2E434096%2ERZOske)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=5996%2E434096%2ERZOske)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=5996%2E434096%2ERZOske)

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Let’s make this country the land of hopes and dreams for all of us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Before things get too busy, I wanted to take a moment to share why I’m in this fight, and how I know come November, our people-powered campaign will defeat right-wing extremism in western Pennsylvania.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45773194/347420000/-2143054902?refcode=em_fr_2022.05.26_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDc2MGE3OC0yZGRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=__3P7_3geUrcmiwD-krzQWWUQrP738KRcjXIXCkYtOQ=) Hi Derek,

With the primary election behind us, our campaign is quickly gearing up for the general election and the many challenges ahead. Before things get too busy, I wanted to take a moment to share why I’m in this fight, and how I know come November, our [**people-powered campaign**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45773195/347420001/-2143054902?refcode=em_fr_2022.05.26_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDc2MGE3OC0yZGRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=__3P7_3geUrcmiwD-krzQWWUQrP738KRcjXIXCkYtOQ=) will defeat right-wing extremism in western Pennsylvania.

I got involved in this race because I believe in fighting for our common good, but what does that mean? **To me, common good means putting people first.**

It means having a government that builds the best infrastructure in the world, and having our union brothers and sisters building it. It means protecting the right to an abortion before we have right-wing legislatures banning it and putting people in prison. It means never again sending young Americans off to unnecessary wars. It means taking on the unchecked corporate power that’s killed our communities, hurt workers, and crushed small businesses. It means protecting the union way of life so that every worker in our region can form a union freely, with no more union-busting.

**My opponent, Jeremy Shaffer, has no answers for the problems we’re facing.** Shaffer and the radical right are happy to leave working folks behind, because they care more about power than they care about all of us here in Western Pennsylvania.

He wants to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and favors a nationwide ban even in cases of rape and incest. He opposes the _Equality Act_ and wants our LGBTQ friends and neighbors to have to live in the shadows. He wants to kill the union way of life, and he would ship your job overseas in a heartbeat if it meant a penny more in profit. And when his QAnon and insurrectionist supporters come again to attack the Capitol, our democracy, and the integrity of our elections – along with the Constitution my buddies and I swore an oath to defend – do you know what Jeremy Shaffer will do? **Absolutely nothing.**

**Western Pennsylvanians deserve better than Jeremy Shaffer. I’m ready to rise to this occasion and fight for our common good.**

This passion comes from a simple place for me: I love this country – I was willing to die for it. **And I believe that an America that works for everyone is something worth fighting for.**

Let’s make this country the land of hopes and dreams for all of us, and let’s get to work.
Thank you for your time,

Chris Deluzio

PS. With so much momentum coming from our primary election win, **we are on pace to raise $10,000 in grassroots donations this month.[If you’re able to chip in even just $5 before May ends, it could help us cross that finish line.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45773196/347420002/-2143054902?refcode=em_fr_2022.05.26_b1_cd_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDc2MGE3OC0yZGRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=__3P7_3geUrcmiwD-krzQWWUQrP738KRcjXIXCkYtOQ=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45773197/347420003/-2143054902?refcode=em_fr_2022.05.26_b1_cd_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDc2MGE3OC0yZGRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=__3P7_3geUrcmiwD-krzQWWUQrP738KRcjXIXCkYtOQ=)

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We’re officially up against Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate, Herschel Walker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Herschel Walker (R) is now officially the GOP nominee for Senate here in Georgia, meaning he and I will be facing off this November.
| | |
---
Friend, this is important: **Herschel Walker (R) is now officially the GOP nominee for Senate here in Georgia, meaning he and I will be facing off this November.**
With the entire GOP establishment behind Walker, keeping this seat and the Senate blue will come down to _your_ grassroots support. **So I’m urgently asking:[Will you split $3 or more right now between my campaign and Senator Hassan's so we can keep Georgia and the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45773184/347419907/-323915468?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1083-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Nzk3Y2UwNy0yZGRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C7p-gIhPm2K8VxBKaA68vcqDTmkVv3k-uKPob0EoBvY=)**
Here’s why your support today couldn’t be more important: _CNN_ is calling me the most vulnerable Democratic senator on the ballot – in the race that experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ say could decide Senate control.
That’s why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the GOP are coming after me as their top target for defeat. Even before the primary, they had already poured nearly $15 MILLION into Walker’s campaign to flip this seat – **and now, recent polls show me 1 point down**.

That means everyone will be able to see whether or not this team hit our fundraising goals and has what it takes to win big and fight for real, transformative change. Our May fundraising deadline is our most important one yet: it’s the last deadline before the Massachusetts Democratic Convention, so we need this team to come together to show the strength of this campaign right away. = Sonia’s taken on big fights for working people before — and won. She knows exactly what it will take as Governor to deliver on education, housing, health care, and racial justice because she’s spent over a decade taking on these fights in the State Senate. # Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
Donald J. Trump May 26th, 2022 President Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America, will be joined by endorsed candidate for Wyoming’s At-Large Congressional District, Harriet Hageman, members of the United States House of Representatives, and other special guests on Saturday, May 28, 2022, in Casper, WY. This Save America rally is a continuation of President Trump’s unprecedented effort to advance the MAGA agenda by energizing voters and highlighting America First candidates and causes. _**Saturday, May 28, 2022, at 4:00 PM MDT** _ President Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America, Delivers Remarks _**Venue:** _ Ford Wyoming Center 1 Events Drive Casper, WY 82601 _**Congressional Guest Speakers:** _ Rep. Andy Biggs, _U.S. Representative for Arizona’s 5th Congressional District_ Rep. Matt Gaetz, _U.S. Representative for Florida’s 1st Congressional District_ Rep. Lauren Boebert, _U.S. Representative for Colorado’s 3rd Congressional District_ Rep. Kat Cammack, _U.S. Representative for Florida’s 3rd Congressional District_ _**Special Guest Speakers:** _ Harriet Hageman, _Candidate for U.S. Representative for Wyoming’s At-Large District_ Chairman Frank Eathorne, _Chairman of the Wyoming Republican Party_ Sen. Cheri Steinmetz, _State Senator for Wyoming’s 3rd Senate District_ Rep. Chip Neiman, _State Representative for Wyoming’s 1st House District_ Rep. John Bear, _State Representative for Wyoming’s 31st House District_ Hon. Marti Halverson, _Former State Representative for Wyoming’s 22nd House District_ _**Special Video Address:** _ Leader Kevin McCarthy, _House Minority Leader, and U.S. Representative for California’s 23rd District_ Rep. Elise Stefanik, _Chair of the House Republican Conference and U.S. Representative for New York’s 21st Congressional District_ Rep. Jim Jordan, _U.S. Representative for Ohio’s 4th Congressional District_ _**Timeline of Events:** _ 6:00AM – Parking and Line Opens 11:00AM – Doors Open and Entertainment Begins 1:00PM – Pre-program Speakers Deliver Remarks 4:00PM – 45th President of the United States Donald J. This Save America rally is a continuation of President Trump’s unprecedented effort to advance the MAGA agenda by energizing voters and highlighting America First candidates and causes.

Trump, 45th President of the United States of America, will be joined by endorsed candidate for Wyoming’s At-Large Congressional District, Harriet Hageman, members of the United States House of Representatives, and other special guests on Saturday, May 28, 2022, in Casper, WY. This Save America rally is a continuation of President Trump’s unprecedented effort to advance the MAGA agenda by energizing voters and highlighting America First candidates and causes. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America, Delivers Remarks Venue: Ford Wyoming Center 1 Events Drive Casper, WY 82601 Congressional Guest Speakers: Rep. Peter, we won’t have a better opportunity to take back the house and fire Nancy Pelosi. **But that doesn’t mean this will be a walk in the park. ** Pelosi and her dark money PACs will spend whatever it takes to keep me out of Congress and their socialist agenda alive. **_[I’m calling on patriots from across the country to chip in $5 to help flip these 5 must-win seats this November - Peter, can I count on you to help make history? ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a49f48d9828247a3ab4248898ecd9af0&_e=RRLjWPwWYURk1yMdYMh2L1csNHnzU7wDQBzskidgOH6cRgAOPepKuWci3gf6_KHfioH3Mwx6GSPk19Ylfe71oTHbcR-VKSH7jINvJZvbPjwLlb6pH5yhbFO-ZdnldDKHtEIohVsapJNHx3CQwKRZ1fexV3D5T0-Pa1Bq5zzX6korKlZztREMcOhIrES7K94tdYvk_hCkAhVF0bcJQHjm4kszD9NL5Vj_0AlbsgSQbX82NTfa4uON2YisTuSOO3veY4Fx_UZ-LSH0yGnpf82VesScdac0pPUdficbYzPrSrFUaZ1jWPQbPQmzXGM3uOtq_bJ2glpkLt32ashgzsokFS0whWUt9MTkulOGDOL2ot0l2DJzWlXzSYjiYrSncsr0Dm-jAtfIBPapjOtlzfSQCK0S2W0eTscR1PlKwiSWC6rTajcBU9J6w3XLU5Stxa6C)_** **_[CHIP IN $5 >>> FLIP 5](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a49f48d9828247a3ab4248898ecd9af0&_e=RRLjWPwWYURk1yMdYMh2L1csNHnzU7wDQBzskidgOH6cRgAOPepKuWci3gf6_KHfioH3Mwx6GSPk19Ylfe71oTHbcR-VKSH7jINvJZvbPjwLlb6pH5yhbFO-ZdnldDKHtEIohVsapJNHx3CQwKRZ1fexV3D5T0-Pa1Bq5zzX6korKlZztREMcOhIrES7K94tdYvk_hCkAhVF0bcJQHjm4kszD9NL5Vj_0AlbsgSQbX-_c-HSd66ngsAoXnMdyrggj7gvGF4SivJxvjk3RDhgjrY1hsXPQwsFfGaizkMRHi0jZPLmJaaGDVqBBfQFWTVttMk-OU6qm2OoTPetBeZaRDRmWKCENr6VEsIJNR4-aTbn3fUKJ9Ez24vKS5aQJlt40MlZ0b36hsmM8w3eEw3hIrAKsOGNAbXXFU2l6IaykCN5JZuyDlpYbbIL0mGONB1_)_** _Peter, here’s why I know I can lead when we take back the House this November:_

| After 8 years of service as a U.S. Army Apache pilot, I returned home to my community to run the company that my dad started - an automotive supply-chain company. I worked hard, created good-paying American jobs, met the love of my life — my wife Liz — and started a family. But I couldn’t remain on the sidelines. Even though my military career was over, I felt like I had more to give. I wanted to continue to serve the country and my community in any way that I could.

name: Ann Coulter
subject: Here’s how to stop the left from warpingkids’ minds
body:
This is your opportunity to get conservatives on to school boards -- and Critical Race Theory out of classrooms.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqqvidio6ocvq9nfg9luvn7hcl9damoua1q4ur9o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uhp39o5nmdhjdcpge5p7co5le3i31cr6mqqe2cjgc1i7dddlcgqeao5gcdir9c77q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmapm8c3nclj39p5jc9jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5cpim9pb2chgm49fg)
This is your opportunity to get conservatives on to school boards -- and Critical Race Theory out of classrooms.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvqjg9epgofol5gkvpjiit47dfpn2068q6djc848_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieaoj4c5h2bs) Fellow Conservative, Liberals can’t keep their story straight about Critical Race Theory. They insist, “Critical Race Theory isn’t being taught in schools!” Critical Race Theory most certainly _is_ being taught in the schools. Parents all over the country have noticed _and they’re not happy about it_. But the instruction in anti-whiteness is part of a much larger plan to **“fundamentally transform”** our country. (Remember Barack Obama?). These steely-eye zealots have taken over our schools, our universities, our media, our corporations -- even our sports leagues for Pete’s sake! Why might that be? **_Because they want your kids._** This is your opportunity to get conservatives **_on_** to school boards -- and Critical Race Theory **_out_** of classrooms. [ **I want to stop Critical Race Theory** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znfbicjfdbk2j227kqeh18iugk6rtees32lgtpeg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieaoj4c5h2bs) It’s called the **School Board Campaign Training**. It’s run by the best conservative training group in America called the **Leadership Institute**. With this new training, the Leadership Institute brings savvy, experienced campaign experts and teachers to teach conservatives how to overcome the odds and win those school board races. **What a great way to help thousands of “Davids” beat the odds -- and the left!** Morton and his staff started this newest training online. Because in these COVID-crazy times, it’s still not easy to bring together big crowds in restrictive, liberal-run states. By having most of these trainings online, the Leadership Institute can reach much, much larger audiences (maybe you shouldn’t have shut down the country, liberals!). Experienced LI trainers can now get to any potential conservative school board candidate **_anywhere, anytime_**. The LI team put together eleven hours of nuts-and-bolts videos detailing everything conservatives need to need to know to beat back the left and save kids from brainwashing **in hating America**. **Conservatives who take the course learn how to:**
* Plan a winning campaign.
* Design and run a successful Get-Out-the-Vote operation.
* Craft a compelling message.
* Handle scrutiny from their opponent and the media.
* And much more.

To get a conservative parent through the online training costs $50 -- and to send someone through the in-person version costs $100. The folks at LI don’t play around. They aim to train as many conservatives as possible. But for this month, their goal is to raise $20,000 -- to train 200 more conservatives online and 100 in-person. [**Will you donate $50 today to train someone online? Or give $100 to send a conservative through the in-person training?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zahjpim7vfbe498slqb8dgcb9bp5sbe817gdbe00_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieaoj4c5h2bs) [ **Yes, I'll help train one more conservative school board candidate** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z73qc6thgo0mabp6ch9pe6d8v86fmlv06gkebjg0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieaoj4c5h2bs) With many school board positions up for election this year, now’s the time to act. **Your gift by the end of this month** will train one more conservative how to run for their local school board -- and win. **HERE'S WHAT ONE conservative who took the training, Natalie from Colorado, had to say:** “After learning about Critical Race Theory last summer and seeing what is being taught in our schools, I’ve come to understand the damage caused for students and our country.

**I can no longer sit on the sidelines and wait for someone else to solve the problem.** It’s time to overhaul the public school system, and we must start locally.” **In its first few months, LI’s School Board Campaign Training has enrolled 1,700 conservatives.** [**Your gift of $50, $100, or more will help the Leadership Institute stop leftists from warping kids’ minds and ruining our country.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbki2tg5nq2ffj16vmmf0q6pnggqr5r6fghiq6h8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieaoj4c5h2bs) Please don’t wait to [**make your tax-deductible contribution**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2vnag7hlhh0sj4mq3hp3qo48ove81rg6dakr840_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieaoj4c5h2bs) to the Leadership Institute today. Thank you! Let’s Save America, Ann Coulter
Author and Columnist P.S. Let’s get Critical Race Theory insanity _out of our classrooms_ and _into the dustbin of history_ **Please help these efforts with your generous gift today. You’ll drive the left nuts -- while you save America.** So what are you waiting for? [**Please give right away!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2kvsu2saop07gtu5l3pqr8k4hnr1ig64jsggaq8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieaoj4c5h2bs) Thank you. [**>> $50 to train one person online**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvojh1duq83qjr27i3s23rfkreaqmqma861grlo8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieaoj4c5h2bs)
[**>> $100 to train someone in-person**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbi97h42itfp398e02t57604tjugmbvucg3d0vtg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieaoj4c5h2bs)
[**>> $200 train 2 people in person**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpjq1rqte6ja0hgp558ogl9v6tsmmai5jkagl548_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieaoj4c5h2bs)
[**>> $300 train 3 people in person**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf1151cvpnetqdufsjol99i5muta9a4mi92sjs9o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieaoj4c5h2bs)
[**>> $3,000 sponsor one entire in-person training**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl0n8i416i1i0e6ih2nab8pgr6uu720lojmmruu0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieaoj4c5h2bs)
---

---

body:
| | **Breaking News:** **Our opponent has launched his first negative attack ad against us!**

This is a big move from our self-funded opponent and we need an equally strong response.

**[Chip in today to support Team Kildee ahead of our May budget deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45773798/347424753/-1556941083?amount=15&contactdata=UbjgNf5N7wj%2B7fBe%2B%2FcNGDDurCfaZGpcH9nCm%2BfOdctd%2Bu4zH8PTCJ5tQ96LJ54ZfCC%2BKUDo3fIicLCw079sUuAIDIvtIUujz49g6E3IHVADfY9KtKJMIVjXfKF8dzi%2BIQww8Iv6vK7YKeYaeR3p2A%3D%3D&refcode2=af96553b-2fdd-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&refcode=DK_EM_FR_3MO_220526_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjk2NTUzYi0yZmRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-MGdMBWbyjZgFg6cF_bDu6wXVSSTGuTIux-ZXjgM5dg=)**
---

Hi there,

It’s hard to believe, but the midterm elections are less than six months away — and right now, I’m asking for your help to make sure we hold onto this seat in November.

This November, all of our work is in jeopardy. It’s no secret that our campaign is facing a tough reelection fight. Redistricting made our district one of the most competitive in the country. **Now, National Republicans are pouring money into our district to try to flip this seat.**

We’re up against a coordinated effort — and a whole lot of dark money behind it. **[Will you click here to support my team as we gear up to fight back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45773799/347424754/-1556941083?amount=15&contactdata=UbjgNf5N7wj%2B7fBe%2B%2FcNGDDurCfaZGpcH9nCm%2BfOdctd%2Bu4zH8PTCJ5tQ96LJ54ZfCC%2BKUDo3fIicLCw079sUuAIDIvtIUujz49g6E3IHVADfY9KtKJMIVjXfKF8dzi%2BIQww8Iv6vK7YKeYaeR3p2A%3D%3D&refcode2=af96553b-2fdd-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&refcode=DK_EM_FR_3MO_220526_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjk2NTUzYi0yZmRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-MGdMBWbyjZgFg6cF_bDu6wXVSSTGuTIux-ZXjgM5dg=)**

One of my opponents — who doesn’t even live in our district — wrote himself a $1 million check to try to buy this seat. At the same time, a MAGA-Republican Super PAC just announced they’re putting three-quarters of a million dollars towards attack ads against me. And my opponent is already up on TV running ads mischaracterizing my record.

**[We are in for a tough fight. But Michigan voters know the difference between our real people-powered effort and an attempt by out-of-state interests trying to buy this election. **Hageman officially files for U.S. House race in Wyoming **
---
---
_Harriet Hageman files the official paperwork to run for Congress in Wyoming _
Constitutional attorney Harriet Hageman today filed the official paperwork with the Wyoming Secretary of State to become a candidate in the 2022 Republican primary for the U.S. House of Representatives. Hageman, who filed the papers in person in Cheyenne this morning, announced her intention to challenge incumbent Rep. Liz Cheney in September 2021 and since has travelled over 23,000 miles inside Wyoming meeting with voters and holding public townhalls. The Republican primary is August 16, 2022.
“Having grown up on my family’s ranch near Fort Laramie, I have Wyoming in my DNA,” Hageman said. “I’ve been fighting for the constitutional rights of the people of Wyoming in my professional career and it’s a battle I’ll continue to fight in Congress. We only get one member of the House in Wyoming, and we have to get it right. The people deserve a congresswoman who represents the ideals and values of our great state.”
Endorsed by former President Donald Trump, Hageman will be an America First, conservative member of Congress who will never stop fighting for Wyoming. As an attorney, she has fought to protect Wyoming against runaway government and to preserve property rights. She successfully defeated the Clinton administration in a battle over access to forest lands involving the illegal Roadless Rule. And she has taken on the Environmental Protection Agency, the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service, and the U.S. Department of Agriculture to oppose mandates and usurpation of the rights of farmers and ranchers.
As a member of Congress, Hageman will fight against federal government overreach and protect property rights, water rights, and 2nd Amendment rights, among other priorities. Hageman will fight to keep taxes low, support Wyoming’s energy and natural resource industries, and oppose needless and endless foreign wars.
Hageman said she’s running for Congress because Cheney has turned her back on Wyoming.
“Our only member of Congress has completely lost the ability to represent us effectively,” Hageman said. “She continues to wage her own personal war against President Trump and his supporters as Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked member of the January 6th commission. The Republicans in Congress want nothing to do with her, and the Democrats see her as a temporary but useful tool. She is squandering our lone congressional seat and we need someone in there who will use it to protect our state from the disastrous Biden administration.”
Hageman is a fourth generation Wyomingite who was raised on her family ranch outside of Fort Laramie. Growing up on the ranch, she learned the value of hard work, honesty, and fighting for what you believe. Once described as one of the “fiercest and most effective opponents” of the Clinton Administration, Hageman knows that the hardworking men and women of Wyoming deserve a leader who shares their values and will not bow down to the pressures of the liberal left as soon as the road gets a little rough. She attended Casper College, and earned her B.S. in Business Management and her Law Degree from the University of Wyoming, and is a practicing attorney.

clean_body: | | | | Hageman officially files for U.S. House race in Wyoming Harriet Hageman files the official paperwork to run for Congress in Wyoming Constitutional attorney Harriet Hageman today filed the official paperwork with the Wyoming Secretary of State to become a candidate in the 2022 Republican primary for the U.S. House of Representatives. Hageman, who filed the papers in person in Cheyenne this morning, announced her intention to challenge incumbent Rep. Liz Cheney in September 2021 and since has travelled over 23,000 miles inside Wyoming meeting with voters and holding public townhalls. The Republican primary is August 16, 2022. “Having grown up on my family’s ranch near Fort Laramie, I have Wyoming in my DNA,” Hageman said. “I’ve been fighting for the constitutional rights of the people of Wyoming in my professional career and it’s a battle I’ll continue to fight in Congress. We only get one member of the House in Wyoming, and we have to get it right. The people deserve a congresswoman who represents the ideals and values of our great state.” Endorsed by former President Donald Trump, Hageman will be an America First, conservative member of Congress who will never stop fighting for Wyoming. As an attorney, she has fought to protect Wyoming against runaway government and to preserve property rights. She successfully defeated the Clinton administration in a battle over access to forest lands involving the illegal Roadless Rule. And she has taken on the Environmental Protection Agency, the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service, and the U.S. Department of Agriculture to oppose mandates and usurpation of the rights of farmers and ranchers. As a member of Congress, Hageman will fight against federal government overreach and protect property rights, water rights, and 2nd Amendment rights, among other priorities. Hageman will fight to keep taxes low, support Wyoming’s energy and natural resource industries, and oppose needless and endless foreign wars. Hageman said she’s running for Congress because Cheney has turned her back on Wyoming. “Our only member of Congress has completely lost the ability to represent us effectively,” Hageman said. “She continues to wage her own personal war against President Trump and his supporters as Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked member of the January 6th commission. The Republicans in Congress want nothing to do with her, and the Democrats see her as a temporary but useful tool. She is squandering our lone congressional seat and we need someone in there who will use it to protect our state from the disastrous Biden administration.” Hageman is a fourth generation Wyomingite who was raised on her family ranch outside of Fort Laramie. Growing up on the ranch, she learned the value of hard work, honesty, and fighting for what you believe. Once described as one of the “fiercest and most effective opponents” of the Clinton Administration, Hageman knows that the hardworking men and women of Wyoming deserve a leader who shares their values and will not bow down to the pressures of the liberal left as soon as the road gets a little rough. She attended Casper College, and earned her B.S. in Business Management and her Law Degree from the University of Wyoming, and is a practicing attorney. | | | |

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqe7ifcof5lb1rvtv6arc3n24979dqolrr5vkfg8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onk6sqr9cr2maoj6sblcmrj6p5iecqmecpk6mq3cs9leiob4d9iempnfcli6hrm1puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg74cr666qbad1nmap6cd30m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi46h22sh2s8i66pb6clieaoj2c1h2bs)
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7rur0r25d0840btddtjif9b5e3apk7vumqs4vvo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieaoj2c1h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5h81vmm2c9hvqnfgidomhnv09nqa8kh3cim1i4g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieaoj2c1h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z19sh0d3b386s38muql87mkte1cb3s5tat06v3k0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieaoj2c1h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Laura Gillen
subject: 21 lives. 21 families. A devastated community.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45773943/347426014/281630052?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWVlMTBmZi0yZmRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38yENDWUHDM06ruqqXpjvuy65vXelZU_zwfMdS44j6k=&emci=1ae79f07-0edd-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=39ee10ff-2fdd-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=7377580)
---

| | Peter, I'm devastated to hear about the shooting at an elementary school in Uvalde, Texas. 19 children and 2 teachers were killed in a place they were supposed to be safe. That's 21 families forever impacted by gun violence. And 21 deaths that could have been prevented. _How many more have to die before we finally do something?_ Tonight our hearts break once again for the grieving families. Tomorrow let's finally take decisive action to end these recurring national tragedies. **Gun violence in America is a story of one horrifying tragedy after another, with communities across the nation praying that they won't be the next chapter.**
* We must prevent violent offenders from getting their hands on guns by implementing **universal background checks**.

* We must **ban military-style assault weapons** that have no business being on our streets.

* We must **enact red-flag laws** that empower law enforcement to take guns from people who are a threat to themselves or others.

We need leaders who understand the problem of gun violence and are willing to explore solutions from every angle. We need leaders who will stand up to the gun lobby. As we mourn this senseless loss of life, let us put our energy toward gun safety reform so that this tragedy never happens again. _Laura_ |
---|---|---

name: ICYMI News
subject: A bright light during dark hours
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, cons
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp987d9g6ebdt54f5no401m6corm45bs8o9bdud8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpn9p5kmlib4ppmcurr0odnmlon9o31m2on4t9ksap6ecrgmkomct73mcpmatb7mv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666pb6p1getimcc9gmdgmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933clj6ap75cdh64oh5u)
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsrf1j49kh3bj5fpiqu4knn0h6utusjddhi0oi80_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieaor2c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5pnh9754p2fpuf67nrbn7hsbae8s60trmhg2up8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieaor2c9h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhcs7vcb233qmrle05h8a4vn9lqi0nc92fkv3c98_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieaor2c9h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze5b0ueas18tvi6mh14hhvihgffrqda6e0g0eskg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieaor2c9h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7o4a34u938ccmo95jna17v5li54cq8f72f5aj4o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieaor2c9h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zeckb5vmk1pmuasbfem5tgol2rd6bleg1ijdlqf8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieaor2c9h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

Polling shows that he's facing his highest disapproval ratings on record, and we're seeing that energy on the ground right now! That means the demand for yard signs is higher than ever before. More and more people keep reaching out to request a Team Abby yard sign, but we just checked our supply and we're set to RUN OUT OF YARD SIGNS! Remember, if we flip this seat blue, it will virtually guarantee Democratic Senate control, so we have to buy more yard signs ASAP. Grassley the door: 64% of likely voters said that they DON'T want to reelect him in November! But the GOP knows that Sen. Grassley is vulnerable – and they've got a massive war chest of more than $44 MILLION dedicated to protecting incumbents like Grassley and taking back the Senate. You can bet they'll be spending heavily to defeat challengers like Abby. Winning is going to take a powerful, coordinated grassroots effort. That's why yard signs are absolutely critical. Along with phone banks, TV ads, door-to-door canvassing, voter events and digital organizing, they're a key component of our grassroots voter contact strategy. This is how we show the strength of our campaign, spread Abby's winning message and reach the voters who will decide this election.= | | = Thanks for standing with our campaign! – Team Abby | |

**This is HUGE news for our campaign, Peter.**

Our race is shaping up to be one of the most competitive House races _in the country_ and it could be the race that determines which party controls the House majority in November. This endorsement comes at a crucial moment when our June 7th primary is just days away.

[**Flipping CA-27 from red to blue is possible – but only if we can keep up our momentum. Help us continue to power our campaign through our primary by making a donation of $5 or more today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45774068/347426713/1076724892?refcode=em22_220526_LATimes_Resend&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzYzZWI4Yi0zMGRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tz_sFeyxcYPBLFL2S_-7oFaYtxCOlvr2XjYQzlZs0a4=)

The choice couldn’t be more clear. In Congress, Christy will fight for Californians by working to protect voting rights, make college more affordable, fight for reproductive rights, and so much more.

On the other hand, Mike Garcia isn’t fighting for the people – and his record proves it. In just the past WEEK he’s:
* Voted against legislation that would have provided emergency fund to address the infant formula shortage;
* Voted against legislation to stop price gouging at gas stations as we continue to face rising costs at the pump;
* And voted against legislation that would confront the issue of domestic terrorism in the wake of a mass shooting in Buffalo, NY.

You get the picture. We don’t know who Mike Garcia is fighting for, but it’s not the people he was elected to serve. And California’s largest newspaper is making sure voters know it.

[**The race for CA-27 is on and we need your help to ensure we come out on top in our June 7th primary. Chip in $5 or more to ensure we can continue to spread Christy’s message across the district ahead of our primary.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45774069/347426714/1076724892?refcode=em22_220526_LATimes_Resend&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzYzZWI4Yi0zMGRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tz_sFeyxcYPBLFL2S_-7oFaYtxCOlvr2XjYQzlZs0a4=)
