name: Dick Durbin
subject: More than thoughts and prayers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
It’s time for action.
#
Peter,
I am heartbroken.
Time and time again, we have failed to prevent innocent lives from being lost to senseless gun tragedies. So I implore my colleagues from both sides of the aisle:**please, take action and save lives**. It is unforgivable that we are in a position to help solve this crisis and continue to come up short.
As a first step, yesterday, I chaired a hearing in the Judiciary Committee on the nomination of Steve Dettelbach to lead the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives–the primary agency tasked with combating gun crime. That agency has been without a director for _seven years_ because gun groups have lobbied for it to stay that way.
With overwhelming support from a bipartisan group of former Justice Department officials and law enforcement organizations, Steve Dettelbach should be swiftly confirmed to lead ATF.
**[Peter, we know we need to offer more than thoughts and prayers at this moment. Let’s start by confirming this well-qualified nominee to lead ATF.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45774128/347426976/9152914?ms=dd_em_220526_1&refcode=dd_em_220526_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2YzOTZlNy0zMGRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=70yj1DkRw84UTz9uv4d1JsTRG5Py4kHjg9aoOD_-xUI=&emci=c503d837-24dd-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=77f396e7-30dd-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=2727974)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

name: Action Needed
subject: re: gun violence.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Our nation is reeling as we pick up the pieces after yet another devastating and senseless act of gun violence. Two communities across our country were ripped apart after 10 people were killed in an attack targeting Black Americans in Buffalo, New York, less than two weeks ago -- and two days ago, 21 were killed in an attack targeting children in Uvalde, Texas.

Today is the 146th day of the year. And there have now been at least 198 mass shootings _this year alone_. There have been more mass killings due to gun violence than there have been days in 2022. Let that sink in for a moment.

We all agree that something needs to be done, but for years, Mitch McConnell has blocked commonsense gun safety measures despite their overwhelming bipartisan support from regular Americans across our country.

But Democrats CANNOT be silent right now. We need to stand up and show Mitch McConnell that we -- the American people -- are more powerful than the gun lobby. We need to show McConnell that we will not sit idly by as he stonewalls progress yet again -- _refusing to save more communities from having to endure the horrific devastation Uvalde is now experiencing,_ while offering his hollow thoughts and prayers.

**This time must be different.**

Will you do your part to show Republicans that it's past time we did something to stop the epidemic of gun violence in America?

| **Do you agree that we need to take action RIGHT NOW to pass commonsense gun safety reforms?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/signup/email-dscc-rr-gun-safety-petition-pros-2022-0526/?t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220526-ActionNeeded-GunReformRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220526-ActionNeeded-GunReformRF-Pros-sl1&akid=4488%2E9716520%2EGKHuoY)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/signup/email-dscc-rr-gun-safety-petition-pros-2022-0526/?t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220526-ActionNeeded-GunReformRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220526-ActionNeeded-GunReformRF-Pros-sl1&akid=4488%2E9716520%2EGKHuoY)
---

Thank you,

Team DSCC

| |
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2022-q2?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=4488_9716520_GKHuoY&akid=4488%2E9716520%2EGKHuoY)**.

name: Hillsdale College via Backing America
subject: History has proven Hillsdale correct
body:
For Hillsdale College, independence is invaluable. Hillsdale refuses to accept a single penny of federal or state funding—not even indirectly in
[Unsubscribe](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_s=01ab8f6c475e490b857a55469b7baa40&_t=R4NdRstR915eo4mLHmXfKt0kyVe1z0adu_fpPL81xk_BFcv-4kHGT5k2lWLxjyKDGzvwHiYT_-ZxzbKyAxpJsSrzERSCWSeUk2T0pZmU-sbUAzNSGx1mmrPoB-S2frJqLt-SCGj0grZHOIR05kvpKUsg1Em45J2NZ1WV-Twb-81pyoIm-4DGa6lOyWJ9-MXUYlsgqF64hc4R4mobzLzBEl7g1Q61PukqkWObdYPRlXQ%3D)
_Please see a message from our sponsor:_
---
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=01ab8f6c475e490b857a55469b7baa40&_e=LS2T_puXJnit-175Yzku_wKbECz0lG4Xo2myJtU49HWbYXd2POnmmhd79RruvZTd8NxrsVoriFWQGztpCzb1ZCILaXRjynplxSGVa7QUdSpCCE5AWIDSD3KBIYB50cSAS_zEnhvSXB8pWn3sxGwVDFifzYLBjfUb_379k2aeJG-tR_P2r_85uFh6WVvEDG3u4K0M-ZuGEb3L_YrsaQzom2ibGh7QOPTvSU_H8XT21-l4pmjyGedHApjLN4Atfe6V2rVwEO6OXVpUqgl2F9Rt1uQkGHtMHK6bLM24h4_YIBxaAOYJypZeigrRhmAFNCJ89w1NT2VJbrT6Brj2J1MD4B0qUGFbZNfapUfGexea8Wimk0ce-7ymp6ViaxdbDOPvQhyctvfkOjZ85BNwjQTnwQLj26qycvutLxicOgZQPDEajNyNqJR7HriaOfD1mK4z29wJCkHxene2rXV9o2tORsIWCg8i5uag3V7Ll72H9kA%3D) Dear Fellow American,
For Hillsdale College, independence is invaluable.
Hillsdale refuses to accept a single penny of federal or state funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans.
This independence frees Hillsdale from corrupting and unconstitutional regulations and allows us to remain true to the college’s 1844 mission: to provide the kind of education needed to preserve “the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty.”
**The kind of education offered by Hillsdale is rare in American higher education today. There are several reasons for this. Let me mention two important ones.**
One reason is that since the 1960s, Left-wing progressives have increasingly come to dominate American colleges and universities. They have thrown out the old mission statements and restructured their curricula to promote “progressive” ideology.
Another**** contributing factor to the decline of American higher education has been the massive influx of taxpayer funding to colleges and universities—funding that comes with regulatory strings attached.
Going back to the 1950s, when the direct distribution of federal-taxpayer money first became available to colleges, Hillsdale refused to accept such funds.
Since that time, Hillsdale’s Board of Trustees has pledged several times to resist any attempts by the government to regulate its internal affairs. Hillsdale was almost alone in seeing the dangers posed by federal funding.
**History has proven Hillsdale’s decision to be correct—and Hillsdale’s status as America’s leading liberal arts college that reaches and teaches increasing millions of citizens nationwide stands as proof.**
Hillsdale’s independence also means that all of the scholarships, grants, and loans that our students need to attend Hillsdale College must be privately funded through the generosity of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
**Indeed, all of Hillsdale’s work is entirely dependent on private support—and as I already mentioned, this work is by no means confined to our Michigan campus. **
Hillsdale **radiates its educational mission nationwide** through its many outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.
Consider our monthly speech digest, _**Imprimis**_. Now in its 49th year, **_Imprimis_** reaches more than 5.7 million households and businesses nationwide.
Hillsdale also produces **online courses** , and **we offer them free of charge** to any citizen wishing to learn. Over 2.5 million citizens have already enrolled in one or more of these courses, which cover such topics as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics.
Hillsdale also extends its mission into******American K-12 education****.** Our Barney Charter School Initiative has already helped establish******over 20 Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools in over eleven states****.**
In addition, Hillsdale provides, free of charge, an **American classical K-12 curriculum********—including American civics****—** to a growing network of educators and homeschoolers.
**Our effective educational outreach on behalf of liberty has a tremendous impact—and in this time of increasing threats to American liberty, we aim to expand these outreach efforts even further. **
None of this would be possible **without your support**.
That’s why I’m asking you to partner with Hillsdale by making a generous donation today.
**Your gift is vital to the continuation and expansion of Hillsdale’s work to promote informed patriotism. **
**You can give safely and securely online here:** **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/price-of-independence](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=01ab8f6c475e490b857a55469b7baa40&_e=LS2T_puXJnit-175Yzku_wKbECz0lG4Xo2myJtU49HWbYXd2POnmmhd79RruvZTd8NxrsVoriFWQGztpCzb1ZCILaXRjynplxSGVa7QUdSpCCE5AWIDSD3KBIYB50cSAS_zEnhvSXB8pWn3sxGwVDFifzYLBjfUb_379k2aeJG-tR_P2r_85uFh6WVvEDG3u4K0M-ZuGEb3L_YrsaQzom2ibGh7QOPTvSU_H8XT21-l4pmjyGedHApjLN4Atfe6VAY-rJFASFT1kD8WS-PjdnYeJqVfi7_JYLOMN-HUJeponrADLvDHcQah7qAUPJGNKVpa9YGAC_uWLEi7tENy8jZeVoUCSx1vhJp-iogY1IwOU9FDovwdWMGGSDzIwMAKTPbgiDEDRHa_Stn1AiJwNy1VutPj9dWrYSZMoHd9-UQzNLwnI8QAEJ_PmsYv3HJ_a-UYbJ7X1Kt1n_OiicxgRyPoGg5IIbfnFmyjRaJrFrn0%3D)**
**With your help, Hillsdale will remain a beacon of genuine independence ... and will continue to work tirelessly to preserve America’s great heritage of liberty for future generations. **
All of us at Hillsdale College are deeply grateful for your partnership.
Best regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

[Privacy Policy](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=01ab8f6c475e490b857a55469b7baa40&_e=kQHrEH94FbCy2cxl_1uBr7cslhGhLjzl8sjwk_FXXmb-3tiz2lXaUQVl61gx3NwOJhTRk-2M2ojJZseAJ8iEalWO92uSQUDjJvAvUR6coIzQIcgkoo528YlvASgsr0GuEvqjNn-NBMyODev2n6m3THabfxWENLQ5IYiRHQ41T7WpS7eHsjR1Obzl8XpJDXFVcLECq4yaqfWa4sVSmKzxJLEIiBHSZ0pXMs9-rN0ZWurh-ID_ciTx0NF5GF2QPafmrfmEq4IGg9_lexduhw65UBurq2uIdH_9oBsx9EbjWW5zJ_dJErX7M7wHoAuKWoRI)

You can give safely and securely online here: With your help, Hillsdale will remain a beacon of genuine independence ... and will continue to work tirelessly to preserve America’s great heritage of liberty for future generations. All of us at Hillsdale College are deeply grateful for your partnership. Best regards, Larry P. Hello,
Chuck Grassley just launched his first massive TV ad buy attacking me across Iowa, and it couldn’t be more ridiculous. Apparently _I’m_ responsible for inflation, rising gas prices, an increase in gun violence, and “open borders.”
“Had enough?” the ad asks. “Vote Chuck Grassley.”
I hate to be the bearer of bad news, but Chuck Grassley’s the one that’s been in Washington for 47 years; not me. And Iowa has had enough – enough of _him_.
If you want to blame someone for inflation, maybe start with Chuck Grassley voting for the Trump tax cuts that gave trillions to billionaires and mega corporations.
If you want to blame someone for high gas prices, maybe look at how Chuck Grassley enabled Vladimir Putin, allowed gas companies to gouge consumers, and voted against funding for renewable energy sources.
And gun violence? Don’t get me started. Chuck Grassley blocked a bill requiring universal background checks just a few months ago and then accepted a Legislator of the Year award from the gun lobby.
This is what I’m up against folks. Lies, lies, and more lies.
Grassley has no record to run on. So instead, he’s attacking me with the millions of dollars he’s taken from corporate PACs and special interests.
The polls show I can win, but if I’m going to be able to fight back, I need grassroots donors like you to give now. We’re facing a critical end-of-month deadline, and right now we are still very short of our goal.

name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: Friend, are you still there?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Smiley for Washington, Inc
body:
It's been a while since we heard from you.

Hey Friend - it's Tiffany Smiley.

It's been a while since I last heard from you, so I just wanted to check in! A lot has happened since we last spoke, and my race for the Senate in Washington has really heated up. Here's a quick recap on what we've accomplished so far:
* _We hit major fundraising deadlines (and beat the Democrats!)_
* _We took on a radical Democrat looking to destroy Washington_
* _We delivered countless petitions and polls to challenge Biden's dangerous agenda_
* _We turned Washington from a 'safe blue' state to a "LEAN blue" state_
* _We joined Tucker Carlson on Fox News and shared our Conservative vision for Washington_

**However, there is still so much to do before we can reach victory in November, which is why it's important that we reconnect.** If you're still on Team Smiley, I'd love to hear your feedback on what YOUR top priorities are for my campaign.

[**If you have just 5 minutes, your input in the survey below would be invaluable as we set our agenda for the coming months:**](http://ct4.gophouseconservatives.com/t/12971300/407426320/248038/1/)
**[**TAKE TIFFANY'Y PRIORITY SURVEY**](http://ct4.gophouseconservatives.com/t/12971300/407426320/248038/2/)**
I'm keeping an eye out for your response, and I am so grateful for your support as we fight the good fight to save Washington and FLIP the Senate!

Thank you for your support,
Tiffany Smiley
_P.S: Make sure you never miss an update from Tiffany or Team Smiley! Be sure to add <info@smileyforwashington.com> and our phone number 47682 to your contacts so you stay in the loop!_

* * *

**Our country needs leadership, Friend.**
We need someone who will stand up and work to solve our nation's problems. I'm a proven leader, I've stood up to the DC bureaucrats at the VA to pave the way for ALL veterans to receive the care and treatment they deserve when they return home.
Our veterans are willing to pay the ultimate price for our everyday freedoms. But when they come back home, their service is often overlooked by our very own government.
After serving our nation and laying their lives on the line overseas, our veterans should **NOT** have to beg to get the care they deserve here at home. We need to do better for those who defend our nation, Friend.
**That is why I'm running for Senate. **

[**If you agree we need to stand up for our nation's heroes, will you chip in to help me reach my major upcoming goal? I need your support, Friend!**](http://ct4.gophouseconservatives.com/t/12971300/407426320/248039/3/)
| **[**MEET MY IMPENDING DEADLINE**](http://ct4.gophouseconservatives.com/t/12971300/407426320/248040/4/)**

name: Josh Riley
subject: Peter, what is going on here?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
So far, in our new district, I’ve been getting asked one question over and over again: “what is going on here?!?!”

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45774465/347428430/-1015964469?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220526-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTljYjNhMy0zMmRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kDnzejy2__Py0u6ykjsiUkfr8tFxettA9FwbsMpiLEA=)
---
| Hi Peter,

It’s Josh Riley, Democrat for Congress in our new 19th Congressional District.

So far, in our new district, I’ve been getting asked one question over and over again: _“what is going on here?!?!”_

A lot of voters are confused about where their district is, who their candidates are, and when elections are taking place–and for good reason.

It’s unfortunate that we’re in this position, but I hope this email helps explain the situation.

[_**And before I get into it, I do have to ask, if you’re able to pitch in $5 to our campaign, it will help us educate more voters on the upcoming elections and turn out the vote!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45774473/347428435/-1015964469?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220526-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTljYjNhMy0zMmRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kDnzejy2__Py0u6ykjsiUkfr8tFxettA9FwbsMpiLEA=)

_**Step One: How did we get here?**_

Every ten years, we go through a process where Congressional districts are redrawn based on the latest Census results. It’s called redistricting, and every state has their own process for it. In New York, a 2014 constitutional amendment created an “Independent Redistricting Commission” (IRC) that was responsible for recommending a map to the State Legislature, not based on politics, but on fair map drawing.

However, the IRC was unable to propose a map to the Legislature because of a political stalemate between Democratic and Republican representatives on the commission. That forced the State Legislature to draw the map.

The Legislature’s map was challenged in court, and it was struck down by New York’s highest court.

At that point, the judge handling the case assigned a Special Master to draw a new and fair map for New York State’s Congressional and State Senate districts.

Those lines are now set in stone, and we now have eight competitive congressional districts across the state (including ours!).

_**Step Two: So where’s my district?**_

If you live in Broome, Tioga, Tompkins, Chenango, Cortland, Delaware, Otsego (partial), Greene, Columbia, Ulster (partial), or Sullivan counties....good news! You’re a voter in the new 19th District, where I’m running to represent you!

This new district is one that President Biden won very narrowly and comes down to a 50-50 matchup. It’s going to be a tossup, and we need all-hands-on-deck to win it.

And if you live in Herkimer, Oswego, Oneida, Madison, Onondaga, Cayuga, Seneca, Schuyler, or Ontario counties, I’m grateful to have had the chance to meet so many of you this year in the previous two iterations of our district, hear what issues are important to you, and earn your support. I’m so thankful for the opportunity to have worked with you, and I want you to know I’ll never forget all you did for this campaign.

[_**Peter, you can help us build our campaign for the new 19th District (a must-win for Democrats if we’re going to hold the House) by pitching in $5 here today!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45774481/347428443/-1015964469?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220526-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTljYjNhMy0zMmRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kDnzejy2__Py0u6ykjsiUkfr8tFxettA9FwbsMpiLEA=)

_**Step Three: So when is the election?**_

If you thought it couldn’t get more confusing, you were wrong.

As of now, primary elections for State Assembly and Statewide elections (Governor, Lieutenant Governor, etc.) are still taking place on June 28th.

BUT, primary elections for State Senate and Congress are going to take place on August 23rd.

Now, to make matters even more confusing, there are “special elections” for congressional seats in Upstate New York (likely to take place in August), to fill vacant congressional seats in the 19th and 23rd districts.

Peter, I am running in an August 23 election to be the Democratic and Working Families Party nominee in NY-19 and then in a November 8th election to be the new Representative for NY-19. (I’m not running in the June 28 election or in the “special elections.”)

_**Step Four: This is a mess. How can I help?**_

Yes, this election is confusing. It’s messy, and we’re going to need to educate ALL of our neighbors on when to, how-to, and why they should make their voice heard this year by voting.

[_**So I’ll ask one more time: if you can pitch in $5, $10, or whatever you can spare, it will go a long way to help us educate voters at their doorsteps, online, and through the mail. Think of it this way: $1 allows us to talk to and educate one more voter. Pitch in what you can here >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45774486/347428452/-1015964469?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220526-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTljYjNhMy0zMmRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kDnzejy2__Py0u6ykjsiUkfr8tFxettA9FwbsMpiLEA=)

As we go through this unusual journey together, Peter, I’m humbled and honored to have you on the team.

With gratitude & high hopes,

Josh Riley

clean_body: So far, in our new district, I’ve been getting asked one question over and over again: “what is going on here?!?!” | = | Hi Peter, It’s Josh Riley, Democrat for Congress in our new 19th Congressional District. So far, in our new district, I’ve been getting asked one question over and over again: “what is going on here?!?!” A lot of voters are confused about where their district is, who their candidates are, and when elections are taking place–and for good reason. It’s unfortunate that we’re in this position, but I hope this email helps explain the situation. = Step One: How did we get here? Every ten years, we go through a process where Congressional districts are redrawn based on the latest Census results. It’s called redistricting, and every state has their own process for it. In New York, a 2014 constitutional amendment created an “Independent Redistricting Commission” (IRC) that was responsible for recommending a map to the State Legislature, not based on politics, but on fair map drawing. However, the IRC was unable to propose a map to the Legislature because of a political stalemate between Democratic and Republican representatives on the commission. That forced the State Legislature to draw the map. The Legislature’s map was challenged in court, and it was struck down by New York’s highest court. At that point, the judge handling the case assigned a Special Master to draw a new and fair map for New York State’s Congressional and State Senate districts. Those lines are now set in stone, and we now have eight competitive congressional districts across the state (including ours!). Step Two: So where’s my district? If you live in Broome, Tioga, Tompkins, Chenango, Cortland, Delaware, Otsego (partial), Greene, Columbia, Ulster (partial), or Sullivan counties....good news! You’re a voter in the new 19th District, where I’m running to represent you! This new district is one that President Biden won very narrowly and comes down to a 50-50 matchup. It’s going to be a tossup, and we need all-hands-on-deck to win it. And if you live in Herkimer, Oswego, Oneida, Madison, Onondaga, Cayuga, Seneca, Schuyler, or Ontario counties, I’m grateful to have had the chance to meet so many of you this year in the previous two iterations of our district, hear what issues are important to you, and earn your support. I’m so thankful for the opportunity to have worked with you, and I want you to know I’ll never forget all you did for this campaign. = Step Three: So when is the election? If you thought it couldn’t get more confusing, you were wrong. As of now, primary elections for State Assembly and Statewide elections (Governor, Lieutenant Governor, etc.) are still taking place on June 28th. BUT, primary elections for State Senate and Congress are going to take place on August 23rd. Now, to make matters even more confusing, there are “special elections” for congressional seats in Upstate New York (likely to take place in August), to fill vacant congressional seats in the 19th and 23rd districts. Peter, I am running in an August 23 election to be the Democratic and Working Families Party nominee in NY-19 and then in a November 8th election to be the new Representative for NY-19. (I’m not running in the June 28 election or in the “special elections.”) Step Four: This is a mess. How can I help? Yes, this election is confusing. It’s messy, and we’re going to need to educate ALL of our neighbors on when to, how-to, and why they should make their voice heard this year by voting. = As we go through this unusual journey together, Peter, I’m humbled and honored to have you on the team. subject: Things are heating up!

body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Last monthly deadline before the primary on June 28th
We are making huge progress though the reality is - things are heating up and we need your help to keep up the momentum with 32 days remaining until the primary!
This election is historic for our state, as Oklahoma continues to make headlines and send shockwaves through the country as extremist policies continue to be made into law. Oklahoman's are demanding change though we can't do this alone.
The team has been working day and night to ensure our mission to fight for everyday Oklahomans while restoring unity and hope in the future of our state and country. November might feel far away, but the primary election will be here before we know it and we need all the help we can get
This upcoming deadline is the last monthly deadline before the primary on June 28th, so we need your help now more than ever!
To win this election, Madison needs a united community rallying behind her. We have the winning coalition and the vision, and we are doing what it takes to show up in all communities across Oklahoma! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/msh]
Will you chip in today to ensure we can take on the heat? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/msh]
We are grateful for all your support!
- Team Madison

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zngeofc7mich7nb5fmh9fhvjs2npcqvet3it0ek0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqnbd9ke9hracjl69oeedphejj32c3lemp69p5ledpbad1mm4qr4p3mcpp3eojgsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6dj33d5l6krrcp366jgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clj6ap77c1gm4oh5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8gvp6mv0v9hqt9tteka2cecthjqpvdiakci9ls0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieeo31c9h2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbacapsb953v1shodt0sn8tvnbg5kidu00f87nc0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieeo31c9h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkng0q0jt25uiu4j5j6r80ti580qm3itdd836i0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieeo31c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8dsafn18o14kbm9utk7qtjvj05cs7biph95hs7g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieeo31c9h2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zptpmnjdgd9902saqhohcmr6mioltld5r50m33jg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieeo31c9h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6etfhia4gej2enh9ab7nt29sga81jegrofsf89g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieeo31c9h2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zidjon99flt3fgoplogo3270isjt7g238brdgqt0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieeo31c9h2bs)
---
[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3krrcuv4s93npco7l9bsaqj3lf5gilt60vk8tq0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieeo31c9h2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za6gnqvbard97o650q4auaf91h7d4742lqi0lqm8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieeo31c9h2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7bp29ea8bd540b5tkoh6i15aplkpjisbrv7dskg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clieeo31c9h2bs)
---

body:

| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/20220523_policy_pints_call_your_senators/?utm_source=ema_2022-05-25_Smith_Khanna_policy_pints_7_call_&source=ema_2022-05-25_Smith_Khanna_policy_pints_7_call_&t=2&akid=12977%2E53494%2EhxCiKe) Friend, We hope you enjoyed grabbing a virtual pint on Monday with Sen. Tina Smith, Rep. Ro Khanna, and Evergreen co-founder Sam Ricketts! Missed Policy + Pints? No worries—we have quick highlights ready for you!
* * *
| **Sen. Tina Smith** made news when she said she's "very optimistic" about reaching a climate deal—in "weeks and not months." | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4309?t=3&akid=12977%2E53494%2EhxCiKe)
---|---
* * *
**Rep. Ro Khanna** made the case for why climate must be "the central thing that we do" before the midterms—there's literally a timeclock on climate action. | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4310?t=4&akid=12977%2E53494%2EhxCiKe)
---|---
* * *
The event closed with Rep. Khanna giving a shout-out to you and the rest of our grassroots community, saying that "Evergreen's voice" has been "critical" to getting "the boldest climate package that the U.S. government has ever done" on the table.
We'll raise a glass to that! As Rep. Khanna said, your help has been critical, but we're not over the finish line yet. We must continue to speak up and demand climate investments now. [**_Call your senators right now and let them know that they must pass climate investments this spring!_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/20220523_policy_pints_call_your_senators/?utm_source=ema_2022-05-25_Smith_Khanna_policy_pints_7_call_&source=ema_2022-05-25_Smith_Khanna_policy_pints_7_call_&t=5&akid=12977%2E53494%2EhxCiKe)

name: Cianti Stewart-Reid, Fair Fight
subject: Reflecting on this past week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
Fair Fight is working to ensure free and fair elections for all.

Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45774776/347429609/1793776944?refcode=em_20220526_f_c_update_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTQ0ZTZlZS0zM2RkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VlCvFu3h4-8flw1-qMPcRHE_XTlNCYWLYDMBNntDM-s=&emci=12118fe1-15dd-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=5144e6ee-33dd-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=1037277)

| | Team, On Tuesday, we were keeping a close eye on the Georgia primary results as the nominees for the general election were chosen. Fair Fight-endorsed candidates Stacey Abrams and Senator Raphael Warnock advanced to their general elections, and Bee Nguyen advanced to a runoff to secure the Democratic nomination for Georgia's secretary of state. **But we also, along with everyone else in the country, closely watched news reports come in regarding the horrifying elementary school massacre in Uvalde, Texas. Words fail to communicate the deep pain, anger, and devastation that we’re feeling in the aftermath.** This happening just ten days after another unspeakable act of violence at a supermarket in Buffalo, New York has been too much to sit with. When faced with the question, _“What can be done?”_ , a clear answer is for our elected leaders to act. After all, the vast majority of Americans support stronger gun laws. But we don’t see that overwhelming amount of support reflected by our current elected officials. Here’s a reason: extremist anti-voter politicians keep trying to pass restrictive and burdensome laws to try to make it harder for us to elect leaders who reflect our values. The same extremist politicians who bend the knee to the gun lobby instead of listening to voters are the ones who deny election outcomes and attack voting rights in order to keep their power. At Fair Fight, we’ll continue working to ensure free and fair elections for all — so the vast majority of Americans who support gun safety laws can freely elect leaders who will take action on gun violence, and ensure our freedom to vote. Thank you for being a part of this work. Cianti Stewart-Reid |
---|---|---

|

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
| | | [](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFkEFrhDAQhX-N3iKa6GgPHhbK3raUUugxZCejhpoYktiy_76x20JvhWEOb74H854eNWrVYGlGXnNedxwaaIdWVKAeBs0HBNVD32oo2lqtFFIVyO_X1aByScX3aQtIFW62XMapGWpxHaBre4KGt3AdOugRtegETITl20VelFmNm5-UpTGkSYYonZJpmRg5CvNNdowD41w25TouKflYiFPBz3ki4R5IVwsFk9RM1RbmLN99zDhNnvJySCzu4YNuh02c92QlKuuVmV0hHu_4X7rgcDBx23OUTPiwRU-Y8ps_J0va7PYw2_z-j4ibS-RSVp9P7OX1zH4LLMOo_adZVxOhz7XNh-m7ovRP5C_dDITO)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFkEFrhDAQhX-N3iKa6GgPHhbK3raUUugxZCejhpoYktiy_76x20JvhWEOb74H854eNWrVYGlGXnNedxwaaIdWVKAeBs0HBNVD32oo2lqtFFIVyO_X1aByScX3aQtIFW62XMapGWpxHaBre4KGt3AdOugRtegETITl20VelFmNm5-UpTGkSYYonZJpmRg5CvNNdowD41w25TouKflYiFPBz3ki4R5IVwsFk9RM1RbmLN99zDhNnvJySCzu4YNuh02c92QlKuuVmV0hHu_4X7rgcDBx23OUTPiwRU-Y8ps_J0va7PYw2_z-j4ibS-RSVp9P7OX1zH4LLMOo_adZVxOhz7XNh-m7ovRP5C_dDITO) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFkEFrhDAQhX-N3iKa6GgPHhbK3raUUugxZCejhpoYktiy_76x20JvhWEOb74H854eNWrVYGlGXnNedxwaaIdWVKAeBs0HBNVD32oo2lqtFFIVyO_X1aByScX3aQtIFW62XMapGWpxHaBre4KGt3AdOugRtegETITl20VelFmNm5-UpTGkSYYonZJpmRg5CvNNdowD41w25TouKflYiFPBz3ki4R5IVwsFk9RM1RbmLN99zDhNnvJySCzu4YNuh02c92QlKuuVmV0hHu_4X7rgcDBx23OUTPiwRU-Y8ps_J0va7PYw2_z-j4ibS-RSVp9P7OX1zH4LLMOo_adZVxOhz7XNh-m7ovRP5C_dDITO)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Erica Smith
subject: Elections are won and lost, but movements are never over.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US
body:
[1]Erica Smith

I want to thank YOU and the tens of thousands of people across North
Carolina’s 1st District and beyond who put their faith in me and this
people-powered campaign. There’s no group of people I’d rather be in this
fight with.

Elections are won and lost, but movements are never over. We ran a
campaign rooted in a bold vision for politics and policies that meet this
moment, and we built a movement for progressive change in eastern North
Carolina.

Economic, climate, racial, and reproductive justice can’t wait. That’s
even more true today than it was when we launched our campaign.

While our opponents inundated the airwaves with negative personal attacks
ads, we focused on putting forward an issue-oriented positive vision for
eastern North Carolina. I'm proud that we maintained our integrity. I'd
rather lose running a principled campaign than win relying on dark money
and deceptive attacks.

Super PACs flooded an unprecedented amount of dark money into districts
across the country to defeat progressive women of color — including $3
million into our race alone. A battle for the soul of the Democratic party
is taking place and regardless of the outcome of this election, we are on
the right side of this fight.

While last week's results were deeply disappointing, I still believe that,
ultimately, our movement will prove more powerful than the dark money that
opposes us.

Thank you, again, from the bottom of my heart, and rest up — we still have
a brighter future to fight for and build.

God bless you,

Erica Smith

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220526-1208-footer&t=1001&refcode2=1208_3698_JRpmZQ&akid=1208%2E3698%2EJRpmZQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1208%2E3698%2EJRpmZQ

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US

name: Rebecca Kleefisch
subject: This is unprecedented in Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Rebecca
body:
Where we stand against Evers’ war chest ahead of the May deadline.
| [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe89b1318ebf4a15871cae40d01a29a1&_m=fa1d5e3057e545e6bacd57e646ee3bc0&_e=6F_HxLr4gtRBfmy6_VrF-chcnxZE0JSWhFsUKnTPuozMs1daxG7ruqYz58s-7uRNXGQd3wlYX7fRpcQpt_WACc2NZTa31Oube3F_Ck0nwhcfb8RnUw0xhmkenJqUplW9w9pW2-wXIu91YsjkbOpj_Bq4w2uMrMJ0bVGtEZynRtM9tmUBQVybo3ubYAOUO9eDod18gTPCPx107C_35Pvxp9aANWFeetPPnKISGTB_Mx9tz4-kGMwXVq9-vpEdtObWifKEYhWxY5QehQ8oRYfOjCpE_-Znszr9daIbvMJF1R2P1zulvA7kV4ZG1kFuTJvvfuNS3pVtT-lpMx5x3gSMXESG96nJlleVRo_o2ELvR_f5HHLOpdWHb0PCYFsC8GMo3vVPt8yLEUX7d3T3yvW6YmPgQN5xkF1I91VKx1yoqmF_V6TUe3uRZ24twNlpQDlvnkUh-RMDzlCH07UwK926wcD7RwI9GTXeRzjzmSivJGPcHJB2ePIIJQebX3CKBJ2UGmcSwNgeDRCxJG7s0R5LhA%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Tony Evers is sitting on a war chest the likes of which Wisconsin has never seen before...
---
**He _bragged_ that his $10 million cash on hand was TRIPLE what Governor Walker had at the same point in his last reelection bid.**
---
_And that doesn’t even include the $75 million the DGA is offering up to try and buy this race for Evers amidst his disastrous polling numbers._
---
As much as I hate to admit it, this battleground governor’s race may come down to fundraising.
---

clean_body: Where we stand against Evers’ war chest ahead of the May deadline. | Friend, Tony Evers is sitting on a war chest the likes of which Wisconsin has never seen before... He bragged that his $10 million cash on hand was TRIPLE what Governor Walker had at the same point in his last reelection bid. And that doesn’t even include the $75 million the DGA is offering up to try and buy this race for Evers amidst his disastrous polling numbers. As much as I hate to admit it, this battleground governor’s race may come down to fundraising. With our most important end-of-month deadline to date right around the corner, we simply can’t come up short. As if it weren’t enough that we already have to contend with Evers’ war chest and the DGA’s $75 million, we’re also public enemy #1 to Evers’ pals in the Madison swamp. The very same cronies that Governor Walker and I fought back against for 8 years to put YOU first are now terrified that I can and will defeat their favorite liberal puppet. But just like the radical Left, they know money will have a huge impact on this race. If we can keep pace Friend, you have my word, we will take back Wisconsin for conservatives. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

Greg Landsman is a former public school teacher and community leader running for Congress to fight for American children and families. His Republican opponent voted to overturn the results of the 2020 presidential election and against desperately needed pandemic relief. After 25 years in Washington, he's left our community behind.

Greg has an unprecedented opportunity to unseat Steve Chabot, one of the most powerful -- and dangerous -- Republicans in Congress, and bring real change to the people of this district.

Then, the next day he voted AGAINST a bipartisan bill to do something about it. = I’m tired of the talking points and partisan BS. You may or may not watch “**The View** ,” but undoubtedly, you’ve heard of the daytime talk show owing to the many outrageous things their hosts have said throughout the years. Let me remind you of a few examples:

“ _**If you kick out all of the Latinos who’s going to clean your toilets?**_ ” – Kelly Osbourn on illegal immigration

“ _**It was a Halloween party. I went as a beautiful African woman.**_ ” – Joy Behar on wearing blackface to a Halloween party

Or when Whoopie Goldberg last year had this to say when talking about the Holocaust: “ _**Well, this is white people doing it to white people. So, this is y’all go fight amongst yourselves.**_ ”

Well, now things have gotten political once again. Recently co-host Sunny Hostin said on air that she “ _**doesn’t understand black Republicans,**_ ” and that a black Republican is “ _**an oxymoron**_.”

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5fd05e5618324331be4dbb9593a8b424&_e=HXvdf6qhA-O3nV4T92_EFVcH6bZyNBjcLrmB3cVez5R7AM26mlZmh1fS_-2CZhqIav-ZMhpqGz9-dU_mmwfEDj4Qs-6qMpuWpU4Oqo-5mjFZbT44FmDUu-TIvhw4oUKnDIFJtDHCM5mT4b0caZ5A9TWzwvgaVUP3VsXJOlxkbf5Pv26GKJUVvOmlTI0K2iGhxEOa2l3u5JyAqnd82f01yGkLUocQ-KIOKPyAlYf2o1jU0yhrWfdDT4EDa8_0eY_QmF3RWSReC-M1KADewAnVO3Zo1btMC-m0zR6LbbSZ1swuXyoDv0GnFzUcQxo7xhjCcNKR8avzHFt8zm6smAdGIqTiJ2hcPOfaOXJ1ZO0VXIBa_35p6a47zEenMhOvXxEXfDXWf8xGnI_aqxLPvn-ahHQ6CajeesiWQ0CWemYbqjpnvNZ_jcLT0ugiZyKezxMiS74qwyVpu8rXCKuFHJ_zuQ%3D%3D)

TO THE LADIES OF THE VIEW>>**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5fd05e5618324331be4dbb9593a8b424&_e=HXvdf6qhA-O3nV4T92_EFVcH6bZyNBjcLrmB3cVez5R7AM26mlZmh1fS_-2CZhqIav-ZMhpqGz9-dU_mmwfEDj4Qs-6qMpuWpU4Oqo-5mjFZbT44FmDUu-TIvhw4oUKnDIFJtDHCM5mT4b0caZ5A9TWzwvgaVUP3VsXJOlxkbf5Pv26GKJUVvOmlTI0K2iGhxEOa2l3u5JyAqnd82f01yGkLUocQ-KIOKPyAlYf2o1jU0yhrWfdDT4EDa8_0eY_QX3pSCnVCMJTySpvVFgzVX-_FK7lD_s4001fvSJrRDZ8Qw6vYQsn1Ptzpkyw-HMLNX6JFDS_0tBuwsbkmIsJXp7CJV61mskOI9mFOFvLFw7NA5ZtRzzkZzGf3quvUfoNVXScH-RjbwWCXhHgZw_PNe-9b0LbOz1ZnciRHM3-YrexaLS1AdiL6HZDWSqhvjTcgbKpmAH7GGhM9FqoViTamGg%3D%3D)

Fellow American, my name is Rod Dorilás and I’m not an oxymoron. I’m a trained lawyer, military veteran, 1st generation American and **proud Black Republican**. I’m a free thinker and advocate for smaller government, a robust judicial system and free and fair elections. **I believe that everyone should have the opportunity to hear the arguments both sides make to win over votes and that no one’s support** – regardless of race – should be assumed by Democrats or Republicans.

Fellow American, it’s impossible to deny that there isn’t enough African American representation in the modern Republican Party. **[That’s exactly why I’m running for Congress for a House seat representing Florida](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5fd05e5618324331be4dbb9593a8b424&_e=HXvdf6qhA-O3nV4T92_EFVcH6bZyNBjcLrmB3cVez5R7AM26mlZmh1fS_-2CZhqIav-ZMhpqGz9-dU_mmwfEDj4Qs-6qMpuWpU4Oqo-5mjFZbT44FmDUu-TIvhw4oUKnDIFJtDHCM5mT4b0caZ5A9TWzwvgaVUP3VsXJOlxkbf5Pv26GKJUVvOmlTI0K2iGhxEOa2l3u5JyAqnd82f01yGkLUocQ-KIOKPyAlYf2o1jU0yhrWfdDT4EDa8_0eY_QKuDCqIeSUK-JFEccw33pYT9zYB3Nm1qsnz7eYXzkCmDNzXnMyE-UnEs7DwkpRTJXkrenZoUPe9tkaD6LwmRNeu0qqm3r-WgtCj2s1ZmqxwQPvjgkzbf6sOKw2bxYRiI8P8u1KMh56MdbOjaMI-JuAtk2gI2ix1XLDt_dqqa3ucfnyqq46d0wb30i9uODfstp3MTs2B0li7oHpoJVOmXfVg%3D%3D)**. I know money is tight for a lot of folks right now, but today I’m writing to see if you’d **[help me send a message to the ladies of “The View”](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5fd05e5618324331be4dbb9593a8b424&_e=HXvdf6qhA-O3nV4T92_EFVcH6bZyNBjcLrmB3cVez5R7AM26mlZmh1fS_-2CZhqIav-ZMhpqGz9-dU_mmwfEDj4Qs-6qMpuWpU4Oqo-5mjFZbT44FmDUu-TIvhw4oUKnDIFJtDHCM5mT4b0caZ5A9TWzwvgaVUP3VsXJOlxkbf5Pv26GKJUVvOmlTI0K2iGhxEOa2l3u5JyAqnd82f01yGkLUocQ-KIOKPyAlYf2o1jU0yhrWfdDT4EDa8_0eY_QZEAU3ccylTHSYn3Th7rItvjh97WXc7oYg8X_ZGcPCJhaGi5ySuPg60PxRvdTmeHE1yrBWztQPh8O4NXv-7DyRjDpHOTiI_cOWDLVgGssFOke49zn7gGyKdhVzsWTuZU1Ah5ArlsezqKC3zhM4kPsGVyfzse-lZkdvV-szVtZTV-nxVJUOtFz5m0Keu3yrHZhzt3yyPR2JmWWbkbeX73_jg%3D%3D)** that there are a lot of Black Republicans in the U.S. – and we’re not an oxymoron.

[** HELP ME SEND A MESSAGE
TO THE LADIES OF THE VIEW>>**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5fd05e5618324331be4dbb9593a8b424&_e=HXvdf6qhA-O3nV4T92_EFVcH6bZyNBjcLrmB3cVez5R7AM26mlZmh1fS_-2CZhqIav-ZMhpqGz9-dU_mmwfEDj4Qs-6qMpuWpU4Oqo-5mjFZbT44FmDUu-TIvhw4oUKnDIFJtDHCM5mT4b0caZ5A9TWzwvgaVUP3VsXJOlxkbf5Pv26GKJUVvOmlTI0K2iGhxEOa2l3u5JyAqnd82f01yGkLUocQ-KIOKPyAlYf2o1jU0yhrWfdDT4EDa8_0eY_QYJjj1yu2xJu0nV-dXQtWxYzlk7m_yL8TLLx3INoXAb2oMY1GHSVqh3w4LUIn1MZPpmJ6aadorYgtejD4ySsxNXiNKbVh4y1l9EsPlggF83lTATiXQCGjuNDnZXUDTSf03PD5utYPuyH937Pdoc4zYu-CuyQXg52Xtuu_dHKaIUhLrSpBiWH7s_Aw-vrCqtRKXasHp2C3k-VMiC4b7S60rw%3D%3D)
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5fd05e5618324331be4dbb9593a8b424&_e=HXvdf6qhA-O3nV4T92_EFVcH6bZyNBjcLrmB3cVez5R7AM26mlZmh1fS_-2CZhqIav-ZMhpqGz9-dU_mmwfEDj4Qs-6qMpuWpU4Oqo-5mjFZbT44FmDUu-TIvhw4oUKnDIFJtDHCM5mT4b0caZ5A9TWzwvgaVUP3VsXJOlxkbf5Pv26GKJUVvOmlTI0K2iGhxEOa2l3u5JyAqnd82f01yGkLUocQ-KIOKPyAlYf2o1jU0yhrWfdDT4EDa8_0eY_QBV4k3J4GOGBnV9qC9cXKKmzHwFlacI075g5VoCwodKXN4fTQ99BFiddZV6t9cAVa4C9cztv5Dd5Nm-btaExaeCVLflmfQmxzdm8Tdw18GEQ8_Tiq3DU-rGqwZmjIDsnbSd-XARP4evq2VTAQ5SVntlwfBndEWtl6JvwbG4X8hTHQRL-Qv0YmI4x6tD95llnUQNGPdcA14livCcDH_xAHJA%3D%3D)
I believe that if voters are able to be reached equally by Democrat and Republican campaigns, Republicans would win every time. I won’t deny that my opponent is much more well-funded than I, which is why I’m making this special ask of you today.**[If you could find it in your budget to send $2 ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5fd05e5618324331be4dbb9593a8b424&_e=HXvdf6qhA-O3nV4T92_EFVcH6bZyNBjcLrmB3cVez5R7AM26mlZmh1fS_-2CZhqIav-ZMhpqGz9-dU_mmwfEDj4Qs-6qMpuWpU4Oqo-5mjFZbT44FmDUu-TIvhw4oUKnDIFJtDHCM5mT4b0caZ5A9TWzwvgaVUP3VsXJOlxkbf5Pv26GKJUVvOmlTI0K2iGhxEOa2l3u5JyAqnd82f01yGkLUocQ-KIOKPyAlYf2o1jU0yhrWfdDT4EDa8_0eY_QRW8xH3x1Te69HYMw08CsRzUvYc9-sNiblFT9JWcKeRjGS7uuB7KF2QSjqgXXnl3p8fVKicWfwY0EIi8WaB__Ru7BKDdNmIjN6o1lr78z0uwSMrfIXkppW1HYS7Hg6no1b9OJVc9-y-7seTMLD5R04Ifh0yD5XboUVUzol4KUwsw2_rq054_2QMlf3af1Yl8fFM2dgin_-CHTxfHA0-v8lw%3D%3D)** to my campaign today, I’m certain I can flip this South Florida House seat on behalf of our party.

Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration.

For Country,

Rod Dorilas

[** CHIP IN $2 >> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5fd05e5618324331be4dbb9593a8b424&_e=HXvdf6qhA-O3nV4T92_EFVcH6bZyNBjcLrmB3cVez5R7AM26mlZmh1fS_-2CZhqIav-ZMhpqGz9-dU_mmwfEDj4Qs-6qMpuWpU4Oqo-5mjFZbT44FmDUu-TIvhw4oUKnDIFJtDHCM5mT4b0caZ5A9TWzwvgaVUP3VsXJOlxkbf5Pv26GKJUVvOmlTI0K2iGhxEOa2l3u5JyAqnd82f01yGkLUocQ-KIOKPyAlYf2o1jU0yhrWfdDT4EDa8_0eY_QO8c9PQ94LJogBc7p4glbTOTzwIgghiVcTs0zciZ2ol4WLMBOgbvlwS6WAJ1_bUtwxtXyrJiayaS6t3uILeSDNrpIoQ4h-yB382QGxmkMEoBwH-OfgrV76mTCQ0CFQgTkVsE90vEC5ETj37NAzSIg--uItNLqMvoLaeQG-0JoS5Bwp2PXeXoXEs5Fkbn2mQ8qHNTABgY-GTbZfBhWdmZcTQ%3D%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5fd05e5618324331be4dbb9593a8b424&_e=HXvdf6qhA-O3nV4T92_EFVcH6bZyNBjcLrmB3cVez5R7AM26mlZmh1fS_-2CZhqIav-ZMhpqGz9-dU_mmwfEDj4Qs-6qMpuWpU4Oqo-5mjFZbT44FmDUu-TIvhw4oUKnDIFJtDHCM5mT4b0caZ5A9TWzwvgaVUP3VsXJOlxkbf5Pv26GKJUVvOmlTI0K2iGhxEOa2l3u5JyAqnd82f01yGkLUocQ-KIOKPyAlYf2o1jU0yhrWfdDT4EDa8_0eY_Q_fn8OVi1W85I_Hy7EAZj15KHMP6o6oGypTy2Y8XKdDlw9MEg0yFBhvZIyr6_ZFi0nq9qpXqH6PetFAqONfweSZHOnNvLbC8qXiLksmXytMalY0HnxD11rMlNV2gv9IG6UAs8dct0ixivHne1okb39dcFEXUaT2LMJwajjTI294Tpaw8NfM73Bga7eMXVZI0_G5kzeHjWARuTa1KpsLY-ww%3D%3D)

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

subject: I’m asking for your support

body:
There’s a lot on the line this year, which is exactly why this deadline is so important.

Team,
On May 31, we face our first end-of-month deadline since becoming the Democratic nominee for Ohio governor – **[and we’ve set a goal of raising $10,000 online this week. Chip in now>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45775919/347434738/-1664405127?refcode=nw_em_220526_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDdkMGFlZC0zOGRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4sTrU4pdhNszI25-QsGYCB6lt1hGtiUrQA1hCEUspY4=)**
With our primary over, GOP Governor Mike DeWine and the special interest groups supporting him are going all in on this race. We have to show on our next fundraising report that our grassroots team can compete.
There’s a lot on the line this year, folks, which is exactly why this deadline is so important.
From his ties to the largest corruption scandal in Ohio’s history, to proudly claiming to be the most anti-choice governor in the country, to caving to special interests at every turn, Mike DeWine has proven that he’s not interested in actually serving Ohioans.
**I know we can do better.** I grew up in a working class family and I came to Ohio in search of opportunity. As mayor of Dayton, I fought to bring opportunities back to our city. I know we can do that across Ohio and make our state a place where every working family can thrive.
**[But I need your support. Unlike Mike DeWine, I’m not a millionaire and this campaign is funded by grassroots supporters like you. Chip in before our first deadline of the general election on May 31>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45775920/347434739/-1664405127?refcode=nw_em_220526_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDdkMGFlZC0zOGRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4sTrU4pdhNszI25-QsGYCB6lt1hGtiUrQA1hCEUspY4=)**
Onward,
Nan Whaley

name: Trudy Busch Valentine
subject: this senseless violence must end
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
Peter, as a mother and grandmother, and nurse, I am sickened and devastated by the news of yet another mass shooting. I respect the rights of hunters and the American tradition of responsible gun ownership. But earlier this week, an 18-year-old in shattered the bodies of 19 little children and two teachers with a military-style weapon designed to be used on the battlefield.

The mass shooting in Uvalde comes just days after the Buffalo community was devastated by a hateful shooting targeting Black Americans. This cycle of senseless violence must end. It doesn't have to be like this, Peter. There is a solution.

Voters overwhelmingly support commonsense gun legislation: universal background checks, closing loopholes, and restricting the sale of military-style assault weapons. Americans want this legislation because we know that it would say countless lives, like the innocent children ripped away from their families. But career politicians and the gun lobby continue to stand in the way, obstructing change against all morals and all reason.

Heartbroken parents across America are counting on Washington to stand up and lead before the next shooting. I promise to do everything I can to stop these horrific, heartbreaking tragedies.

In the Senate, I will be a leader on gun violence prevention and will support efforts to end the filibuster in order to pass meaningful legislation to make all of our communities safer.

Change is possible, but only if we remain hopeful and continue to put in the hard work this moment demands of us. As a nurse, as a mother, as a grandmother, I couldn't care more deeply about this issue. I promise to remain hopeful and dedicated to delivering solutions. Thank you for believing that we can and will win a safer, better future.

Thank you,

Trudy Busch Valentine

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/5sNAQQN7RUy0KByOPWpWlQ2?unsubscribedata=0sbOVWH1SSjjfQi6SCWhljnVnFmiQeIaPyd6APCUlHsdiF32Yu5BztUOvtp5hTkqc94q5LyJ3H%2F%2BPpw9lgdADhXQlk1PdTx7r36ZDiLM8jC14H7piQS9FlMm1y7KNpVh%2BVd0navgHdA28RjMRAaBf0%2Fp6mWCbdbOGOHXhfrCIOyAcdtSf3qrMuzTCG6aquvfrwdZqPttIPCZWbnxy3nvKt7mEuFL6P3QR%2FPNVj6Duakb2LUF4goHs7vOIL43d3d8ifsAOG%2B7IGm%2Fd6QOTw0PwjpMItfB%2FJqWdI8VMOaA3YZq7K%2BtFTaSv%2BghNW4cwF9z4XuSUXKgwn5JB0x%2FYZM61PttcSmVgcxNGYM9hBBI2k3op9WTalPKtY1c3e9TLAcDsw60X4i%2BR4NpiMvACnF8l53mPKYrFgu4YXTN2mr9MuE%3D

Peter, the votes are in! We’re going to a runoff election on Tuesday, June 21st – which is only a few weeks away!
Thank you to everyone who helped us get to this point. We could not have done it without you!
Our team is using all the momentum we have but it’s going to take everything we’ve got to persuade voters to show up to the polls again so we can secure the Democratic nomination on June 21st.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringrunoff?refcode=whem0526 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringrunoff?refcode=whem0526]
Wade's post-election interviews with local news stations WTOC and WJCL.
"As a first-time candidate, I am excited to continue the fight in the runoff. We are giving the people and the families of this district a different option, rather than sending the same candidate who was unsuccessful in 2 prior election cycles. We are as motivated as ever to fight for the families of Georgia's First District.” - Wade Herring
We need to contact as many voters as possible in the little time we have before Election Day – which requires resources. Can you chip in today to set us on the right path to victory in June? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringrunoff?refcode=whem0526]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringrunoff?refcode=whem0526]

While South Carolinians are suffering with teacher shortages, rising costs, and more, Henry McMaster is focused only on scoring political points by introducing dangerous legislation.

He’s promised to impose an even stricter abortion ban with _zero exceptions_ — _including in cases of rape or the woman losing her own life._

**Reproductive rights will be up to the states and we need a pro-choice governor to stop radical bans on reproductive healthcare.

Joe will veto any bill to restrict reproductive rights, which is why we chose it as the theme of his BRAND NEW pro-choice TV ad.**

**[Our last deadline before the primary is in just a few days and our team needs to raise $20,000 to keep our ads on the air. Today’s Joe’s 40th birthday and I know nothing would make him happier than making a big dent in that goal. Will you chip in $25 now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45776237/347436176/80455362?amount=25&contactdata=Q0PwKpWhferShKO1k4r5Y7eNkHHByWcxj9SOlPcEeSaH%2FTTitrVjjr6UuAOJXc4l0R7QGKCStQxWfUM7dGxI518RTwj7g9P%2FYIDIv1Fhb8E%3D&source=JC_EM_FR_3MO_20220526_1_3&utm_source=jc_em_fr_3mo_20220526_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTI2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWFlYmY3Ni0zYWRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4g1KkvXByDTqJW5ju1Am2vVvx8qH4iRhv7A-_Lt1VZI=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

Within the four walls of a doctor’s office, there is not enough room for a woman, her partner, her doctor, and a politician. This should not be a political issue, and politicians should have no role in such intimate, personal decisions.

I believe in Joe and am ready to roll up my sleeves to do whatever it takes to get him elected. I hope you’ll stand with us.

Thanks,

Jade
_Deputy Campaign Manager, Joe for South Carolina_

Wade poised to be overturned, Joe is showing once again that he’s the candidate who will fight for our reproductive rights as governor: = = While South Carolinians are suffering with teacher shortages, rising costs, and more, Henry McMaster is focused only on scoring political points by introducing dangerous legislation. He’s promised to impose an even stricter abortion ban with zero exceptions — including in cases of rape or the woman losing her own life. Reproductive rights will be up to the states and we need a pro-choice governor to stop radical bans on reproductive healthcare. Joe will veto any bill to restrict reproductive rights, which is why we chose it as the theme of his BRAND NEW pro-choice TV ad. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Within the four walls of a doctor’s office, there is not enough room for a woman, her partner, her doctor, and a politician. This should not be a political issue, and politicians should have no role in such intimate, personal decisions. I believe in Joe and am ready to roll up my sleeves to do whatever it takes to get him elected. I hope you’ll stand with us. Thanks, Jade Deputy Campaign Manager, Joe for South Carolina P.S. South Carolinians: Make your plan to vote in June 14’s primary election by | = | | If you'd like to receive only the most important updates from our team, Paid for by Joe Cunningham for South Carolina Joe Cunningham PO Box 21012 Charleston, SC 29413 United States **

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Endorse Pramila!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Together, we will re-elect Pramila, protect the House majority, and elect more people-first progressives.
#
Peter,
Last weekend, Pramila joined supporters and launched her re-election campaign for Washington’s 7th Congressional District.
Since launching, more than 400 grassroots donors have chipped in to our campaign. That gets us off to a strong start as we fight to win our race, protect our majorities in Congress, and elect more people-first progressives to join Pramila in the House.
**Now, we need our grassroots supporters to endorse Pramila’s re-election campaign to show our strength as we undertake critical electoral work.** [**Add your name today to endorse Pramila’s 2022 re-election campaign and our efforts to strengthen our caucus in the House.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/endorse-pramila-2022/?source=em20220526-1297&t=1&akid=1297%2E420207%2EBTUOYx)
**[Endorse Pramila »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/endorse-pramila-2022/?source=em20220526-1297&t=2&akid=1297%2E420207%2EBTUOYx)**
We have a huge task ahead of us in these midterm elections. We’re working to hold on to the House and Senate majorities in a tough election year. Pramila is supporting progressives in crucial primaries, already helping lift Summer Lee, Andrea Salinas, Greg Casar, and Jasmine Crockett to primary victories in 2022.
We have to make our case to voters that our path forward is by electing progressives who will stand with Pramila on Medicare for All, the PRO Act, the Women’s Health Protection Act, bold action on climate change, and canceling student debt. We also must do everything we can to keep the GOP out of power.
The only way we can achieve these things in 2023 and beyond is if we hold our Democratic majority and grow our Congressional Progressive Caucus.
**Let’s show just how many of us are in this movement with Pramila and behind our electoral efforts this year:**
[**Endorse Pramila’s re-election campaign today by adding your name alongside other Team Jayapal supporters.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/endorse-pramila-2022/?source=em20220526-1297&t=3&akid=1297%2E420207%2EBTUOYx)
**[Endorse Pramila »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/endorse-pramila-2022/?source=em20220526-1297&t=4&akid=1297%2E420207%2EBTUOYx)**
Let’s get to work.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220526-1297-footer&t=5&refcode2=1297_420207_BTUOYx&akid=1297%2E420207%2EBTUOYx)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=6&akid=1297%2E420207%2EBTUOYx)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1297%2E420207%2EBTUOYx)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: We've come a long way
body:
When I was elected Governor in 2018, there were 263,000 more Democrats registered in the state of Florida than Republicans.| | | Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this [link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=da56e711993a4a6f8034376ae23c76c5&_t=vVvPGChIZ80oRmXbMxe2V9W0WNtndD4al3zNYqy50fRCzwQMx0-BV_S1ZOrf_IFOdpC3r4eQl8a86b96CRqliVAlITY7mAYlKePO5ScWrw-OtS5mCPSCgVdEbHU7Uwp6msnpTaxKwtykTBgffj4ECw1MzCkVdVjKbpWx9x5CYz4%3D)
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=da56e711993a4a6f8034376ae23c76c5&_e=dDFOgw01IF4o2SndjBtNRy3Ez8Whh2EQ80aSpYG9koP5tdTHdq6HHyt_PJx3k2-0MlZN7uLfZ4TdcOQeCX8Cc4yVqpJAnyJZTdWrgnXNolRfe-wj2nti2_ebemFRN6YuV4GGu-QO6jLqcwcI3ljlJMGKbpF7f505cMiGkmX373CCoPekcrLwaYpCpjc6WRq-kBzzlVSLw7Q43TyJZ9BBVDtzzRUl4BgLtcLnpkyb5lYrjr0BbfLhbLr2riVQIYnFcWp4ZUJ6SDcoOpYFPu3XwCE2VgGxYN6-37UYqcHFj9FoFwlG9Rb_klrmR7Mcw3j4IyVHP_nV7ON_rtHXmVhu6QtSt8zpFK8iQsq-IVujJTW4H933SmCd2GqA97xDhi0nDH-Dwsi1k73HfWOcx2SdAQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter, When I was elected Governor in 2018, there were 263,000 more Democrats registered in the state of Florida than Republicans. Flash forward to now, in 2022, as I write this to you. Last year, for the first time in Florida’s history, Republicans outnumber the amount of registered Democrats – **and we will NEVER go back!** This is a direct result of our freedom-first leadership in the Sunshine State. Since day one, I have advocated for the protection of the God-given individual liberties enshrined in our Constitution. **_[Pledge your support for our freedom-first mission>>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=da56e711993a4a6f8034376ae23c76c5&_e=dDFOgw01IF4o2SndjBtNRy3Ez8Whh2EQ80aSpYG9koP5tdTHdq6HHyt_PJx3k2-0MlZN7uLfZ4TdcOQeCX8Cc4yVqpJAnyJZTdWrgnXNolRfe-wj2nti2_ebemFRN6YuV4GGu-QO6jLqcwcI3ljlJMGKbpF7f505cMiGkmX373CCoPekcrLwaYpCpjc6WRq-uXVxJp2NJZBnrV6xdXsxwOO4hJpppXItBXEChNTAJ1sfk_bSzbBG4BGFgqXPOl9NQUj_lv911jqq0AoFD-3u_yTEx428B-dg4YvDFweuCf7QFxNdqzXFdM6YWSFhxIkY_twv_o_m7I-d5fwklXKiwzJLBaU2MPaLoHImU76VvT1peyTzTjO0c1r4f4VuzqFagmNTuJCyt4pfvXb_8bhIbA%3D%3D)_** I decided to run for Congress because of the same idea: what Obama and his cronies were doing was totally inconsistent with the founding of our country and our constitutional principles. I could write pages worth of examples from the Obama era, and now the Biden administration, in which liberal elites in Washington acted in their own self-interest rather than for those whom they were elected to _represent_. Perhaps the most recent example is the _entire year 2020_. Today, millions of Americans look to Florida as freedom’s vanguard because, for the last two years, we have stood strong against the dishonest, left-wing media, Big Tech Oligarchs, and lockdown Democrats, keeping Florida open and free. _**_[These are accomplishments I’m proud of, and I could use your help to keep going.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=da56e711993a4a6f8034376ae23c76c5&_e=dDFOgw01IF4o2SndjBtNRy3Ez8Whh2EQ80aSpYG9koP5tdTHdq6HHyt_PJx3k2-0MlZN7uLfZ4TdcOQeCX8Cc4yVqpJAnyJZTdWrgnXNolRfe-wj2nti2_ebemFRN6YuV4GGu-QO6jLqcwcI3ljlJMGKbpF7f505cMiGkmX373CCoPekcrLwaYpCpjc6WRq-gpWzDa-iRqAJM5DdunfzQga_GkZBFipoY7Wk2_QopEU87valfTQQiRRkrkny4n_aDN5gpXROxRthED-STYcdIGnTQlNbM4PU3qFp1p2KTvR5ugP5qaFxuxKUp2r8F-1U_eErUET2Y-LeXU9berB744anhbAxieAurbuegV9DrOr1svaLRbjLs7m_c3-_yaIpoYMd7SrPSE0ADkf5GQmtyw%3D%3D)_**_ I remember the summer of 2020 distinctly, Florida stood virtually alone in refusing to shut down our schools. In fact, I remember how viciously _attacked_ I was for it. I was right. They were proven wrong. A fact the Biden administration simply cannot stand. **My promise to you is this** : as long as I am Governor, _we will never let the state of Florida descend into a Faucian dystopia in which our freedoms are curtailed_. We will lead so that others may follow. **__[Will you stand with us?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=da56e711993a4a6f8034376ae23c76c5&_e=dDFOgw01IF4o2SndjBtNRy3Ez8Whh2EQ80aSpYG9koP5tdTHdq6HHyt_PJx3k2-0MlZN7uLfZ4TdcOQeCX8Cc4yVqpJAnyJZTdWrgnXNolRfe-wj2nti2_ebemFRN6YuV4GGu-QO6jLqcwcI3ljlJMGKbpF7f505cMiGkmX373CCoPekcrLwaYpCpjc6WRq-lUcviU-rK0zF2qYqjXnkXG04NP-551JYArWRyNDbI_GWoD8S97jixRBUbR-GCB6E_IzUYJkd-_yra8tCs9e-D8JB0XYa3kxZ29-MVTW4VMJzYFsEJPrNQxgXtDcH4Istnbsglaye0GqDKVb3fFZF-eMsCwPHU1_FhNUlohVkLquIlC5pSif0trZHyGJHdpHo4XgG3sB5B-5Y1VHK5SRfNA%3D%3D)__** If we had bent a knee to the Biden administration and not stood strong against vaccine passports, sanctuary cities, and “catch and release” policies for illegal aliens, our Florida economy would not be booming like it is today. In my next term, I will continue to stand strong against wokeness (aka cultural Marxism) as their cadres try to censor, intimidate, and cancel anyone who disagrees with Biden’s radical agenda. **In 2022, we will keep Florida free, grow our economy, lead the nation in job growth, and reject unconstitutional mandates handed down by the federal government._[Will you chip in now and stand with us?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=da56e711993a4a6f8034376ae23c76c5&_e=dDFOgw01IF4o2SndjBtNRy3Ez8Whh2EQ80aSpYG9koP5tdTHdq6HHyt_PJx3k2-0MlZN7uLfZ4TdcOQeCX8Cc4yVqpJAnyJZTdWrgnXNolRfe-wj2nti2_ebemFRN6YuV4GGu-QO6jLqcwcI3ljlJMGKbpF7f505cMiGkmX373CCoPekcrLwaYpCpjc6WRq-CKmZxkQRfDX3NLXueHCn3iiYVicrJRIeFLiZ2mvhL3OyjeagZDFYZWNLWQoFzZY7WaY5CDoiQTP-lOOHXh0DHyRZDVHho4QD6mgtDFzfIGlgB0dsC1NZnlUI7sGzeACFEfnribPgSMR0-XbcISjkgiHoKiLTkluln9B4YWg-6Y769hPVTc9YvFwlT2Mynt1d8chciVHtZIluxRK8IUs06g%3D%3D)_** As excited as I am to continue to serve Florida in this way, I cannot do it without your help and support. That’s why I am depending on a small number of carefully selected patriots who are willing and able to step up and make an extraordinary difference as I prepare to take on each day’s new challenges. I was a political outsider when I won my first campaign for Congress – _and I still consider myself one now_. **I’m running for reelection because I love freedom and seek to protect it in Florida.** I’ve shown the liberal media I’m willing to fight for what I love and what I believe in. Together, we can win again and keep up the fight for America’s future. **_[Will you join me?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=da56e711993a4a6f8034376ae23c76c5&_e=dDFOgw01IF4o2SndjBtNRy3Ez8Whh2EQ80aSpYG9koP5tdTHdq6HHyt_PJx3k2-0MlZN7uLfZ4TdcOQeCX8Cc4yVqpJAnyJZTdWrgnXNolRfe-wj2nti2_ebemFRN6YuV4GGu-QO6jLqcwcI3ljlJMGKbpF7f505cMiGkmX373CCoPekcrLwaYpCpjc6WRq-hU0qGN5V-dOWhxxLL__nDVubBxTV9aoEzEVQEHpeUNaf69ZsAXmuqx970yNFz3_RM4PPFrrOTE5iUwK0OhB5H1mLMcQNQEZ-sXVjWIb5RK7nSt20NVvMUiLuANWv8cdpXln0SNSal18V8OprI-LyUsip4w7d30su8OROROKmYT4DUyF8DbHOH2pMWSWg5qIOuBCJf2_EpBAnG77QNdv9lg%3D%3D)_** Sincerely,
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=da56e711993a4a6f8034376ae23c76c5&_e=dDFOgw01IF4o2SndjBtNRy3Ez8Whh2EQ80aSpYG9koP5tdTHdq6HHyt_PJx3k2-0MlZN7uLfZ4TdcOQeCX8Cc4yVqpJAnyJZTdWrgnXNolRfe-wj2nti2_ebemFRN6YuV4GGu-QO6jLqcwcI3ljlJMGKbpF7f505cMiGkmX373CCoPekcrLwaYpCpjc6WRq-uG2jcJTxWj3N1Fe6BqP_djSHLRST89zer1H30LIiKeqsCvQw5SC1HMm_P5wzU6DZ-dxP4ND2lr5xxo443paV5ClvNodOwhl3lA-vqoBpcyCVTHj6EkOpFNJKLfUkzaUPRDq7IITDVa-Cu1zCKC2fw2Rum1sbJ4CUwkmIqQIfrIz-wGhKt6-ZwcP2pAaAkylkze1rF_40tQB_zRemo6qHGA%3D%3D)
---
|
---
| | Ron DeSantis __
---
[**JOIN THE FIGHT**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=da56e711993a4a6f8034376ae23c76c5&_e=dDFOgw01IF4o2SndjBtNRy3Ez8Whh2EQ80aSpYG9koP5tdTHdq6HHyt_PJx3k2-0MlZN7uLfZ4TdcOQeCX8Cc4yVqpJAnyJZTdWrgnXNolRfe-wj2nti2_ebemFRN6YuV4GGu-QO6jLqcwcI3ljlJMGKbpF7f505cMiGkmX373CCoPekcrLwaYpCpjc6WRq-9Ywb9b2ywhOXbpi9866T96IHxhH8FJC5zTdZrDlDMs_mWER5fQHt84L6TZQrxPNJ66LkcIEE5id-n1Lxqsc8ScYVXRZufe7-Iac7YwtNi0G01hBVeB0yVrCqXRoaBtgcbnj_EMmOlqMIuLzdjD8n3DgLWQrzuSOyiGInUB_49glyaXwoaT4vAn8LgsDIGj3q36Gw-SGUWwsrGwNQJWws9A%3D%3D)

name: JB Pritzker
subject: Dangerously unfit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JB for Governor
body:
|
---
Friend — At this week's primary debates, the Republicans running for governor showed just how dangerously unfit they are to lead Illinois.

They told a lot of lies about my record, but it's what each of my opponents said so _matter-of-factly_ that should concern voters most. **Every one of them would push to ban abortion if elected.** And you know they'll be beholden to the same far-right backers who gave us years of dysfunction under Bruce Rauner.

Look, I'm ready to take on whoever emerges from this mess as the GOP nominee, and I want to make sure you'll be standing right there with me.

**Will you do your part to defeat the right-wing extremists running for Governor?** | | [Yes](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45776411/347437084/32112680?contactdata=ZTDTE6UhrrjiWCZfdQ2MgB%2BtOeoZ%2FxnhDst7%2BlWja7grC%2F8ZvXMFtRTP4ylVZzheytPzMxdgy%2BZE1ZtxlKMCMm7ozAx5AkGNBu%2B4fYmsf%2FyCUe6FBRbByF6sOncFDOoc%2FfrY4jZEgsKjUzh8L%2FxmnA%3D%3D&utm_source=yes_button&utm_campaign=20220526_jb_gop_primary_debates&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTM1OTYxZC0zYmRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RV6cjelcPGQzLNpgqVakaBDzcTqZhxMpIaMet6FA0Zc=&emci=7635961d-3bdd-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=7a35961d-3bdd-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=13891383)

We've delivered some giant wins for Illinois, from raising the minimum wage to expanding health care coverage to enacting the largest infrastructure program in state history.

Let's not drop the ball now and give the GOP an opening to take power and kick working families to the curb.

clean_body: | Friend — At this week's primary debates, the Republicans running for governor showed just how dangerously unfit they are to lead Illinois. They told a lot of lies about my record, but it's what each of my opponents said so matter-of-factly that should concern voters most. Every one of them would push to ban abortion if elected. And you know they'll be beholden to the same far-right backers who gave us years of dysfunction under Bruce Rauner. Look, I'm ready to take on whoever emerges from this mess as the GOP nominee, and I want to make sure you'll be standing right there with me. Will you do your part to defeat the right-wing extremists running for Governor? | | | We've delivered some giant wins for Illinois, from raising the minimum wage to expanding health care coverage to enacting the largest infrastructure program in state history. Let's not drop the ball now and give the GOP an opening to take power and kick working families to the curb. Thanks, JB | | | Sign up for SMS updates: text JB to 80467. body:
Now is the time to fight.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45776491/347437286/292184910?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDdhMzMwNi0zYmRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CD2jwEa6lek0_EqONZ5BnQD39uv-TgEcg0DGR-VjVjg=)
