I want to take a moment to talk about something serious, and tell you a bit about our campaign and why I'm asking you to support us if you are also pro-choice.

_Any day now,_ the Supreme Court will rule on reversing _Roe v. Wade._

The stakes couldn’t be higher, because if the Supreme Court decides to shred decades of progress for women in this country and our reproductive freedom, Congress becomes our only line of defense.

**Our district, IL-13, is one of the very few pick-up opportunities in the country for Democrats to hold onto their razor thin majority in the House** Far-right Republicans know this, so they’re going to bury us in attack ads if we don’t have the resources to fight back.

**I'm a proud pro-choice Democrat.** I was once an intern with Planned Parenthood, and that experience showed me just how important it is to have access to safe abortion and reproductive healthcare.

**But my GOP opponents have proudly announced that they want to see Roe v. Wade reversed, and they support horrific forced-birth policies. It's outrageous and dangerous.**

I'm determined to beat them and fight with pro-choice Democrats in Congress, but here's the truth: Without your financial support today, we could lose IL-13 – _and our majority in the House._

I need your help today to fight back and keep right-wing extremists from reclaiming Congress. We can’t afford the consequences of a loss in this must-win district.

[**I know we’re devastated that we're _still_ fighting for our rights today, but now is the time to fight. So please — will you chip in $3 to my campaign today to elect pro-choice Democrats to Congress in November? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45776495/347437292/161715760?amount=3&refcode=NBFC_20220526_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDdhMzMwNi0zYmRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CD2jwEa6lek0_EqONZ5BnQD39uv-TgEcg0DGR-VjVjg=) | [CHIP IN $3 TO ELECT PRO-CHOICE DEMOCRAT NIKKI BUDZINSKI »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45776496/347437295/161715760?amount=3&refcode=NBFC_20220526_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDdhMzMwNi0zYmRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CD2jwEa6lek0_EqONZ5BnQD39uv-TgEcg0DGR-VjVjg=)

Democrat Nikki Budzinski is running for Congress in Illinois' 13th District. This district is currently in Republican hands, and is by far one of the most competitive in the entire country.

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

clean_body: Now is the time to fight. | = I want to take a moment to talk about something serious, and tell you a bit about our campaign and why I'm asking you to support us if you are also pro-choice. Any day now, the Supreme Court will rule on reversing Roe v. Wade. The stakes couldn’t be higher, because if the Supreme Court decides to shred decades of progress for women in this country and our reproductive freedom, Congress becomes our only line of defense. Our district, IL-13, is one of the very few pick-up opportunities in the country for Democrats to hold onto their razor thin majority in the House Far-right Republicans know this, so they’re going to bury us in attack ads if we don’t have the resources to fight back. I'm a proud pro-choice Democrat. I was once an intern with Planned Parenthood, and that experience showed me just how important it is to have access to safe abortion and reproductive healthcare. But my GOP opponents have proudly announced that they want to see Roe v. Wade reversed, and they support horrific forced-birth policies. It's outrageous and dangerous. I'm determined to beat them and fight with pro-choice Democrats in Congress, but here's the truth: Without your financial support today, we could lose IL-13 – and our majority in the House. I need your help today to fight back and keep right-wing extremists from reclaiming Congress. We can’t afford the consequences of a loss in this must-win district. = | = ** GOAL: $5,000 | DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = I can’t win this without you, Nikki | | Paid for by Nikki For Congress P.O. Box 5171, Springfield, IL 62705 www.nikkiforcongress.com Democrat Nikki Budzinski is running for Congress in Illinois' 13th District. name: Dr. Yadira Caraveo
subject: The violence must stop
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
Peter, I am heartbroken over the shooting in Uvalde, Texas. School should be a safe place for kids. But 19 little children — just like the kids I treat in my clinic everyday — lost their lives this week just trying to learn. Nine years ago, 26 children and adults were murdered at Sandy Hook Elementary School. We've heard a lot of thoughts and prayers since then — but no real change. There have been 27 school shootings in 2022 and these tragedies continue with no end in sight. As a pediatrician, I’m committed to saving lives and providing thoughtful care; and that includes supporting gun violence prevention. This is a public health emergency that needs addressing as urgently as COVID-19 and any other epidemic. Because we **do** have an epidemic of gun violence in this country. **The violence must stop. Congress must address the gun violence epidemic. We need sensible federal gun violence prevention legislation, now.** May we have some relief soon. Dr. Yadira Caraveo

---
| Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests.

Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation.
---

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Government spending must end
body:
Our future depends on it
| | | |
---
|
---
|
# We must work to end our government's spending
---
|
---
|
---
| As Progressive Radicals continue to seek ways to spend mountains of money while making more and more Americans wholly dependent on government, the effects have become obvious.
The largest jump in inflation has overwhelmed our economy. And, while Democrats, and especially Biden, pound the message that no one who makes less than $400,000 will see their taxes go up, the fact that inflation is outpacing wages presents a de facto hidden tax that effects working class Americans far more than the wealthy.
Anyone who buys food, pumps gas into their cars and trucks, or ALMOST ANYTHING, is effectively paying a new and growing tax. Increased prices, coupled with the devaluation of the US dollar, hurt the lowest wage earners most of all. All but the wealthiest Americans are feeling the pain.
The government will raise interest rates to try to reduce inflation, but this has secondary effects. Increased inflation will make buying a home or car more expensive. Home sales will likely decrease and for families who want to sell their homes, there will be fewer buyers willing to take on increased debt at a higher interest rate in times of unprecedented economic uncertainty. That is, if you're fortunate enough to own a home. Many are simply worried about feeding their families with the ever-increasing cost of groceries.
The painful effects on the American people won't end with a simple easing of inflation. The monumental spending in Washington adds to a burgeoning debt that will be left for future generations to try to overcome. As a nation we've become like a teenager living on credit cards who continues to take on new cards to cover living expenses while barely making the minimum payments. At some point, the teenager must reconcile the debt or go bankrupt. It's a scary road our corrupt politicians have put us on.
Chief among the long-term remedies for inflation is ending the free-wheeling spending in Washington. I intend to fight the criminal levels of government spending. I will stand fast against gimmicky plans, such as Build Back Better, that are essentially programs to buy votes and launder money back to corrupt donors and special interests..
We must reduce the reckless spending in virtually every department, concentrate on our Constitutional duties, and push out the corrupt forces at work in our Nation's capital that see to extract evermore money from your pockets to be wasted without oversight on pet projects that do not serve the American people.
Donate to my campaign today. Together, we will put common sense into our government and save our economy before it's too late.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
|

## About Aadland For Congress
---
| |
---
| Erik's effort to represent Colorado District 7 (CD7) is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive; no generations of beer barons or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. Volunteers and professionals began joining the cause to help send Erik to Washington in March of 2021. Staff personnel now cross the spectrum of political pundits, professional people, friends and neighbors.
You can stand with Erik by contributing to our cause. We can't do it alone, but together we can do anything.
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qcNnV9k8lz5XT7IeyX_RuM2M6sENvLGQErhcYO0eHbuE6v8K0dJMlEenBMiSkWyPngC1aqeVMLCEeXETLuKXgjR0nv30Fj0tFmynwcpnn_2PilUsolQ0ywQg7ptWlv1PNUilsyBVRIMXe5wG5-_Ghw==&c=MVwyWqCem15Gg8HK7pOES2PQxlFBi9IKqcQSR6eiDgdEagnD5umOIw==&ch=TtVhWm42elVyJ19PxhnJbArcfEYeiA0dmByJnMW10ndRTVCOfj9moA==)

| Please use the button below to provide your financial support and help insure Erik Aadland is our Republican candidate to the U.S. House of Representatives
---
| [Donate Today](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qcNnV9k8lz5XT7IeyX_RuM2M6sENvLGQErhcYO0eHbuE6v8K0dJMlISKwuG4caXTgk6maqe1sFitlxATyfcSi9ubWcf_F6lvlsiUx6uYaGn8tufRb-TCPNCPXSmXqtoM8oLS3qOUsD_97TZNyoq3QP8Tlu5bqZwPtpkCiVX2BiapOGf-TfuhXzEyCPufwc--&c=MVwyWqCem15Gg8HK7pOES2PQxlFBi9IKqcQSR6eiDgdEagnD5umOIw==&ch=TtVhWm42elVyJ19PxhnJbArcfEYeiA0dmByJnMW10ndRTVCOfj9moA==)
---
|
---
|
## About Erik
---
| |
---
| Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being energy-independent and a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children.

name: Leo, Deputy Campaign Manager
subject: Thanks to your support we won our primary and Charles became the first Black U.S. Senate Democratic nominee to run in Kentucky.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, I’m so proud
of this movement.

This past month, we’ve made enormous progress in our fight to replace Rand
Paul and elect a real working-class champion to the U.S. Senate. Thanks to
your support we won our primary and Charles became the first Black U.S.
Senate Democratic nominee to win in Kentucky.

Together, we’re sending a loud message to the establishment, media, and
media pundits that a powerful grassroots movement is rising up in
Kentucky. Together, we are proving that Kentucky is more than just a “red
state.” Together, we’re showing the world that Kentuckians are hungry for
leaders who are willing to fight for bold solutions like Medicare for All
and student debt cancellation.

Our momentum is stronger than ever. But my job is to be
realistic, Peter:
There’s a long uphill battle still ahead of us to send Charles to the
Senate.

Rand Paul is the number #1 recipient of donations from the gun lobby this
year and his other billionaire friends are helping out to make sure Rand
can continue doing their bidding in the Senate.

That’s why I’m reaching out to ask for your help. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220526?refcode=em20220526-1975&t=1001&refcode2=1975_346206_la3lkW&akid=1975%2E346206%2Ela3lkW ]Will you chip
in $5 to help us raise $500,000 by the end of the month and
reach our biggest grassroots fundraising goal yet? Now that we won our
primary we need to raise a record amount of money to jumpstart our general
election campaign.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220526?refcode=em20220526-1975&t=1020&refcode2=1975_346206_la3lkW&akid=1975%2E346206%2Ela3lkW ]Contribute $5

I’m going to be honest with you,
Peter.

There’s a lot of people watching to see whether we reach our end-of-month
goal now that Charles won the primary.

Charles has made it clear he’s ready to fight for a future where we all
have the same quality health care that politicians do. Where it’s not just
the billionaires who have money in their pockets and a gainful life. Where
poverty is a thing of the past.

His people-first message is catching on fire and it’s catching the
attention of Rand Paul and his Republican friends in the Senate too. They
know if this momentum continues to grow — we have a real chance at
expanding our majority in the Senate and turning this swing state blue in
2022. And that terrifies them.

It’s why Rand is raising as much money as he can from his friends in the
gun lobby and Big Pharma.

We’re relying on donations from emails like this one to power our movement
so we can transform the future of Kentucky and make sure this swing state
turns blue in 2022. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220526?refcode=em20220526-1975&t=1021&refcode2=1975_346206_la3lkW&akid=1975%2E346206%2Ela3lkW ]Can you make a donation toward our $500,000
grassroots fundraising goal? We’ll remember you as one of our earliest
supporters who helped build this historic movement to turn Kentucky blue.

Together we will channel our anger into action this election.

– Leo, Deputy Campaign Manager

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220526-1975-footer&t=1022&refcode2=1975_346206_la3lkW&akid=1975%2E346206%2Ela3lkW

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1975%2E346206%2Ela3lkW

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Our nation’s schools should be the safest places in our communities
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=284%2E5257348%2EncXoOz ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek —

Our nation’s schools should be the safest places in our communities, full
of learning, fun and happy memories.

They should not be places of horror and nightmares.

Tuesday’s school shooting in Texas is now the third deadliest school
shooting in modern U.S. history, behind only Virginia Tech and Sandy Hook.

Speaking is still physically difficult for me, but my feelings are crystal
clear: I am furious.

I am furious with those who have the power to act and save lives but are
afraid to do anything to end this uniquely American epidemic.

I know there are members of Congress who are afraid of what will happen if
they cross the gun lobby and vote for any piece of gun safety legislation.

But I also know that fear is nothing like the fear those children in Texas
felt as their lives and the lives of their classmates ended in a hail of
bullets.

Or the fear the parents must have felt when they were alerted that there
was an active shooter situation happening at their kids' school.

Senator Chris Murphy said it best to his colleagues in the Senate, “What
are we doing?”

Congress knows how to solve this problem.

Congress knows the steps we can take to protect our kids in their
classrooms.

They know because this is the only country in the developed world where
this kind of slaughter happens on a routine basis.

They just need the courage to act.

And if they do not act, then we must elect a Congress that will.

Listen, Adam Schiff has been a leader in the fight to make our communities
safer from gun violence, and I am proud to stand with him in this fight.
But we cannot do this alone. We need your help to get it done.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_giffords?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220526_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&refcode2=284_5257348_ncXoOz&akid=284%2E5257348%2EncXoOz ]Please split a $10 contribution between my work at Giffords PAC to
change our gun laws and Adam’s campaign to protect the House where
Democrats will continue to lead on the fight to make our communities safer
from gun violence.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Giffords PAC and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_giffords?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220526_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&t=1005&refcode2=284_5257348_ncXoOz&akid=284%2E5257348%2EncXoOz ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Congress Derek — Our nation’s schools should be the safest places in our communities, full of learning, fun and happy memories. They should not be places of horror and nightmares. Tuesday’s school shooting in Texas is now the third deadliest school shooting in modern U.S. history, behind only Virginia Tech and Sandy Hook. Speaking is still physically difficult for me, but my feelings are crystal clear: I am furious. I am furious with those who have the power to act and save lives but are afraid to do anything to end this uniquely American epidemic. I know there are members of Congress who are afraid of what will happen if they cross the gun lobby and vote for any piece of gun safety legislation. But I also know that fear is nothing like the fear those children in Texas felt as their lives and the lives of their classmates ended in a hail of bullets. Or the fear the parents must have felt when they were alerted that there was an active shooter situation happening at their kids' school. Senator Chris Murphy said it best to his colleagues in the Senate, “What are we doing?” Congress knows how to solve this problem. Congress knows the steps we can take to protect our kids in their classrooms. They know because this is the only country in the developed world where this kind of slaughter happens on a routine basis. They just need the courage to act. And if they do not act, then we must elect a Congress that will. Listen, Adam Schiff has been a leader in the fight to make our communities safer from gun violence, and I am proud to stand with him in this fight. But we cannot do this alone. We need your help to get it done. [ ]Please split a $10 contribution between my work at Giffords PAC to change our gun laws and Adam’s campaign to protect the House where Democrats will continue to lead on the fight to make our communities safer from gun violence. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Giffords PAC and Adam Schiff will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT I will not rest until we have righted the wrong our elected officials in Congress have done, and until we have changed our laws so we can finally look our parents in the face and say: we are doing everything we can to keep your children safe. Thank you for standing with me in this struggle. With courage, Gabby Giffords 150 E. name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: What the Democratic Party did in TX-28 is infuriating
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

As we witness the end of Roe v. Wade and one horrific mass shooting after
another, it’s astonishing to see the Democratic Party dump resources into
TX-28 to back an anti-abortion, NRA “A-rated” Democrat. All to stop a
progressive working-class woman of color from bringing her bold vision for
our country to Congress. I’m furious.

It wasn’t just the MASSIVE amount of money (more than $2.5 million) that
Super PACs spent to stop Justice Democrat Jessica Cisneros and protect
conservative Democrat Henry Cuellar. It was also top Democrats like Nancy
Pelosi giving anti-choice Cuellar $23,000.

It was Nancy Pelosi and James Clyburn (the third-ranking Democrat in the
House) doing robocalls for Cuellar. Democratic leadership even showed up
to a rally with Cuellar, just days after the leaked Roe Supreme Court
draft decision.

This race isn’t over. Cuellar leads by 177 votes but there are more votes
to count and very likely a recount coming. The current tiny margin here
makes this all the more enraging,
Peter.

With a margin this small, it’s clear that Jessica could have easily
defeated the one anti-abortion, pro-NRA Democrat in the House if it wasn’t
for the full-throated support of Pelosi and the party establishment in
Washington for Cuellar.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/109827?refcode=em20220526-23554&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=23554%2E1203867%2EFninpd ]Peter, help
us stay strong alongside Jessica as we ensure every vote is counted in
TX-28. Contribute $3 right now so we can take on the
corporate Democratic Party’s all-out effort to stop our progressive fight.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/109827?refcode=em20220526-23554&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=23554%2E1203867%2EFninpd ]Contribute

The priority of the Democratic Party should NOT be to stop progressive
candidates. It should NOT be doing the bidding of Wall Street, Big Oil,
and corporate mega-donors. It should be working to pass progressive
legislation that delivers people the support and relief that we
desperately need.

Instead, Democratic Party leadership spends its time fighting progressives
harder than they fight Republicans and fascists who are trying to tear
apart our democracy and strip women of rights over their own bodies.
Pelosi and the Democratic establishment went all-in for a candidate that
opposes core planks of the Party — abortion rights, worker rights, gun
violence prevention, fighting climate change, etc. — rather than allow a
fair primary between Jessica and Cuellar.

The Democratic Party would rather light money on fire for an anti-abortion
Democrat than use it towards keeping the Democratic majority.

As AOC said, Congress shouldn’t be an incumbent protection racket —
especially when the incumbent is against protecting abortion rights and
against stronger gun laws to reduce the rampant gun violence in this
country.

Not only did the political establishment throw $2 million at Jessica from
AIPAC (the same group that tried and failed to defeat Justice Democrat
Summer Lee with $3 million). The establishment had at least $750,000 from
Democratic mega-donor Reid Hoffman’s “Mainstream Democrats PAC.”

But Cuellar isn’t even a “mainstream Democrat.” He helped thwart President
Biden’s Build Back Better Act, another piece of legislation that Pelosi
supported and Cuellar opposed. Why would Pelosi back Cuellar with money
and robocalls?

It’s because the chief mission of party leaders and corporate donors is to
stop progressive change that threatens the status quo. They don’t want
more Justice Democrats in Congress who will fight to deliver Medicare for
All and a Green New Deal for the people. For the Democratic Party, it’s
corporate profits over the people.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/109827?refcode=em20220526-23554&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=23554%2E1203867%2EFninpd ]We need to keep fighting back and adding to our JD bloc in
Congress,
Peter. So, can you fuel our
fight against the Democratic establishment with a donation of
$3 today?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/109827?refcode=em20220526-23554&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=23554%2E1203867%2EFninpd ]Contribute

We will continue our fight in TX-28, in our next primary in IL-7, where
Kina Collins will take on Pelosi-backed incumbent Danny Davis, and beyond.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas, Executive Director
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=23554%2E1203867%2EFninpd ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=23554%2E1203867%2EFninpd ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220526-23554-footer&t=1026&refcode2=23554_1203867_Fninpd&akid=23554%2E1203867%2EFninpd

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=23554%2E1203867%2EFninpd

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Joe Arpaio- America's Toughest Sheriff
subject: Fwd: We are at a Crossroads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Arpaio for Fountain Hills, Arizona Mayor
body:
Let's make sure we're on the right path. | Hey Fellow American,

I haven’t heard from you yet and we’re really in a bind here with the opposition that we’re up against.

**I really need your support if we’re going to have any chance of beating back the Democrats who are trying to stop us from winning back America.**

Peter,

My name is General Mick McGuire and I’m running against Democrat Mark Kelly in Arizona’s critical Senate race.

Thanks to Kelly and the Senate Democrats woke mob agenda - Americans are suffering. Our border is wide open, violent crime has skyrocketed, Americans are paying $5 a gallon, and inflation is at a record high.

We are in the midst of a fight for our country and we need to elect proven leaders to lead us to victory.

Peter, as a two-star general I’ve fought many battles for our country and WON. I’ve had experience flying F-16s in combat over Baghdad, commanding over 8,300 Arizona National Guard Troops, and protecting our southern border.

When I see a problem, I run towards it, which is exactly why I joined this Senate race. **Mark Kelly** is no different. While he pledged to be YOUR independent voice in the Senate - he has instead chosen to vote strictly along party lines, voting 97.7% of the time with Biden’s agenda and continues to ignore the issues here in Arizona.

**Mark Kelly** voted for Justice Kentanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court - despite her lenient sentences for violent sex offenders.

**Mark Kelly** has ignored the crisis at our border which has allowed hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants to flood our communities and jeopardize our children’s safety.

**Mark Kelly** has refused to act while Americans are suffering from record unemployment and record inflation.

clean_body: As a two-star general I’ve fought many battles for our country and WON. | Peter, My name is General Mick McGuire and I’m running against Democrat Mark Kelly in Arizona’s critical Senate race. Thanks to Kelly and the Senate Democrats woke mob agenda - Americans are suffering. Our border is wide open, violent crime has skyrocketed, Americans are paying $5 a gallon, and inflation is at a record high. We are in the midst of a fight for our country and we need to elect proven leaders to lead us to victory. Peter, as a two-star general I’ve fought many battles for our country and WON. I’ve had experience flying F-16s in combat over Baghdad, commanding over 8,300 Arizona National Guard Troops, and protecting our southern border. When I see a problem, I run towards it, which is exactly why I joined this Senate race. Washington is full of career politicians who put their own ambitions over the people who elected them. Mark Kelly is no different. While he pledged to be YOUR independent voice in the Senate - he has instead chosen to vote strictly along party lines, voting 97.7% of the time with Biden’s agenda and continues to ignore the issues here in Arizona. Mark Kelly voted for Justice Kentanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court - despite her lenient sentences for violent sex offenders. Mark Kelly has ignored the crisis at our border which has allowed hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants to flood our communities and jeopardize our children’s safety. Mark Kelly has refused to act while Americans are suffering from record unemployment and record inflation. Make no mistake - we are in a battle for our country and in order for me to WIN I need your help today. Will you please join my team and contribute any amount and help send a two-star general to Washington to clean up the Democrats mess? For Liberty, Maj. Gen. Michael "Mick" McGuire USAF (Ret.) | Maj. Gen. Michael "Mick" McGuire, USAF (Ret.) has dedicated nearly 38 years of his life to serving our country. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45777409/347441729/-367306429?refcode=20220526_CGVA_Warnock&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2ZjOGZjYy0zZWRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XOM-W6hpG6oKEMxwPVpShnYYb6aFswRpL7Wlj-TYpWY=)

| | Derek, this is important: **Herschel Walker (R) is now officially the GOP nominee for Senate here in Georgia, meaning he and I will be facing off this November.** With the entire GOP establishment behind Walker, keeping this seat and the Senate blue will come down to your grassroots support. So I’m urgently asking: Will you split $25 or more right now between my campaign and CommonGood so we can keep Georgia and the Senate blue? Here’s why your support today couldn’t be more important: CNN is calling me the most vulnerable Democratic senator on the ballot – in the race that experts at FiveThirtyEight say could decide Senate control. **That’s why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the GOP are coming after me as their top target for defeat. Even before the primary, they had already poured nearly $15 MILLION into Walker’s campaign to flip this seat – and now, recent polls show me 1 point down.** With the general election officially here, it’s never been more urgent to fight back against the GOP’s attacks and pull ahead in this must-win race. That’s why we set a rapid-response goal to raise $100,000 by midnight tonight, but right now, we’re dangerously short. The Denver Dems Debate with Neal Walia and Rep Degette.
| | | | Candidates covered topics from Abortion, to Voting Rights and the gun violence that plagues this country. This was an important debate and helped highlight some of the major differences between the two candidates.

At the beginning Neal asks the audience three questions I want to also pose to you: Who are we?
Who do we want to be?
And what are we willing to fight for?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lisa=20Lopez?=
subject: Does life matter to us at all?
body:
Then we must boldly defend it.

http://www.lopez2022.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=d418c428c9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_26_05_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-d418c428c9-584862049

Dear Coloradan,

I planned to make this letter about the baby formula shortage, which has impacted so many moms, dads, and babies across our nation. But in light of the recent tragedy in Uvalde, Texas, I would like to offer a prayer for the affected and an appeal to Colorado to become the state where life is valued at all its precious stages.

My heart is broken for the parents, families, friends, and neighbors who’s arms long for their children who have been taken from our sight in such a cruel and abrupt act of pure hate and chaos. I pray they might find some comfort in the knowledge that those so dearly loved and missed are present with our loving God who can heal all wounds and dry every tear.

Today I will be leading a march in Denver, at the Capital, declaring life over Colorado. While it is focused on the rights of the unborn, it speaks to a greater need for our society to value life in all its stages, especially the undervalued, the children, the elderly, the unborn. My prayer is for us to become a nation who values life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness and understands that these are not mutually exclusive.

I will never stand on the sidelines hoping for a change and as your next First Lady, I challenge us, together, to be brave enough to “be the change we want to see in the world” without fear, without hesitation, but with the same love that can heal all.

Sincerely,
Lisa Lopez

============================================================
** (http://www.lopez2022.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=d418c428c9-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_26_05_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-d418c428c9-584862049)
We are Coloradans who want to freely and responsibly live our best lives. We refuse to be told by so-called experts and politicians how we must live. Together, we can flip the power back to the people by electing a new governor that’s one of us, for all of us. Vote for Greg Lopez, a proven servant leader who puts people over politics to make Colorado the State of Systemic Opportunity for all.

name: Susan Wild
subject: As a mom, my heart is with Uvalde parents.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
It’s long past time for us to pass laws that will keep our families safe.

| Peter,

I first heard the news about the Uvalde tragedy right before a town hall I had already scheduled. It was a gut punch as I thought of how I felt when my own children were in school when Sept. 11th happened, and the terror I felt, wondering where the next attack would be.

This past Tuesday night, I didn’t start the town hall with a moment of silence, as we’ve had too many of those. Instead, I asked my constituents what _**they**_ think we need to do to bring about change. I told them that I had tried to work across the aisle on reasonable gun laws but that not a single Republican in DC took me up on my offer, so I was turning to them, my constituents in a very purple district, for their ideas. What followed was an amazing 45 minute conversation among Democrats and Republicans, and it was clear that their mandate to Congress is: _**get something done.**_

I’m proud to have cosponsored legislation to ban assault weapons like the one used in Uvalde. Over a year ago, I joined my colleagues in the House again to pass legislation that would expand background checks and close dangerous loopholes that allow criminals to get guns — legislation that has not yet been passed by the Senate.

These measures are common sense. Over 90% of Americans, including gun owners, support expanding background checks. It’s long past time for us to pass laws that will keep our families safe.

[_**Will you sign your name and demand Senate Republicans vote to pass lifesaving Universal Background Checks?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45777911/347443876/1185977372?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGI5NjIwYi00MWRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NcbT9VqfqKByO2HsXqMNUQTqYMsw0MA8HAI0gRYCpNE=&emci=d363c857-2bdd-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=edb9620b-41dd-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=5543981)

clean_body: It’s long past time for us to pass laws that will keep our families safe. | Peter, I first heard the news about the Uvalde tragedy right before a town hall I had already scheduled. It was a gut punch as I thought of how I felt when my own children were in school when Sept. 11th happened, and the terror I felt, wondering where the next attack would be. This past Tuesday night, I didn’t start the town hall with a moment of silence, as we’ve had too many of those. Instead, I asked my constituents what they think we need to do to bring about change. I told them that I had tried to work across the aisle on reasonable gun laws but that not a single Republican in DC took me up on my offer, so I was turning to them, my constituents in a very purple district, for their ideas. What followed was an amazing 45 minute conversation among Democrats and Republicans, and it was clear that their mandate to Congress is: get something done. I’m proud to have cosponsored legislation to ban assault weapons like the one used in Uvalde. Over a year ago, I joined my colleagues in the House again to pass legislation that would expand background checks and close dangerous loopholes that allow criminals to get guns — legislation that has not yet been passed by the Senate. These measures are common sense. Over 90% of Americans, including gun owners, support expanding background checks. It’s long past time for us to pass laws that will keep our families safe. | Gratefully, Susan Wild | Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. name: Alessandra Biaggi
subject: Uvalde, TX.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
#
Friends -
Once again, gun violence has forced its way into our schools, leaving devastation, trauma, and tragedy in its wake.
Like all of you, my heart is broken for the 19 young kids and 2 teachers who were killed on Tuesday at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde, Texas. We mourn them and their families, and a community that will never be the same again.
Parents should not have to fear for their children’s lives when they send them to school each morning, and kids should not have to grow up thinking this could happen to them.
How many more of these tragedies must occur until we _actually_ do something about it? How many more parents must suffer the unimaginable pain of losing a child? How many more lives must be lost?
Enough is enough. We cannot accept a country where gunfire can ring out at any moment, whether it’s in a classroom in Uvalde, a grocery store in Buffalo, a nightclub in Orlando, a movie theater in Colorado, or anywhere else.
This is a never-ending nightmare that our country and our government keep allowing to happen, and it must end.
The simple fact is that we can stop so many of these massacres from ever occurring by abolishing the filibuster and passing federal, comprehensive gun safety legislation that will save lives.
Universal background checks, mandatory waiting periods, banning ghost guns, ending immunity for the gun industry and weapons manufacturers — these common sense policies are supported by the majority of people across the political spectrum, and are all already on the books in New York State.
Democrats in Washington have the power to enact all of it at the federal level right now — so long as they have the political courage to do so.
I promise you that I’ll do everything I can in this fight.
In solidarity,
Alessandra Biaggi

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=785%2E59515%2EkD22fR).

clean_body: | | | | Harriet is on the ballot. | ⭐️IT’S OFFICIAL⭐️ HARRIET HAGEMAN IS ON THE BALLOT Peter, Isn’t this great news! It is official, when you go to vote you will see Harriet Hageman with Republican right under her name. Now when you go to vote for Harriet on August 16, you will easily be able to identify who the correct candidate is. To show Harriet how excited we are, we want to get 10,000 signatures in support of her. Will you add your name? | Thanks for all your support! -Carly Campaign Manager Hageman For Wyoming | | | | | DONATE BY MAIL: Hageman for Wyoming P.O. Box 4157, Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003

The news is sickeningly familiar. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45777994/347444473/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ5M_GVP_20220526_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTMxNjMyNi00MmRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vzc9hrTbuNJ6_Tvq_VdscJ7Ey0YGctUwyK0IJaOZDGM=&emci=10ca0a73-33dd-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=49316326-42dd-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=9027908)
---
I’m heartbroken that yet another school has been torn apart by gun violence — this time in Uvalde, Texas. The news is sickeningly familiar. Mass shootings have become all too frequent, including less than two weeks ago in Buffalo, where Black Americans were targeted at a grocery store. And daily gun violence continues to strike people in their homes, on their streets, and at their playgrounds. I’m going to keep doing everything I can to tackle this crisis head on — because thoughts and prayers are not enough. **The American people have been screaming out for action. But Washington hasn’t stepped up. That is a clear sign of a broken political system. I’d like to take a moment to talk about a few areas where I’ll keep pushing to fix the system and make gun reform possible.** **Ending the filibuster:** I was first sworn into the Senate right after 20 first-graders and six educators were massacred at Sandy Hook Elementary School. Democrats and even some Republicans came together to support expanding background checks. But I watched the bill fail, even though it got a majority — 54 votes — because of the filibuster. Since 2020, the House has passed common-sense gun safety reforms. President Biden is ready to sign them into law. But the Senate filibuster rule gives Mitch McConnell’s GOP minority and the NRA veto power over the will of the American people. That cannot stand. **Expanding the Supreme Court:** In the next month or so, the Supreme Court is set to rule on whether to bar states and cities from regulating guns on our streets. And Republicans have packed the Court with a 6-3 supermajority to engineer radical outcomes on issue after issue, from abortion rights to gun safety. To rebalance this institution and ensure that lawmakers can protect their people with basic gun reform, we must add at least four more seats to the Supreme Court. The Constitution gives Congress the clear authority to change the size of the Court, and it’s already been done seven times before. **Supporting gun safety candidates across the country:** Look, I get it — we need action now. We can’t wait until November, and I won’t stop calling for the urgent steps we must take. Voting is not the only answer. But it is a fact that gun violence prevention is on the ballot every single election year, up and down the ticket. I’ll keep working to elect candidates who will do what must be done, from state and local officials who will pass stronger safety measures to U.S. senators who will eliminate the filibuster. I’ve already endorsed dozens of Warren Democrats up and down the ballot for 2022, and I won’t stop fighting by their side. **There’s more we can do — including getting big money out of politics and rooting corruption out of Washington so we can break the NRA’s stranglehold over Congress.** I’ll do everything I can to make it possible for the American people to be heard on this powerfully important issue. Enough is enough is enough. We have got to be able to protect our children and keep our families safe. Elizabeth

_But what do democrats want to do about it?_ **Go easier on violent criminals.**

_In a time when our families are in danger, we need more police on the street and justice being served, not less._

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Please note, I will be speaking about Uvalde, Texas in this email.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

My heart is heavy. The events in Uvalde, Texas on Tuesday are every parent's worst nightmare. My reaction is not just as a representative - it's as a dad. It is beyond words what those families are experiencing. Their community will never be the same.

There have been too many heartbreaking moments of silence in the halls of Congress and not nearly enough moments of action. I voted the bipartisan background checks bill through the House over a year ago as well as a bill to end the Charleston Loophole. **I am with all of you in demanding the Senate end the obstruction and take action on gun safety legislation.**

I am cosponsoring Rep. Lucy McBath's bill to establish a national "Red Flag" law. It will allow family members and law enforcement to obtain an extreme risk protection order to remove access to firearms for those who are a danger to themselves or others. We need to get this done, and I will be voting YES next month when the bill is brought forward.

People should be able to send their kids to school, go to the grocery store, or go to church without having to fear for their lives. But gun violence in our schools has become so commonplace that our children have heartbreakingly dubbed themselves the "mass-shooting generation."

Having met with parents whose kids were killed at Sandy Hook Elementary School, I am committed to seeing this devastation end. I will never stop fighting to protect our kids because we cannot accept this as normal. The time for action is _**now**_.

It's an honor to serve you,

Derek

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/NsPnF52AwOMMPfR20fQU-AwUuzNOV0Nu3hPuV427eUo=/pNC-d6_ULcYwE7HAJroXwwtz2v1xTKlbTdnPV9gb8jY=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/NsPnF52AwOMMPfR20fQU-AwUuzNOV0Nu3hPuV427eUo=/4Duw2O1Ej8wi5Pld3XzBC7uLX1E-HsRfvYStSc2qn1Y=)
---|---
Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
---

People for Derek Kilmer
PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot.

Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/NsPnF52AwOMMPfR20fQU-AwUuzNOV0Nu3hPuV427eUo=/M2ewPIVlWZr008ClaKBul2T1byczqGo-ZOqHN7P_cxI=).

---
Peter

Though we posted strong numbers in our primary election on May 3rd, **we did not reach our goal of picking up the 20,000 endorsements we set out to collect ahead of the vote**.

Some say that our district should be safe for Republicans in November, but with almost half the district as “new territory”, we are not taking any chances. **The way people lose is to forget who they are, where they come from and who they represent.** I’ve seen former colleagues make this mistake before; I made a vow to myself to never become complacent.

So, here we are once again, **six months until Election Day,** and if we learned anything from the Supreme Court leak last week, the entire political landscape can be changed by a single event.

I’m gearing up for the election to safe this country, and **[I would truly appreciate seeing your name on the list of supporters who have personally endorsed me for reelection.](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=789d7d14ece04480a89dbaf91c49f8e5&_e=BeVAlH5If2mvMPvtPdykGU1V3EmvN-p8srp0wu_kc0_HjjADUoNlTAtBbmv_lUCkFMu1kuZTjw3UCA9sFUKAB59ar1rHHfbRiXEB_UNk4pdNEdsO0_44wiBSIyjLAC3aP8kxnKiB2HuaiVG4VzfH2svghML-Bg8dSsXLkcwURiN-RlJQiv_Ax2b0VQe77cQbauDZpKET8089ywnTkBWYzVor5HiNHnSXMSzYZ6-D2b5xeFP1LvAnkF469vSzwnz86zpvSAOjKB8Fjq9PCuW28KPE2pi0kNx_T3S-a5B-6IJKA4A1r3L3s8Tt80QrVaMBGYfSw2GPdBdIDLtLhwTNvzcjUpd7b8RrZ0LKgvf6M_0BJ2NeLZuXy6zJNBc-wbrT3wKqScQ9Pj7er6Bu652UonBHuzSUFhAPnUYbrBk-l1ETLNW6rvCezDME1Yx75GwFAxAndGDyhAB5Sv4a5MzMn1Ju1ae3d_yuSn-asIimDC_TKz_9ysknwmS12CSV4OHoDcu_-p-hhCW3-FvYsTX_9g%3D%3D)** I’m asking if you have the time, please consider doing so today.

[](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=789d7d14ece04480a89dbaf91c49f8e5&_e=BeVAlH5If2mvMPvtPdykGU1V3EmvN-p8srp0wu_kc0_HjjADUoNlTAtBbmv_lUCkFMu1kuZTjw3UCA9sFUKAB59ar1rHHfbRiXEB_UNk4pdNEdsO0_44wiBSIyjLAC3aP8kxnKiB2HuaiVG4VzfH2svghML-Bg8dSsXLkcwURiN-RlJQiv_Ax2b0VQe77cQbauDZpKET8089ywnTkBWYzVor5HiNHnSXMSzYZ6-D2b5xeFP1LvAnkF469vSzwnz86zpvSAOjKB8Fjq9PCuW28KPE2pi0kNx_T3S-a5B-6IJKA4A1r3L3s8Tt80QrVaMBRKr7sqQR25303GiH_Z53_67ztbGNzXrB4gSKZiv7RMWo0MdTsyYDkL_1QuQNTdxUKsnKQ0YDVCw63Q0bdCgpdliFFBtquHAuBU7TU5xwS1J2V27eqmicmc0lF3kwW6ay7gyad2_DUcd1RhJq21nYbOwj55Nw0CvZdgIxShlqOB_vptnfmk5rX6QYDG1BLuYBU7n6awurDTpDX_VEaNcsfQ%3D%3D)

**Please help me reach our goal of finding 20,000 endorsements by the end of this week**. We’re just 1,408 short at the moment, but we’re confident that the hill isn’t too steep.

Let’s get this done. **[Please send your endorsement today.](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=789d7d14ece04480a89dbaf91c49f8e5&_e=BeVAlH5If2mvMPvtPdykGU1V3EmvN-p8srp0wu_kc0_HjjADUoNlTAtBbmv_lUCkFMu1kuZTjw3UCA9sFUKAB59ar1rHHfbRiXEB_UNk4pdNEdsO0_44wiBSIyjLAC3aP8kxnKiB2HuaiVG4VzfH2svghML-Bg8dSsXLkcwURiN-RlJQiv_Ax2b0VQe77cQbauDZpKET8089ywnTkBWYzVor5HiNHnSXMSzYZ6-D2b5xeFP1LvAnkF469vSzwnz86zpvSAOjKB8Fjq9PCuW28KPE2pi0kNx_T3S-a5B-6IJKA4A1r3L3s8Tt80QrVaMB31zc9gHnMLOTdsgg7d_6l1kLgh772TL19jqPfuarcaXvEiI6EkWrvkSsaC_-pALumy3XGDXJnsrXROqK4AM7-VsHpUrOajH9G37a2YYhA1zGb3UqVRxK4hwDd1OTEWXYTEAiHnrMYjBrECayMyXwcUUuJZQbMNI0k-SxwobMx5KWf4vIUtBzMDT_BZrsf70qYj3B8rF38eK3EdqaqF5wpw%3D%3D)**

19 young children. 2 incredible teachers. Gone forever.

And yet, Senate Republicans are STILL holding up critical gun control legislation to stop the next mass shooting. It’s pathetic, cowardly, and incomprehensible.

It breaks our hearts that we can’t turn back the clock and bring those innocent children back. _**But if we can funnel our anger and pain into real action, we can try to stop the next one.**_

Democrat Mark Takano and his Democratic colleagues in the House have already passed significant gun control legislation, including H.R. 8 which would enact more strict background checks (something that over 80% of Americans support!) Now we just need Senate Republicans to get out of the way.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jahmal=20Cole?=
subject: We need change, now.
body:
We have about one month before the election. | | |
#### JUNE NEWSLETTER
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d9fa94d29984/we-need-change-now?e=339f142c50)
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
### A Note from Jahmal:
Ending gun violence is not a new issue to me, and it's not just policy platform, it's personal.

The loss that families in Uvalde, Texas are feeling today is a loss we are familiar with because our leaders have failed to step up time and again. Losing a child is heartbreaking, and to lose them to gun violence is a particular pain because we could have stopped it. We could have stopped it after Sandy Hook, or Santa Fe. We could have stopped it after the Buffalo, NY shooting just 10 days ago. I am so sincerely sorry to anyone who has lost a child, family member or friend to gun violence, because we didn't have to.

As your Congressman, I am going to be the advocate who goes beyond rhetoric about how horrifying this tragedy is, and every other one that has come before it. I have been showing up for our people every day, committed to action, committed to change.

My campaign introduced the [Root Causes of Gun Violence Act](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=d68451274b&e=339f142c50) to bring forward real measures that will help us end gun violence. This is so important to our district and our community, and are only possible because we believe that this can really be the end of gun violence. Whether a school shooting, a drive-by or a white supremacist, we will be the generation that ends gun violence. Yours in service,

Jahmal Cole

clean_body: We have about one month before the election. | | | JUNE NEWSLETTER | | | | | A Note from Jahmal: Ending gun violence is not a new issue to me, and it's not just policy platform, it's personal. The loss that families in Uvalde, Texas are feeling today is a loss we are familiar with because our leaders have failed to step up time and again. Losing a child is heartbreaking, and to lose them to gun violence is a particular pain because we could have stopped it. We could have stopped it after Sandy Hook, or Santa Fe. We could have stopped it after the Buffalo, NY shooting just 10 days ago. I am so sincerely sorry to anyone who has lost a child, family member or friend to gun violence, because we didn't have to. As your Congressman, I am going to be the advocate who goes beyond rhetoric about how horrifying this tragedy is, and every other one that has come before it. I have been showing up for our people every day, committed to action, committed to change. My campaign introduced the to bring forward real measures that will help us end gun violence. This is so important to our district and our community, and are only possible because we believe that this can really be the end of gun violence. Whether a school shooting, a drive-by or a white supremacist, we will be the generation that ends gun violence. Yours in service, Jahmal Cole | | | | JOIN ME | | Please on June 1st! Meet Jahmal, ask questions about the campaign, and send texts to voters in IL-01! Plus, we'll have tacos & drinks for you to enjoy. | Join us for a special screening of "A Tiny Ripple of Hope" documentary about Jahmal's work at My Block My Hood My City on June 13 in Lincoln Square. We'll be hosting director Jason Pavlovoi and Jahmal for a Q&A session after. ! for the 1st Annual 1st District 5K on June 18! Register if you plan to run or would like to sponsor the event. We'll have volunteers available to help you register to vote, find your polling place, and make a plan to get there. | | | GET INVOLVED | Join our volunteers! You can join our virtual textbanks, or knock doors with us on weekends. . | | | | | We're always looking for volunteers! Sign up . Want to host a fundraiser for the campaign? Let's make it happen! Contact us mailto:contact@cole2022.com?subject=Host%20a%20fundraiser!&body=Hi!%20I%20am%20interested%20in%20hosting%20a%20fundraiser%20for%20your%20campaign.%20Let%20me%20know%20how%20we%20can%20make%20this%20happen.. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Friends of Jahmal Cole, All rights reserved.

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Our official GOP opponent: Donald Trump's handpicked candidate, Herschel Walker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend, this is important: **Herschel Walker (R) is now officially the GOP nominee for Senate here in Georgia, meaning he and I will be facing off this November.**
With the entire GOP establishment behind Walker, keeping this seat and the Senate blue will come down to _your_ grassroots support. **So I’m urgently asking:****[Will you split $5 or more right now between my campaign and Jacky Rosen’s so we can keep Georgia and the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45778391/347446031/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1795-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGM5N2RjZC00NGRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FrtIHCj6yC6EmxZuuU7afbqThlI4w-mKeWnp_k9SFBk=)**
Here’s why your support today couldn’t be more important: _CNN_ is calling me the most vulnerable Democratic senator on the ballot – in the race that experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ say could decide Senate control.
That’s why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the GOP are coming after me as their top target for defeat. Even before the primary, they had already poured nearly $15 MILLION into Walker’s campaign to flip this seat – **and now, recent polls show me 1 point down.**
With the general election officially here, it’s never been more urgent to fight back against the GOP’s attacks and pull ahead in this must-win race. **That’s why we set a rapid-response goal to raise $100,000 by midnight tonight, but right now, we’re dangerously short.**
**So please, friend, I’m counting on you:** [**Will you split an urgent donation of $5 or more now so we can defeat Herschel Walker, win in Georgia, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45778392/347446032/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1795-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGM5N2RjZC00NGRkLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FrtIHCj6yC6EmxZuuU7afbqThlI4w-mKeWnp_k9SFBk=)

name: Team Ryan
subject: we’ve still got time to turn it around
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3887%2E3611125%2EbOEybo ][IMG]

Hey folks—I’ve got a classic good news/bad news scenario for
you, and I could really use your help.

Let’s start with the bad news:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13407?t=1007&akid=3887%2E3611125%2EbOEybo ]ActBlue decline

This is a snapshot of the week-to-week dropoff we’ve seen in fundraising
this month. As you can probably imagine, some of us are starting to sweat
a bit—because our first End-of-Month fundraising deadline of the General
Election is less than a week away.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13408?t=1011&amount=25&akid=3887%2E3611125%2EbOEybo ]Before I hit you with the good news, I’m hoping you’ll chip in
$25 to help
get our fundraising back on track before the end of the month.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13408?t=1012&amount=25&akid=3887%2E3611125%2EbOEybo ]Chip in
$25

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13408?t=1013&amount=30&akid=3887%2E3611125%2EbOEybo ]Other Amount

Here’s the good news, team: it only takes a few good days to
turn this whole thing around.

Our network of grassroots donors is the X factor here, and you’re a part
of that—and it’s why we’re counting on you, folks, to make sure
we have what it takes to win.

Tim is ready to go to work for Ohioans in the Senate, but we need to
compete with the GOP’s war chest—Republican JD Vance’s campaign is propped
up with dark money from billionaires who’ve profited at the expense of
hardworking families.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13408?t=1014&amount=25&akid=3887%2E3611125%2EbOEybo ]So, are you ready to chip in to Tim’s campaign so we can defeat JD
Vance and his corporate backers? It’s the only way we’ll flip this
battleground Senate seat and expand our Democratic majority.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13408?t=1015&amount=25&akid=3887%2E3611125%2EbOEybo ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13408?t=1016&amount=50&akid=3887%2E3611125%2EbOEybo ]Donate $50

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13408?t=1009&amount=250&akid=3887%2E3611125%2EbOEybo ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13408?t=1010&amount=30&akid=3887%2E3611125%2EbOEybo ]Other Amount

Thanks, team—I really appreciate your help!

Emily

name: Nikki Fried
subject: I stopped by Sumter County yesterday
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,
Yesterday, I stopped in Sumter County to discuss my Lower Costs, Higher Standards plan for Florida seniors.
And here’s why: I’ve been traveling the state, talking to Florida seniors, and I’ve heard consistently — from people across the political spectrum — that Florida is unaffordable for seniors.
The impact of Florida’s affordability crisis doesn’t hit along party lines. It’s hitting everyone, everywhere, and Ron DeSantis has done nothing to get Floridians the relief they need.
I went to Sumter County, home of the Villages, to reach across the aisle and tell residents my plan to fix the damage DeSantis has done to our state. Because I know that we need to do better by our seniors. If you agree, click here to chip in $20 and support my Lower Costs, Higher Standards plan. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?refcode=526sumter]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?refcode=526sumter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?refcode=526sumter]
My Lower Costs, Higher Standards plan will lower prescription drug prices, improve senior transportation options, cut wait times for senior services, and more — and not a single one of those action items has anything to do with partisanship.
And yet, DeSantis has consistently failed to take action to make Florida more affordable and improve our seniors’ quality of life.
Our seniors are sick of watching DeSantis manufacture a culture war, attack our freedoms, and throw partisan tantrums instead of taking bold action to address the real problems Floridians are facing.
I’m ready to take action on day one, Peter. Click here to chip in $20 and help elect a Governor who will step up and meet this moment. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?refcode=526sumter]
Thank you for your support.
— Nikki
Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor

6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Imani Oakley
subject: Rep. Payne Jr. can pretend all he likes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter —
Rep. Donald Payne Jr. has been going around pretending to be an advocate for housing justice.
Nothing could be further from the truth.
Rep. Payne Jr. is funded by the National Association of Realtors — a PAC that’s lobbied AGAINST the eviction moratorium and has been a fierce opponent of housing justice.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-may-2022?refcode=524realtors [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-may-2022?refcode=524realtors]
And that’s just the donations he’s taken since 2020. Since he first ran for Congress in 2012, Payne Jr. has taken OVER $30,000 from the National Association of Realtors.
Payne Jr. is trying to have his cake and eat it too. He’s happy to stand next to Biden officials talking about a plan he didn’t write and claim to care about housing justice — as long as he doesn’t have to take any action and risk offending his corrupt corporate donors.
Meanwhile, when the eviction moratorium came under threat last year, I went down to Washington D.C. to stand with progressive leaders like Cori Bush and do the real work in the fight for housing justice.
I’m not messing around, Peter — I’m committed to fighting for housing justice, and that’s why I haven’t taken a single penny in corporate PAC money. If you’re with me, click here to chip in $27 and help me defeat Donald Payne Jr. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-may-2022?refcode=524realtors]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $7 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-may-2022?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=524realtors] Express Donate $27 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-may-2022?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=524realtors] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-may-2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=524realtors] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-may-2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=524realtors] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-may-2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=524realtors] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-may-2022?refcode=524realtors]
Thank you for your support.
— Imani

body:
Can I count on you?

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/383dcc1dc1ee/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-7128541?e=c87c5d8d97)

Friend,

Our May End of the Month deadline is only a few days away.

This congressional race is about giving Oregon a better future. Right now, we are facing issues inflicted by the Radical Lefts policies and it’s time for a change.

In office, my priorities will be fixing our economy, protecting our law enforcement officers, building a parental bill of rights, defending our freedoms, and most of all putting Oregon first.

Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, or even $100 right now to our May fundraising goal?>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/5-26-eblast?recurring=true&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast526)

name: Alicia Speedy
subject: FWD: I didn’t send my daughter to school yesterday.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
I need to check in to see if you saw my email from earlier. I just read a statistic that puts things into perspective. Active shootings in the U.S. have increased by 97% since 2020. Think about that.
I need your help to take action. But before you do, I want to tell you why I, a mother of 3, decided to work on Wiley’s campaign.
The first time I talked to Wiley I asked him 2 things. Do you stand with public schools? And, do you think healthcare is a human right? He told me about the bills he authored to get a nurse in every school and to put a teacher’s assistant in K-3 classrooms. Then he told me that the first bill he copsonsored when joining the Senate was to expand Medicaid. As a mother, my children’s health and well-being are my top priorities. It was obvious to me that he felt the same.
Wiley is a champion for children. That’s what matters the most. I’ll get into all of this a bit deeper another time. Because right now, above all else, I need your action. I wouldn’t speak on behalf of a candidate if I didn’t truly believe they would bring forth real change and action.
Sign on to stand with Wiley and myself to demand action for our children. The time is now. [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/savechildren]
Thank you,
Alicia Speedy
----Forwarded-Message----
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/savechildren [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/savechildren]
I was born in Buffalo, New York. Last week there was a mass shooting at the local Tops. A store I’ve been in 100 times! Two days ago, 19 sweet, innocent, small children had their lives stolen in a Texas mass shooting.
Yesterday, I drove my daughter to school just to turn around and drive her all the way home.
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/savechildren [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/savechildren]
I know I’m not alone. I know every single parent struggled at carpool this morning. I know not every parent has the privilege to drive their child home or take them to work for the day. But I also know that our voices are all that we have.
“I decided it is better to scream. Silence is the real crime against humanity.”
― Nadezhda Mandelstam, Hope Against Hope
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/savechildren [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/savechildren]
I don’t believe I’m in the minority here. I believe there are thousands of us who feel the gut-wrenching feeling that I do today. We should be better!
If you have a story like mine, I need your help.
Sign on to stand up for children [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/savechildren]To every mother, father, grandparent, nanny, childcare provider, or human. If you’re heartbroken like I am, sign on and stand with me. [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/savechildren]
And, if you have a story, there’s a spot for that too...
SIGN ON [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/savechildren]Alicia Speedy
Mom of 3 & Campaign Finance Director
*️⃣ DIRECT AID FOR VICTIMS *️⃣
GoFundMe has established an online hub of verified fundraisers supporting victims and loved ones affected by the shooting. [https://www.gofundme.com/c/act/donate-to-texas-elementary-school-shooting-relief] Their link includes a fundraiser organized by VictimsFirst that provides victims' family members with no-strings-attached cash payments.
The City of Uvalde is seeking donations for medical expenses. [https://www.facebook.com/uvaldepd/posts/376362624524496]
The Uvalde community is seeking volunteer legal services. Reach out to volunteer at UvaldeResponse@sa-lsa.org. [UvaldeResponse@sa-lsa.org.?subject=Uvalde%20Legal%20Assistance%20]
Follow Wiley Online:
https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC [https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC] http://twitter.com/wileynickel [http://twitter.com/wileynickel] http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc [http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc]
Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
Wiley Nickel for Congress
PO Box 563
Raleigh, NC 27602
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Tt-P0CQ0-ke3ulUkLsfzZw2?unsubscribedata=uce4iToZd39Jyw8P5F2fFxC2fv035l7tVxaCMC2%2BJeN%2FOcvFTiFE%2FTSw0KNcJcHufQG0K%2FrrhR%2FWajVIUZgma6h9gEgydhNk7dXLE0Ys5bSjp7r0Ihgg52qBahshzCuZG%2BnRpny2eoLmRqxeV9Xlz9mNLyT2WEqxVYzNWFCpUrfCDymU1fdi37hHduxRjKZpagEF%2Btp664rbN2dTQtzX0e3viZjCP5TWr6SQf3ySsPVWU7EJbaen50NJurLYvRQs%2BwQvKnrRKkJjnO6uMZHEt7%2Bwpx8eJJjLmP9dX0n%2BJ4pvBXrDfaCmTAKbF93NRICdrcvw4ZNGubQHiZYDugQZN2itHSNC%2F36kI4x8nS1NLrjFSttTJBF%2BXp7I83zAD%2FB1QlajdDtdQnWImyIj8nilbC%2FEPb7vmqr%2Bw7kGhNsythvqHi5m3ZSLlpUWC2lQCuvD .

name: Team AOC
subject: 3 actions you can take right now for Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We do not have to accept these horrific acts of violence as routine.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220526-3055-header&t=1&akid=3055%2E2526796%2EjJuViD)
Tuesday’s school shooting in Texas is now the fourth deadliest school shooting in modern U.S. history.
It is infuriating that those who have the power to act and save lives are too afraid of the gun lobby to do anything to end this uniquely American epidemic.
We know it can feel hopeless when senseless acts of violence like these happen on a routine basis while our leaders seemingly sit by and watch. But there are actionable steps you can take right now to make a difference.
1. **Call your Senators.** Several bills to close gun sale loopholes, like H.R. 1446 which would stop licensed gun sales going through before a required background check is done, and bills that would otherwise help combat gun violence are stalled in the Senate.
By making your voice and outrage heard, you can help push your elected officials toward enacting change now. **The U.S. Capitol Switchboard can connect you with your representatives’ offices: (202) 224-3121**
2. [Donate to a victims’ fund.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14635?t=2&akid=3055%2E2526796%2EjJuViD) VictimsFirst, a non-profit that connects surviving victims of mass casualty crime with resources, has set up a victims’ fund for people affected by the Robb Elementary School shooting in Texas.
3. **If you’re in Texas, or know someone there, consider donating blood.** University Health, a teaching hospital in San Antonio where at least four victims are receiving treatment, is accepting blood donations.

These school shootings can have a heavy psychological toll on our children, and force families to have difficult conversations no parent should have to have with their children. Below are some resources for talking about gun violence with children:
* [National Association of School Psychologist](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14636?t=3&akid=3055%2E2526796%2EjJuViD)
* [The National Center for Healthy Safe Children](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14637?t=4&akid=3055%2E2526796%2EjJuViD)
* [The National Child Traumatic Stress Network](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14638?t=5&akid=3055%2E2526796%2EjJuViD)
* [National Parent Helpline](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14639?t=6&akid=3055%2E2526796%2EjJuViD)
* [American Psychological Association (APA)](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14640?t=7&akid=3055%2E2526796%2EjJuViD)

Additional resources:
* [Guide: Resources for families to talk about school shootings](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14641?t=8&akid=3055%2E2526796%2EjJuViD)
* [NYC.GOB - Coping with Mass Shooting](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14642?t=9&akid=3055%2E2526796%2EjJuViD)
* [San Diego County Office of Education - Resources for School Shootings](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14643?t=10&akid=3055%2E2526796%2EjJuViD)
* [Youth.gov - Trauma Informed Approaches](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14644?t=11&akid=3055%2E2526796%2EjJuViD)

We do not have to accept these horrific acts of violence as routine. And we must keep demanding that our leaders not only acknowledge this devastating problem, but also take long overdue action to keep our children and our communities safe.
We will not rest until gun violence in this country is a thing of the past.
Thank you for standing with us in this fight.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20220526-3055-P_OTH_RES_DIR&t=12&refcode2=3055_2526796_jJuViD&akid=3055%2E2526796%2EjJuViD)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220526-3055-P_OTH_RES_DIR&t=13&akid=3055%2E2526796%2EjJuViD)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=14&akid=3055%2E2526796%2EjJuViD) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=15&akid=3055%2E2526796%2EjJuViD) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=16&akid=3055%2E2526796%2EjJuViD)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

With the entire GOP establishment behind Walker, keeping this seat and the Senate blue will come down to your grassroots support. **So I’m urgently asking:[Will you split $5 or more right now between my campaign and Voter Protection Project so we can keep Georgia and the Senate blue?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/12594?t=7&akid=2621%2E878179%2EVqPnt3)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Raphael Warnock and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/12595?t=8&akid=2621%2E878179%2EVqPnt3)

That’s why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the GOP are coming after me as their top target for defeat. Even before the primary, they had already poured nearly $15 MILLION into Walker’s campaign to flip this seat – **and now, recent polls show me 1 point down.**

With the general election officially here, it’s never been more urgent to fight back against the GOP’s attacks and pull ahead in this must-win race. **That’s why we set a rapid-response goal to raise $100,000 by midnight tonight, but right now, we’re dangerously short.**

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Actions speak louder than words
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Thoughts and prayers are not enough.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/0L6vHwkZbLQg/U0c1dGFCWWFFOVVKdERTWG14QXpCM1FVMzBpZCs5aTl4MTNGaTNmS3lNa1pwdmJqNFBnZWpOZHdNc1ZjV1ZvaXphckF0aFAxNFA4Z3M3dHNsUFh6MUR6UmQ5dG1qRFU5NkFGdkhwYXUvZzg9S0/a1l6eG1VeWo3dG55WWhia2R4WE9jR21FOTdLM3ExRW1UOTg4MUY4NnRYUT0S1) Friend -- We can't allow this to be what normal looks like in America. We cannot become numb to the violence. Our hearts are with the families of Uvalde, Texas. But our thoughts and prayers aren't enough. Not nearly enough. In 2020, gun violence became the leading cause of death for American children. And yet again, and again, and again, we see the NRA and the gun lobby organize to halt necessary action. **We must put our kids ahead of these monsters.** [_**Congress must act to pass gun reform legislation to prevent a massacre like this from ever happening again. Will you add your name right now if you 're with me?**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/LEePhN4XbZs-/U0c1dGFCWWFFOVVKdERTWG14QXpCM1FVMzBpZCs5aTl4MTNGaTNmS3lNa1pwdmJqNFBnZWpOZHdNc1ZjV1ZvaXphckF0aFAxNFA4Z3M3dHNsUFh6MUR6UmQ5dG1qRFU5NkFGdkhwYXUvZzg9S0/a1l6eG1VeWo3dG55WWhia2R4WE9jR21FOTdLM3ExRW1UOTg4MUY4NnRYUT0S1) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/Z6qLH9~evRC_/U0c1dGFCWWFFOVVKdERTWG14QXpCM1FVMzBpZCs5aTl4MTNGaTNmS3lNa1pwdmJqNFBnZWpOZHdNc1ZjV1ZvaXphckF0aFAxNFA4Z3M3dHNsUFh6MUR6UmQ5dG1qRFU5NkFGdkhwYXUvZzg9S0/a1l6eG1VeWo3dG55WWhia2R4WE9jR21FOTdLM3ExRW1UOTg4MUY4NnRYUT0S1)
---
Here in Washington state, we've taken action to keep our kids safe. I'm proud that our state has taken action to:
* Ensure universal background checks for gun owners
* Ban high-capacity magazines, ghost guns, and bump stocks
* Hold gun owners liable if they don't secure their firearms safely

Washington state's taken action. Congress, you're up.
**The reality is that, to truly protect our children and our grandchildren, we need gun reform on a national level.**
Let's speak up, together, right now.

clean_body: Thoughts and prayers are not enough. | Friend -- We can't allow this to be what normal looks like in America. We cannot become numb to the violence. Our hearts are with the families of Uvalde, Texas. But our thoughts and prayers aren't enough. Not nearly enough. In 2020, gun violence became the leading cause of death for American children. And yet again, and again, and again, we see the NRA and the gun lobby organize to halt necessary action. We must put our kids ahead of these monsters. | Here in Washington state, we've taken action to keep our kids safe. I'm proud that our state has taken action to: Ensure universal background checks for gun owners Ban high-capacity magazines, ghost guns, and bump stocks Hold gun owners liable if they don't secure their firearms safely Washington state's taken action. Congress, you're up. The reality is that, to truly protect our children and our grandchildren, we need gun reform on a national level.** Let's speak up, together, right now. Very truly yours, Jay

But to win this race for the 1 seat needed to take back the 50-50 Senate, we can’t fall short at our most important deadline yet. Now more than ever, we can’t show a single sign of weakness. Peter, I was the first candidate in the country to say that when I’m elected to the Senate, I will NOT vote for Mitch McConnell. McConnell couldn’t stand the idea of a pro-Trump warrior undermining his establishment grip on Washington. Which is exactly why he had his RINO swap operative Karl Rove gin up a smear campaign against me and my kids. But their schemes blew up in their face this month, when a circuit judge granted us access to phone records EXPOSING McConnell and Rove for who they truly are. Now more than ever, we MUST keep fighting. Help me close out the month strong and WIN this fight against the swamp.
