name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: The only way to change the course we’re on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress
body:
| Tuesday night, I wondered how to tell Gracie about the senseless tragedy that just unfolded in Uvalde, Texas. She was a baby when Sandy Hook happened and she was too young to understand Parkland. But now she is in the 4th grade and I can’t shield her from this news.

I wondered if I should tell her in the morning or wait to see if she hears from her teachers or her classmates. I wasn’t sure if I’d be prepared to answer her questions.

She knows the pain that so many Americans experience. She knows that kids get shot. She knows what to do during a lockdown drill. And she knows that I have been fighting to protect kids from this kind of violence for a long time.

But that night was probably the final time that Gracie would go to bed without the knowledge that, in America, kids get hunted in their classrooms.

Well in the morning I told her. I told Gracie about what happened in Uvalde and she asked all the questions one would expect: How did he get into the school? Why did he do it?

**My kids, and all of our children, deserve to live in a country without the constant fear of becoming another statistic in the never-ending list of school shootings. Each person — each child — lost is a life ended too soon and a future that will never come to fruition.**

Gracie knows that I don’t like Nancy Mace. She thinks it’s because Nancy likes Trump and is anti-science. She doesn’t know that one of the reasons I don’t like Nancy Mace is because she is a gun extremist whose actions (and inactions) make it more likely that kids will get shot.

As a pediatrician who has seen so many kids in the ICU with gunshot wounds, I can’t support a politician who refuses to take action that ensures this doesn’t keep happening. I can’t support one who runs ads the night after children are gunned down that show her shooting guns off.

**Now more than ever, we need leaders who will take decisive action to protect our communities from gun violence.**

I will fight like hell every day between now and November 8th to ensure that SC-1 doesn’t send another gun extremist to DC. I am thinking of the entire community of Uvalde, and all those who have been forced to face gun violence in our country.

— Annie

---
* * *

**[Click here to unsubscribe from Dr. Annie's email list.](https://go.drannieandrews.com/p/xdO438I9HEexxn7DsXstAA2?unsubscribedata=ntwgNMAJVkO8INQud4boUScOXMWadpAVm%2BgsryqOUac35Gp6dMEHFjxUfwEP0yt53%2FH7C4%2Byua6JxyNwfD4XBcBKlFxnUabVVxKK%2BWWd9NvxPbzaXmDi1J1CRP1WLV6Az73UXbvsA51oEYndWxhdUz6PelXmP7NhPRIR%2Fc3EuBFdeRqIIAlr%2FA7RjuqWUn7RzQVHi102WRaDdt1zJ4RznLHm2TqZiDYe1nm1EbwqHZRlDCMu0P1xlb1qo%2FEq3X%2BbBk2odRmEvtdfbHoGgwwD91siKyVWEnYaXt2jQNGzxHCavnKpejM0wgXxZWxfxF%2BI7GSCh3hx%2Bn1TFTc4slGcg%2FmzMPqu2BQfmneqOnqJvgE409QyuoMmV2LxSTtDXYs8I1t8YG3NvCA2Iqgaf6YrBiv%2FJR4yOUz36ZDInI1GpCA%3D)** ****

name: American Briefing
subject: House Committee Makes Major Moves Against Biden Family

Hi there Peter Willis!
Xavier here, Melanie’s finance director. I need to run to a meeting shortly, so I’ll keep this brief.
We have the most volunteers in this race, and the best ground operation. But unfortunately after looking at our numbers, we’re behind on raising the money we need to keep our voter outreach program going full steam until the August primary.
I hate to ask, but I’m hoping you can help us close the gap. Will you make a donation of any amount before the end of the month?
Here’s the link for donating: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dar-em-may22eom](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3DrBNI3bj4Iiu8RInpilTUa5XBhi3W8HrExWgQIljPvZgK8WZKEvstvFMjxJUeOqfT1qZORfXFkbrRAz2l_8IeSjntJRgAqAfpNlwLr5UxPGKwMH74b28BDLFpTQuDhQMB4jB72-3D6fyZ1PTgdytyn-IbUeKIYYjAOpxp1SiJiQUU_hyBtAcUkKwOZEsIxwSn1rUNOHFHNht8rceq2MRdKAeJBnV35ddH5jaE1dQCxJn2PPmrLyqRV-zN--dmXE0ltbAdqvD04fXQPvrrt8e46MOKga7l4SLaaTAsoW1sdOuiTzptv7EQznJiWuKq_MzF-6z8Z1acQbOek1mxxNJOQbwAAwVyLb8HBDtldh88OSFfiZaDbxnGRXy6EQqtuMnKe/3md/nCfe5QRaQpapq7QtndfHpA/h1/rH5LhWHDEJEndiMdeN_mQIFSVrqBwqdxDfBLoDn0CKw)

Xavier

Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. clean_body: | | | | Hi there Peter Willis! Xavier here, Melanie’s finance director. I need to run to a meeting shortly, so I’ll keep this brief. We have the most volunteers in this race, and the best ground operation. But unfortunately after looking at our numbers, we’re behind on raising the money we need to keep our voter outreach program going full steam until the August primary. I hate to ask, but I’m hoping you can help us close the gap. Will you make a donation of any amount before the end of the month? Here’s the link for donating: Thanks so much for helping us power through and elect Melanie to fight for NY-03 in Congress, Xavier Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO (not by corporations or lobbyists) Friends of Melanie D'Arrigo P.O. name: BilldeBlasio.com
subject: Just $1
body:
[ https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/150?t=1001&akid=154%2E39519%2EtBQIeh ][IMG]

After winning my first primary for Mayor of New York City, and through my inauguration, we heard over and over that our vision for One New York was not possible.

When I said that we would not wait to offer free, full-day pre-K to all of New York City’s children, the New York Times said it was a noble idea that would never happen and that we were wasting our time. Today, 70,000 children are enrolled in pre-K and we’ve launched 3-K for All.

When I said that we would not wait to reform a broken stop-and-frisk policy in New York City, the editorials and statements from officials of that time basically said the city would fall apart the moment we got rid of the program. The opposite happened. We started showing respect to our young people and we got safer. Before COVID, New York City was the safest big city in America with the lowest number of major crimes in the modern era.

When Donald Trump dropped out of the Paris Agreement and his administration rolled back climate protection after climate protection, there was a lot of disappointment, but little hope about what could be done in response. We doubled down, cutting greenhouse emissions by 17% below 2005 levels despite significant growth as a city, and committed to divesting $5 billion of NYC’s pension funds from fossil fuels.

Now I hear the same thing about Congress today — that it will never act on the issues important to working families in this country.

But I say they just need to hear from someone who has done it before.

That is why I am running for Congress. But I cannot get there alone. So I am asking:

Can you please become a Founding Donor to my campaign for Congress today? It is so important that we start this campaign off strong.

https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/153?t=1002&akid=154%2E39519%2EtBQIeh

Thank you in advance for chipping in today. It means a lot to me.

In solidarity,

Bill de Blasio

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.billdeblasio.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=154%2E39519%2EtBQIeh

name: Mike Durant
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE
body:
DURANT FOR SENATE

Friends,

I’d like to thank you for your support of my campaign for the U.S. Senate and
for believing in me. As a first-time candidate and political outsider, I knew
it would be a tough road ahead, and unfortunately, we did not emerge
victoriously.

This was a hard-fought campaign, and I’d like to thank my friends, my family,
and all of my supporters who believed in our campaign. This campaign was about
integrity: I didn’t lie, I didn’t sling mud, and I tried to run a campaign
unlike that of Career Politicians. Unfortunately, it didn’t work.

Moving forward, I hope that we can move the needle toward integrity. Please
don’t give up, and please don’t lose hope. I encourage you to stay involved and
fight for those with integrity.

Thank you, again, for believing in me.

God Bless,

Mike Durant

PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE
Not authorized by any other candidate.
DURANT FOR SENATE
PO Box 11548
Huntsville, AL 35814

imply endorsement by the Departments of Army or Defense.

body:
| | | Peter, What we witnessed in Uvalde on Tuesday is a devastating tragedy that no family should ever have to go through. My heart is breaking for the victims and survivors of Robb Elementary. I am sending my condolences to the children and families in Uvalde who are experiencing this unthinkable tragedy. Our children, teachers, and our communities deserve better than this. We deserve to feel safe in the spaces we occupy, free from the fear of gun violence. [_**To support the families of the victims and survivors, I am reaching out to you to help the Robb Elementary community. If you are able to make a donation to their GoFundMe page, all contributions will go toward the families directly.**_](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDK7b6Fqbor3bYFGUJCwWOAoNhCWWERZZsKewyc-sPNx8Muf53E-YnUbO75OIdRNzDgoSbUWPg2YRewnK0NgIVm6sFXKA2xENzBxQPnMmN84s8m6kGbx8JQn3afcoYkSchTDgSeQUGrCQAPLCGc8M-Rp4ZdAYlOl8Yzi5bCEzrI-OmbRnpQ9cxt43Ylp9jiYToVRRB7cYfnbbJ7z0mZEwWaoPq8_NYjOsq-qbTt_WV8isPxUB3-fY8jvIWajM3ZG_BtAh6LwZMwcp3VinGsnasA5-wpqsX-3U8dNWlXBycWUY/3md/ZTeyjaRnQ_axRLC1L2ZXOQ/h0/16uuQkFz5rujgEtlUfBSZhLsg2n85Tc6Ka3yAWv-GlY) [Support Uvalde »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDK7b6Fqbor3bYFGUJCwWOAoNhCWWERZZsKewyc-sPNx8Muf53E-YnUbO75OIdRNzDgoSbUWPg2YRewnK0NgIVm4bTb6xUBHhxAtp-JU3BpjB-zp9YdsWGJYhCLcszFNPjLPliu6v6C4ru5MJPOxEf64ChjfX6CW3aO4rcrBrIY0NTXQPKnS-MUmt6zKukbUpP9S39dIzNr2yCahcFOxd7DeMgo-69ta2VYaWguuAyfuBCUKNEcn0oIXIgKJ_W4dgo_2GpU3ygfzVnImDTZkKdDyQxT-HRhBucIGLmkPAkbdQ/3md/ZTeyjaRnQ_axRLC1L2ZXOQ/h1/xqfUfeHUlN0GL-4kNIxlnuoSbV21Dd1yuWhyt9wieBw) This is a devastating tragedy. How many more mass shootings do children have to experience before we say enough? Our elected officials must take action and finally pass common-sense gun reforms like background checks and banning weapons of war. I will always put the safety of our community first, and unlike Henry Cuellar, I pledge not to take a dime from the NRA or the gun lobby. Together, we will challenge the normalization of tragic loss caused by gun violence by changing laws and closing loopholes to keep guns out of the hands of those at the highest risk of violence. Thank you for supporting the Uvalde community today, Jessica Cisneros

subject: We’re officially up against Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate

body:
| | | Team, this is important: **Herschel Walker (R) is now officially the GOP nominee for Senate here in Georgia, meaning he and I will be facing off this November.**

With the entire GOP establishment behind Walker, keeping this seat and the Senate blue will come down to _your_ grassroots support. **So I’m urgently asking:[Will you split $5 or more right now between my campaign and the DSCC so we can keep Georgia and the Senate blue?](https://go.dscc.org/go/5319?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220526-RaphaelWarnock-WarnockTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220526-RaphaelWarnock-WarnockTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=4486%2E9716520%2EQGn8PP)**

Here’s why your support today couldn’t be more important: CNN is calling me the most vulnerable Democratic senator on the ballot – in the race that experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ say could decide Senate control.

That’s why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the GOP are coming after me as their top target for defeat. Even before the primary, they had already poured nearly $15 MILLION into Walker’s campaign to flip this seat – **and now, recent polls show a 1- or 2-point race.**

With the general election officially here, it’s never been more urgent to fight back against the GOP’s attacks in this must-win race. **That’s why we set a rapid-response goal to raise $100,000 by midnight tonight, but right now, we’re dangerously short.**

**So please, I’m counting on you:[Will you split an urgent donation of $5 or more now so we can defeat Herschel Walker, win in Georgia, and defend our Democratic Senate majority? ](https://go.dscc.org/go/5319?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220526-RaphaelWarnock-WarnockTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220526-RaphaelWarnock-WarnockTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=4486%2E9716520%2EQGn8PP)**

clean_body: | | | Team, this is important: Herschel Walker (R) is now officially the GOP nominee for Senate here in Georgia, meaning he and I will be facing off this November. With the entire GOP establishment behind Walker, keeping this seat and the Senate blue will come down to your grassroots support. So I’m urgently asking: Here’s why your support today couldn’t be more important: CNN is calling me the most vulnerable Democratic senator on the ballot – in the race that experts at FiveThirtyEight say could decide Senate control. That’s why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the GOP are coming after me as their top target for defeat. Even before the primary, they had already poured nearly $15 MILLION into Walker’s campaign to flip this seat – and now, recent polls show a 1- or 2-point race. With the general election officially here, it’s never been more urgent to fight back against the GOP’s attacks in this must-win race. That’s why we set a rapid-response goal to raise $100,000 by midnight tonight, but right now, we’re dangerously short. So please, I’m counting on you: If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Raphael Warnock and the DSCC. | | | | | Thank you for stepping up when it matters most. I truly appreciate it. – Rev. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: The Second Amendment is not a suicide pact
body:
Friends -

Tuesday afternoon, the country watched in horror as a gunman walked into a
Texas elementary school and killed 19 kids and 2 teachers.

It was the 3rd worst school shooting in modern American history.

And I want to say this to all of you today — because you need to hear it
from me, your governor, directly:

California will not stand by as kids across this country are gunned down.

Guns are now the leading cause of death for kids in America. Can you
imagine? More than car accidents, more than anything else. Guns.

The Second Amendment is not a suicide pact, folks.

So while the U.S. Senate stands idly by and activist federal judges strike
down common sense gun laws, our state is going to act with the urgency
this crisis demands.

Here’s what we’re going to do:

We are going to restrict the advertising of firearms to minors.

We are going to restrict ghost guns and the parts and kits used to build
them.

We are going to allow governments and victims of gun violence to sue
manufacturers and sellers of firearms.

And we are going to pass a bill that will allow any private citizen in
California to sue anyone who manufactures, distributes, imports or sells
an assault rifle or ghost gun in California.

Now, I am going to need your help to get this done.

Because if we do, we are going to save lives.

Thank you,

Gavin Newsom

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Can you please split a contribution – of whatever you can afford – between
Gabby Giffords' gun violence prevention organization and Gavin Newsom’s
re-election campaign? Together we can keep California blue in 2022 and
make our communities safer from gun violence.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gcn-em-giffords?refcode=em-220526-1-15&refcode2=831_4767699_ubtC8z&akid=831%2E4767699%2EubtC8z ]CONTRIBUTE NOW

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.gavinnewsom.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=831%2E4767699%2EubtC8z

MAGA Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst Governor in America and an utter nightmare for Floridians. He is relentless in his praise for Donald Trump, he completely botched Florida's pandemic response and put lives at risk, and he gave scarce COVID vaccines to his major campaign donors instead of the most vulnerable Floridians. name: Brent Hennrich
subject: A personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDH71PPGrEzdfegloc-4ZZqW99zJc5MzSVzm_NrFMisweTmMwHq_7Xb0U1QiZD-lwuunZrR6nVggzuwjf-GROjeKZ95ZyINDIKVRk1XQsPfxY5hmIgSIKDGnd4tUw8_TV-XZ1HrFDVEtHDCGRPMGKL-jMPl2FaGHxSqsTXqG4N4Y7xpEq1DqyJxDadOurbK-mXv3nof8D-vE85aIkfi2-J03JppP2k4w0iFgBrWucLgzR/3md/EhAeToNLT8WXem0Jl8-lnw/h0/JyCc5z-Oj14rbL5kBJZwUno9UJ_FZ0dt-zAOa-d5a4U)
---
Hello, Peter.

I'm writing with an important update on our campaign.

If you've been with me a while, you likely know that I put my money where my mouth is. It's been my mantra for the entire year I've been in this race.

I didn't come to this decision lightly, but it was made because our democracy is on the line right now, and Democrats MUST stop Joe Kent from getting on the ballot in November.

My team and I met with Marie Perez, the other Democrat in the race for WA-03, and I've informed her that I'm bowing out so we have a chance to fight for democracy.

I understand you may be disappointed in this decision, and I can assure you it is a weight I care about. I also feel strongly that Democrats must unite to defeat the increasingly extremist GOP, and that's why I'm putting my support behind Marie's campaign.

While I will be wrapping up my campaign in the coming days, know that my efforts to defend people's rights do not end here.

For years, the GOP has used tactics to suppress the vote and sow distrust in election integrity with American voters. And it's no surprise that Trump-endorsed Joe Kent is peddling the Big Lie, and gaining support in the extremist GOP base.

What Kent is doing is menacing. He's tearing down confidence in our democracy and giving oxygen to conspiracy theories with no basis in fact.

Due to the nature of our state's top two primary system, splitting the Democratic vote could create an opening that our country simply can't afford. I'm asking you to join me and support Marie so she can block Joe AND #FlipWA03.

This isn't the last time you'll hear from us. As we wind down this campaign, my team will be reaching out to share continued actions that we're taking, how you can help, and also to make sure we can close out the books on our campaign with a zero balance.

I can't tell you how grateful I am to you for believing in me and what we're trying to do here for our district. I look forward to staying in touch.

-Brent
---

name: Gary Sinise
subject: These heroes are counting on you
body:
| | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=34f57178649b4061b8e880dcafac2c7c&_e=5W9znS6qIQG-G6N9XQibM5MnKDZEVWFw3qmHjLMCjeWUd-tsrbZXsYkizuJezeK8YJVY7_wgEv9H_6nNzgkKQLlN34RV9DUQkVhRyI6htc83XziOyNUMJ-SdM3_IXxvq9aMNYvzHFmvf92D0ZZB7OrcuCFA4NGMNqDZNK_y7UMd_WArgi0eGaiYfIHd-BndKUUoY1vGolG9FMu-pbn46CV8b1lbyfK4FUq2eXxQYJP8y3JvjUugpgwU23ByIvOqMIWzqFiepiHcKw5ab1LYapjGUQiG01BbdIaltAor6764P79sshmibBugbCJJmZ1XWyi_Dj_eGwYLIkwfu-PXziXglL1duFNpI8FjEcT97Db4%3D)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=34f57178649b4061b8e880dcafac2c7c&_e=5W9znS6qIQG-G6N9XQibM5MnKDZEVWFw3qmHjLMCjeWUd-tsrbZXsYkizuJezeK8YJVY7_wgEv9H_6nNzgkKQLlN34RV9DUQkVhRyI6htc83XziOyNUMJ-SdM3_IXxvq9aMNYvzHFmvf92D0ZZB7OmDBpg4LhWCsmu5YRssbD7hZoTxheZtplvu336rW5MpmW8SK-uxP76CdrX1NfEyQ-0FmjMbBeE1mhAxK0dnk5nj6gYLMQ87CQiI7J8I_xPm4964BWwk3OQ-3-TFbWNtW_A5FXxR4yA29_xqm-xasY-x7cW8eKxIc6wYHdLo5JYxXXzccy7x0iczsN14Pb2FDCoiqqphCP1BF1E29ma7sA6U%3D)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=34f57178649b4061b8e880dcafac2c7c&_e=5W9znS6qIQG-G6N9XQibM5MnKDZEVWFw3qmHjLMCjeWUd-tsrbZXsYkizuJezeK8YJVY7_wgEv9H_6nNzgkKQLlN34RV9DUQkVhRyI6htc83XziOyNUMJ-SdM3_IXxvq9aMNYvzHFmvf92D0ZZB7Ogc9rG4uEOjz2meaVfbYb4EMuG7k0RdNZ23Y66MMhObyZe5DGoWUwYyd1ZnaMtcfgzh1Ne9dnV0GRiCz479BLdXJuA95JF8q9AsDVBLoz3xNOHh1CiyLCoinZqpJh7KO4KZu8QM1iIybLv0TWxjMSPkux2vv_AxS6mRSNvcEc5dbMZgWQP_sbjrAuJVWPU6LeFKMtS8JQ-DAWLISL3TuH9U%3D)
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=34f57178649b4061b8e880dcafac2c7c&_e=5W9znS6qIQG-G6N9XQibM5MnKDZEVWFw3qmHjLMCjeWUd-tsrbZXsYkizuJezeK8YJVY7_wgEv9H_6nNzgkKQLlN34RV9DUQkVhRyI6htc83XziOyNUMJ-SdM3_IXxvq9aMNYvzHFmvf92D0ZZB7OhcZatybpi1d7G6E2uzsWDGSVcMeBxUb2Ei5slOwclVSaJolAgPVHSsuIC--12RikEicws17q8mpbm9Lg6RhQK1Gkl2xjTwOxalWCDt1TwujJezAyeeGUsi9iCiq0zRBJOcW63INCz4Lmm3gTUUePWFISktbK8SaT94iIjHBL8hij5hSxDBklcGGW8eZSz9tfa8DavMpaeEB3tXer-cuMAk%3D)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=34f57178649b4061b8e880dcafac2c7c&_e=5W9znS6qIQG-G6N9XQibM5MnKDZEVWFw3qmHjLMCjeWUd-tsrbZXsYkizuJezeK8YJVY7_wgEv9H_6nNzgkKQLlN34RV9DUQkVhRyI6htc83XziOyNUMJ-SdM3_IXxvq9aMNYvzHFmvf92D0ZZB7Op556HcK4R17IgsNNvG2VwOM1MUqGJGrKT7_QfTIMBWBNhn3D2pxEZrw_RyL9rFkxZY_JTS-GPQ1ziOT-ScFuRgYU9GO1m4OxAv-jn6H-rdRyB3fPwdjBLCb9gPzc8iaX-XnJ5iFdQBqaSuThNRMAQqxKPvWzphv2hb8O8yuvDF3d7Vcr_Q7UxUE5bzWtJeK_yLagyZ0rGiGGx8FieddpMc%3D)

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. clean_body: Now, we HAVE to beat far-Left Raphael Warnock Friend, I am humbled beyond words. Thanks to the tremendous support of voters in the Peach State,I just secured the REPUBLICAN nomination for the United States Senate from Georgia. My opponent, Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock, is completely out of touch with the people and values of Georgia, so it’s time for a change. With my friend, the 45th President of the United States, Donald J. Trump, and EVERY America First patriot behind us, we will WIN this November. Senator Warnock is the #1 fundraiser in the country, and he has already amassed a MASSIVE war chest to fight back. My opponent and the national Democrats are planning a massive advertising blitz of 60 MILLION DOLLARS – and they will use every dollar to attack us and our conservative values. That’s why I’m calling on you, Friend, to stand with us and help bolster our efforts to restore our conservative majority in the United States Senate. President Trump, Georgia, and OUR country are counting on you. Will you answer the call? I want to thank every American who supported our movement and every dedicated Georgian who put their trust in me. Now it’s time to focus on DEFEATING Raphael Warnock, who is considered the most vulnerable Democrat senator in the country. Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Senate Nominee for Georgia If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Peter,

You may or may not watch “**The View** ,” but undoubtedly, you’ve heard of the daytime talk show owing to the many outrageous things their hosts have said throughout the years. Let me remind you of a few examples:

“ _**If you kick out all of the Latinos who’s going to clean your toilets?**_ ” – Kelly Osbourn on illegal immigration

“ _**It was a Halloween party. I went as a beautiful African woman.**_ ” – Joy Behar on wearing blackface to a Halloween party

Or when Whoopie Goldberg last year had this to say when talking about the Holocaust: “ _**Well, this is white people doing it to white people. So, this is y’all go fight amongst yourselves.**_ ”

Well, now things have gotten political once again. Recently co-host Sunny Hostin said on air that she “ _**doesn’t understand black Republicans,**_ ” and that a black Republican is “ _**an oxymoron**_.”

[](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=3006568341b24658b5500579ab459938&_e=Jkf_eRi7vwkkTftwfYn3phMjGVQEFFWt6tZ8paEzz0da-yM7otHdv7YFtCK6-za_Zepkcdlm9UDyXXaei_9DXnxNYXQdKRp9e-PDpcqU269a3-ssMG4hPSyXJwYfZN5cOmasCW-8Pq0UBt5pOHfA5y-a4HU9sGAvjnfYXnDXhVoIibp9_GYN3RrN6KDhXjVCK1AwnqQHiUmMh_ycGbxGERTwnj7cBggNR2WdoIddUAdCiTTAfI_yVQbfyd-Pzm8HcP1SQWE-yMRn97UkZw0DfRsmhE8rh3tJEBizlu_hbMssf4HssZBZOIu2dJAP81rL2LQNgRFQ-MeNGasqvUfaFm48k5mXOfhk-OIh1LHoPcVccR1cMnvGgELVH6O1ITr-2Qt2_nKc_gHYUV2y4_bcxJ1zidmOGWbHGJXOCQ4-DTT_xpzkur5888MG5R3316FLZor2xDOI4_Oe7a7zWjL-PyeQ-yDWvIn6agwaIAot3vU%3D)
[** HELP ME SEND A MESSAGE
TO THE LADIES OF THE VIEW>>**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=3006568341b24658b5500579ab459938&_e=Jkf_eRi7vwkkTftwfYn3phMjGVQEFFWt6tZ8paEzz0da-yM7otHdv7YFtCK6-za_Zepkcdlm9UDyXXaei_9DXnxNYXQdKRp9e-PDpcqU269a3-ssMG4hPSyXJwYfZN5cOmasCW-8Pq0UBt5pOHfA5y-a4HU9sGAvjnfYXnDXhVoIibp9_GYN3RrN6KDhXjVCK1AwnqQHiUmMh_ycGbxGERTwnj7cBggNR2WdoIddUAdCiTTAfI_yVQbfyd-Pzm8HGYez23wlRoPsG02CH3eHeoWTSGpmPcsKxMO2pWaKUFUP_FWzBM0L4U0sXSEmHoDOlV75mKb7DS4Tm2ITypCMpYA3OEMhC1KVIdX3ga7F8AX4b8Q8CH-sEvmzuckz_SXPupOeN4vcg2GIk25IG6VzYfD6yaRMwrbI2scxaKRGkab1OGYKvN2Bu71ND_hvKqyB_3myofDGtcKSmkwJ8VeVhUq1zLpFroSC11lArYZvOwg%3D)

Peter, my name is Rod Dorilás and I’m not an oxymoron. I’m a trained lawyer, military veteran, 1st generation American and **proud Black Republican**. I’m a free thinker and advocate for smaller government, a robust judicial system and free and fair elections. **I believe that everyone should have the opportunity to hear the arguments both sides make to win over votes and that no one’s support** – regardless of race – should be assumed by Democrats or Republicans.

Peter, it’s impossible to deny that there isn’t enough African American representation in the modern Republican Party. **[That’s exactly why I’m running for Congress for a House seat representing Florida](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=3006568341b24658b5500579ab459938&_e=Jkf_eRi7vwkkTftwfYn3phMjGVQEFFWt6tZ8paEzz0da-yM7otHdv7YFtCK6-za_Zepkcdlm9UDyXXaei_9DXnxNYXQdKRp9e-PDpcqU269a3-ssMG4hPSyXJwYfZN5cOmasCW-8Pq0UBt5pOHfA5y-a4HU9sGAvjnfYXnDXhVoIibp9_GYN3RrN6KDhXjVCK1AwnqQHiUmMh_ycGbxGERTwnj7cBggNR2WdoIddUAdCiTTAfI_yVQbfyd-Pzm8HoSdWEafT_j9ZQhA1WVhgmK-7IdHB-CU2ViZuWWQyZveiKY8M3mAZcIqK18KGY6ZHnwIFEvdi501CJmGrJIjvV4VCnB1dJEDpR7__cTDFoeoLFn8RDvFka_yUExmEgaC3pI3vSV8RVK5apjbUfFpD1UTjIbn_FJJoVqVO5_ubfjoXeaYSb1NaWY9PORs8FNB8lEUruMgyItpBm_cjffgO6EQOzTqgfzLr040N_B68ChU%3D)**. I know money is tight for a lot of folks right now, but today I’m writing to see if you’d **[help me send a message to the ladies of “The View”](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=3006568341b24658b5500579ab459938&_e=Jkf_eRi7vwkkTftwfYn3phMjGVQEFFWt6tZ8paEzz0da-yM7otHdv7YFtCK6-za_Zepkcdlm9UDyXXaei_9DXnxNYXQdKRp9e-PDpcqU269a3-ssMG4hPSyXJwYfZN5cOmasCW-8Pq0UBt5pOHfA5y-a4HU9sGAvjnfYXnDXhVoIibp9_GYN3RrN6KDhXjVCK1AwnqQHiUmMh_ycGbxGERTwnj7cBggNR2WdoIddUAdCiTTAfI_yVQbfyd-Pzm8HeJWSs2E3DxVc2hXsG2ztiPlwZpESSZhR0VJNyZ1VREWMeEPcBR1_0Y9jTWSfpBfyMeepX6aWQ7pK4tSGrbtshE5ur_5euj-sp0rsy5tstCFMtAMCu-Pn_CDXbJJn7Wnpn4Qkofk3wVVZEpTSyBCChTkrtO-Nu7fcsELrjzlSMwpjNR_pAiOdKRR5iQzLMSKLIJWE7tkcr9hTsYISFoT3XhPawuz6b8gufP6qmvt6ngU%3D)** that there are a lot of Black Republicans in the U.S. – and we’re not an oxymoron.

[** HELP ME SEND A MESSAGE
TO THE LADIES OF THE VIEW>>**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=3006568341b24658b5500579ab459938&_e=Jkf_eRi7vwkkTftwfYn3phMjGVQEFFWt6tZ8paEzz0da-yM7otHdv7YFtCK6-za_Zepkcdlm9UDyXXaei_9DXnxNYXQdKRp9e-PDpcqU269a3-ssMG4hPSyXJwYfZN5cOmasCW-8Pq0UBt5pOHfA5y-a4HU9sGAvjnfYXnDXhVoIibp9_GYN3RrN6KDhXjVCK1AwnqQHiUmMh_ycGbxGERTwnj7cBggNR2WdoIddUAdCiTTAfI_yVQbfyd-Pzm8HHvcD-7miALZUMmDlIcNiSppkecQ-p4PauWGsewpujtFJlKecmLT57BPbOC9r6xiU3dPbVWeAp2xK2J6dEjsC3rQX4e_j9gl83XHZlm_qWNli64cSl7ZtYX7d9QTxzGM_FbO425BPG7txiCx5Y_gUlInmxZq2cd3fxQMIg6HJD75km353S0IsWvTqLPlu7_L8cnIWHBgmyKy51KcOuFB4xwE-o1QW55aK5O0SXICmreM%3D)
[](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=3006568341b24658b5500579ab459938&_e=Jkf_eRi7vwkkTftwfYn3phMjGVQEFFWt6tZ8paEzz0da-yM7otHdv7YFtCK6-za_Zepkcdlm9UDyXXaei_9DXnxNYXQdKRp9e-PDpcqU269a3-ssMG4hPSyXJwYfZN5cOmasCW-8Pq0UBt5pOHfA5y-a4HU9sGAvjnfYXnDXhVoIibp9_GYN3RrN6KDhXjVCK1AwnqQHiUmMh_ycGbxGERTwnj7cBggNR2WdoIddUAdCiTTAfI_yVQbfyd-Pzm8HiL9NVOgVrJ44mLp-CXfMSsZVu9nH0zEGQPConitqKPiE-ABM45ASplc_vuNfYy94_gKwHyae5jo4eGgAvNUN365M26pbaRM0C129vu2dAHqJogBmqETMwopxilPMru0F-WvWzuonwWS4_ejQe4tMspNb2OYqOEJBslWNyYnSLrvobHg115ZH_9aYUxjGncG7ppOwPhcq6ZBt-H6GENWh0ezpuXnBxttAuf3AMbjbpbE%3D)
I believe that if voters are able to be reached equally by Democrat and Republican campaigns, Republicans would win every time. I won’t deny that my opponent is much more well-funded than I, which is why I’m making this special ask of you today.**[If you could find it in your budget to send $2 ](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=3006568341b24658b5500579ab459938&_e=Jkf_eRi7vwkkTftwfYn3phMjGVQEFFWt6tZ8paEzz0da-yM7otHdv7YFtCK6-za_Zepkcdlm9UDyXXaei_9DXnxNYXQdKRp9e-PDpcqU269a3-ssMG4hPSyXJwYfZN5cOmasCW-8Pq0UBt5pOHfA5y-a4HU9sGAvjnfYXnDXhVoIibp9_GYN3RrN6KDhXjVCK1AwnqQHiUmMh_ycGbxGERTwnj7cBggNR2WdoIddUAdCiTTAfI_yVQbfyd-Pzm8HgMAluOJ1BNLz5Zy_-0Li-V4NOUpoeVnCqN5m2KFTVqP3B_qR3Rb-ssX3yZQB7qXirjzs1xvGLzXZIUV8pRQttFyk8yaRQvGkDUXRz16252NY-Eh40Zmz6kWtV_vpfEZinZ3XgZ2cUpgo9C97ieybr8JHzMy4cOKzrcnT9HohyR1PhWYcecRQAYxDK33BuThetVxKsYcfJcmTmSnKkmUfKkwLYLtty41Ol9BUBe1DHCI%3D)** to my campaign today, I’m certain I can flip this South Florida House seat on behalf of our party.

Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration.

For Country,

Rod Dorilas

[** CHIP IN $2 >> **](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=3006568341b24658b5500579ab459938&_e=Jkf_eRi7vwkkTftwfYn3phMjGVQEFFWt6tZ8paEzz0da-yM7otHdv7YFtCK6-za_Zepkcdlm9UDyXXaei_9DXnxNYXQdKRp9e-PDpcqU269a3-ssMG4hPSyXJwYfZN5cOmasCW-8Pq0UBt5pOHfA5y-a4HU9sGAvjnfYXnDXhVoIibp9_GYN3RrN6KDhXjVCK1AwnqQHiUmMh_ycGbxGERTwnj7cBggNR2WdoIddUAdCiTTAfI_yVQbfyd-Pzm8HuqNdM7PIOye-1FZXDHVVaWKfeAD26XdHiE45DwhTC69mPjflF_h01ftWoRGDlr8r5oa83KCbsvNTF3Vs_piHtNlL-Xx4Asf-TSrE42lv6amblKe1RXI1BHwA7mgXcrrq0nd9Db8n4BrYDAA5voBMPam6zngfp96ytY_5ETmCb0HA-kMN1XL0CxnROX-5THWsVuA23QRUsIpuVXwCzAjfpBn-tbohLTfqoCkJHwfx8RA%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=3006568341b24658b5500579ab459938&_e=Jkf_eRi7vwkkTftwfYn3phMjGVQEFFWt6tZ8paEzz0da-yM7otHdv7YFtCK6-za_Zepkcdlm9UDyXXaei_9DXnxNYXQdKRp9e-PDpcqU269a3-ssMG4hPSyXJwYfZN5cOmasCW-8Pq0UBt5pOHfA5y-a4HU9sGAvjnfYXnDXhVoIibp9_GYN3RrN6KDhXjVCK1AwnqQHiUmMh_ycGbxGERTwnj7cBggNR2WdoIddUAdCiTTAfI_yVQbfyd-Pzm8HsMHscuCGg03zzSQgII7lmVNjTDPg7dKZp70lz1k6CrXWHf0Y2q8R1Uvg3m8Pn-Phxjp0fvdyjKL1xMjfeD_-qZhtOFWwtPaJ__4gU9k2foU3ZWw0YpZGvZB8gJp5GuHPAd_dV8qUt3bv3X9vn3zgDEEEBeNlqhEkWraDsl9MEUKtmiS-qGx67Fu9fc-z5dOi57b9f4cEjkJVJ-kuiJtT5KSYMHs_518RaRbFpMzIWD4%3D)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
---

This message was sent to your email address ending in @gmail.com because it was listed as the best way to contact you.

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_s=3006568341b24658b5500579ab459938&_t=RoquZWP7fWRtkMxKyRD8YzLMowMBSpBOcRwLKzbFpw3IIMijUfmlu9cGTG-7dmh05rzhemANtbMreyWiIOlLw1H-fhsC1kNTmuXs5jksJ7Ki7KETySEp0j12YeXS6XWA_WeQFF5lTd6xzf-9bbGmcutDL1mZwB3GhT60OHkO4DQ%3D).

Peter -

I'm Amanda Makki. I'm a proud, America First Conservative running for the 13th Congressional District in Florida.

**My family legally immigrated to the United States when I was an infant to escape the persecution of an oppressive regime in Iran. My parents scraped together whatever resource they could to immigrate to the land of opportunity.**

[](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=6958866027e74f28a9e7076fd5dee270&_e=CBuioiokWx20YEq-n1ImYoAhhW3BF5_tezt7IyR0doRJfSPoLT6l0hLYrf3zsNeMtcZjePY6ieJnWi5bO7dZ93Pna287l8vtLFMNn3CB2s77PsDYiqNO_uyRV4WCHqDDybA0na3lhhYNb08tkR2n61K3bvaCzMvB671h_Z7mGHK-wQYJDyq1mvdGBciKkyI9YS6NbASXKiWJC5bIeomA3NsFAb1J4JMQvarJp3f2771dc8mTekfLN_7rq15qOF9kejeB49flx6xZRwSOiknUk5IleHfgGyKrixXUb9elK9sjLrbzv5uYhDv29ABq3P8c0e3Xn2exWw2RImY1qlhm6NPEN9fmrHA6sVRoJRalEHBKn5MY7rqV-cjp0hwwfbcHQYXdOeRGQoFzGklJ6q7z3-f-EDu6cf8GQG2tymI91U4xEw4dlm4GyguyIOpdyZHx)

A few weeks after September 11, 2001, I went to work in the Army General Counsel's office in the Pentagon. **As a native Farsi speaker, I knew I had to do whatever I could to protect my adopted country.**

From there, I went to work fighting against Obamacare as a Republican Healthcare Advisor in both the House and the Senate. **And in 2020, I stood up to the Democrat lawyers who tried to have ballots mail-in ballots counted that we know shouldn’t have been!**

I experienced the American Dream firsthand, and I'm sickened by now the Leftists in Washington are trying to destroy it. **My RINO opponent was an “avid” two-time Obama supporter. There's no telling who she'll side with if Florida elects her to the House.**

RINO's and Democrats want to turn our beautiful nation into their socialist dreamland. My family didn't sacrifice everything and leave Iran to live in a country where we could be persecuted for our thoughts and canceled for not agreeing with the Woke.

The reality is that this election could be our last chance to save this nation from the Left's destruction.

subject: These heroes are counting on you
body:
| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e9254130b9814db5a72db9fd555a494a&_e=5c9ebXK2O91xXe0UB0GIDl0wvjcOjtc6K05C6lc2l__aU0hzdXVo5nc7dP3pXcbDG7muC3RHaEBlKX07MIgeQygw2arPlk5Pssy3qor6ZmG6xcNsHP87ZwXL0yD8Yr8CHlLFuLDOhzO0CHEI-4iIp5y6EuoG5VKUPihZIjn6FjeitRxqxfABDQI5X4MrYDgLzRQV5TPj67ZpsbSvEsLmK0Ql5jDX-E02QKiDhebJGBfG-VDnT9a--S0gjsamR3STYY1kVfkhJtYsE7KoDtX91jpU2Kz80eEVWtk7U2f6_1GgAl96084YO8A0bBDqr4ZWj9Sh3IeyuUJpJu36JAm0YI0MCSwrP7XP6rT1XMUdY4Q%3D)
---
Peter, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e9254130b9814db5a72db9fd555a494a&_e=5c9ebXK2O91xXe0UB0GIDl0wvjcOjtc6K05C6lc2l__aU0hzdXVo5nc7dP3pXcbDG7muC3RHaEBlKX07MIgeQygw2arPlk5Pssy3qor6ZmG6xcNsHP87ZwXL0yD8Yr8CHlLFuLDOhzO0CHEI-4iIpw-iZGvYnIh99D0w9UHhMn9KxLUC1pCJ0MIJBibUuDqrfbHnLzpg2iI1hPY7P4LahC0fJ3Zgg-8llaWU5NLsj4Cth9eGuURxJgH2stznK8tXhPYy8YDMVRFkEw41M0vcSWb19cUAfVnriz0cLDX87ltAO0fue7RK8bUFfJlj5FGdoFk4fVWmtZUiN-frEHnZqfv_rYVyiEVcQByVdWNHTYY%3D)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e9254130b9814db5a72db9fd555a494a&_e=5c9ebXK2O91xXe0UB0GIDl0wvjcOjtc6K05C6lc2l__aU0hzdXVo5nc7dP3pXcbDG7muC3RHaEBlKX07MIgeQygw2arPlk5Pssy3qor6ZmG6xcNsHP87ZwXL0yD8Yr8CHlLFuLDOhzO0CHEI-4iIp4JGESKA-_FfxdXW5oyPJtiytdMJrQA3CJMe5-msVOFzZPA4M3D31QJJtRfvdnNweqaVBgzR4KdIpLf67SQNcsZoghUNXAhxwgbIYe64qR9p2gfPGtdjWcK10LP7Ht68gguNcT9R2YZgZ8bjDoWMFGsU5LXMKvOsxNPYoSDnJnjYuGsWtRJQQBecqUkjadkgvAHIwuNysuwzRzJ1eX6HYsE%3D)
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e9254130b9814db5a72db9fd555a494a&_e=5c9ebXK2O91xXe0UB0GIDl0wvjcOjtc6K05C6lc2l__aU0hzdXVo5nc7dP3pXcbDG7muC3RHaEBlKX07MIgeQygw2arPlk5Pssy3qor6ZmG6xcNsHP87ZwXL0yD8Yr8CHlLFuLDOhzO0CHEI-4iIp1MzcoCvk8J6U5oFH8LnE3T2A0ZfTfrjiS1Kc6HFkQqnHqj9-kMLDhNEVqEa2qC-_9ePemcFvtNNpLk4IlZHr_rYL6-G51QR5PteK7rZJdZ44oOtGujrXHfC3DBMUt-vvOloJVhjoIJtEe77lcDY7Gpn8nQlyFHhoTwcibXFce5hXQ7f29dIyUci21Nb0-v_PEgrWeA48J2nzg1ouHNqmqk%3D)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e9254130b9814db5a72db9fd555a494a&_e=5c9ebXK2O91xXe0UB0GIDl0wvjcOjtc6K05C6lc2l__aU0hzdXVo5nc7dP3pXcbDG7muC3RHaEBlKX07MIgeQygw2arPlk5Pssy3qor6ZmG6xcNsHP87ZwXL0yD8Yr8CHlLFuLDOhzO0CHEI-4iIpx7tJbpcJ5uOluU-81detwvf7rsGA2mY5eRd3xCLvT5fyKY7P39G6-v2LCKV_mopI1Mvv7k4U5QbnI_aXfA0c7zs1sWF_g-2sWd4ccY9Fmvm48tfENAKo82F8r93kd2RtTmtUU32tM-T0UjtO_HFLeH52TBHjrT8oBfgYjiYQQDTSnF7i8utjIxgB-wm-Sv1qJsXm2HYq7M6pOyvLsyb4to%3D)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e9254130b9814db5a72db9fd555a494a&_e=5c9ebXK2O91xXe0UB0GIDl0wvjcOjtc6K05C6lc2l__aU0hzdXVo5nc7dP3pXcbDG7muC3RHaEBlKX07MIgeQygw2arPlk5Pssy3qor6ZmG6xcNsHP87ZwXL0yD8Yr8CHlLFuLDOhzO0CHEI-4iIpzNrMOrzrLNyXRsrDD-MyAPhPjY4MkDwpo7NYDCMSozC3KEP7q3h4cfCpEjdMTvAJ96_PB0YNSOrkOiI9sACD8123KDi9ZIZvvv5MmQxen_Cf4T9xqZRRyxT7DfFF4Zwp1zq-Z1SjYW8Y8tLY0-KVF-UxUt2BA4xAIfY179BtMyOwPrBzfZACGnRwoVAGQwFOk-eDB65cobafVx21kfAhH8%3D)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e9254130b9814db5a72db9fd555a494a&_e=5c9ebXK2O91xXe0UB0GIDl0wvjcOjtc6K05C6lc2l__aU0hzdXVo5nc7dP3pXcbDG7muC3RHaEBlKX07MIgeQygw2arPlk5Pssy3qor6ZmG6xcNsHP87ZwXL0yD8Yr8CHlLFuLDOhzO0CHEI-4iIp1y07HjpxSwPRIouOGHPbpT67TQ9-gvYnX3cSDoEeppWPxvr5tTJ7GNecZFdlS7l24kjoyf2cR5gqTRPP2JQkA6_UT8Y3CLwwGmlMLcewf94R4Di06_TlqWaoY-h_ZeFw-W2tM_uJe3zkHFVII5zq3Eqx5gCmYgpkCou4cQgsVhjMxKsj8--pXM3R4tZ7yL68TM4A4AOXH0eDY9P7s-Xpjk%3D)
---
[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e9254130b9814db5a72db9fd555a494a&_e=5c9ebXK2O91xXe0UB0GIDl0wvjcOjtc6K05C6lc2l__aU0hzdXVo5nc7dP3pXcbDG7muC3RHaEBlKX07MIgeQygw2arPlk5Pssy3qor6ZmG6xcNsHP87ZwXL0yD8Yr8CHlLFuLDOhzO0CHEI-4iIp0flR2RExRXvfYfcmeUj1w2BxPd3QNEIiPBsnTlxYYtJptOrGATH833AdQnJMm83Kmc9g_kxynI-eqnGtleOhWc58-cvpoHm42yymqHYAS2TnpSL1VsTjwoRO4l3c1Ssys7zIdBTt-lfHbAahYrPolXh7q-Tl3fliemy0LH-cgLLk5NgdJ3sRtEfW76yaFdtEPsncOYUtnmfUYUyiswcLMw%3D) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more._ Peter, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e9254130b9814db5a72db9fd555a494a&_e=5c9ebXK2O91xXe0UB0GIDl0wvjcOjtc6K05C6lc2l__aU0hzdXVo5nc7dP3pXcbDG7muC3RHaEBlKX07MIgeQygw2arPlk5Pssy3qor6ZmG6xcNsHP87ZwXL0yD8Yr8CHlLFuLDOhzO0CHEI-4iIp1sMyJunbIGZXLBZ54__Gu7Q9yhTuZgoVKIYfatcEAlaUxmqaLHpOtEv0XcS1XE12iKKaeLw_NDUQbI3eMrhxHSRM-cFkMnzx9z2oAWktZX6PEQLKZxpCJnrCxodT7GghBD4wkSQAvkgi_HErCNnEzFipo3Us9PUEd56BzSXQrifTZfmD-2940sfFqWdBpfRnfmNwo11DrHLjCRteM2MXlw%3D)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e9254130b9814db5a72db9fd555a494a&_e=5c9ebXK2O91xXe0UB0GIDl0wvjcOjtc6K05C6lc2l__aU0hzdXVo5nc7dP3pXcbDG7muC3RHaEBlKX07MIgeQygw2arPlk5Pssy3qor6ZmG6xcNsHP87ZwXL0yD8Yr8CHlLFuLDOhzO0CHEI-4iIp7IiKt68eT616lz5amafLlOQgchck7BNHRG29PiMlHEsYDDPiK7IyZXC2o0hVeS2QZufm9nShP7oYUMYUpp2Riq_kdyE9YtsikHp4gxDV1SCWlnGMeQtE62J84vO_4LDc6jqvyEGFQGvvLbjxFuKfoR-Jjl78uyr9sieYD9rzR4L7rLOWcKyyU5Y310Fft0o3hjXl-xjxSPZ1dyEWdNXnh0%3D)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e9254130b9814db5a72db9fd555a494a&_e=5c9ebXK2O91xXe0UB0GIDl0wvjcOjtc6K05C6lc2l__aU0hzdXVo5nc7dP3pXcbDG7muC3RHaEBlKX07MIgeQygw2arPlk5Pssy3qor6ZmG6xcNsHP87ZwXL0yD8Yr8CHlLFuLDOhzO0CHEI-4iIp3bgFYVHReBKmsf4vvly4TW7g0NNS3B-BEQ81D-nII4wb8dLMEsJ2r8AbxhFlboeAtFkO8JdNOCeaUsDK2cZsHHI9Z-mEKrzvSkMHzEVx2aq9tgIYusCGe7KqG4KBlq_TP0XudIZCcGaBhmtTveer4C5zfi_6gdO3nVTNc81eFSYeV_o2OLezacUryrWr58TWWWeLp_6lRmv2-rpEcVq21I%3D)

name: Charles Booker
subject: Rand Paul does not give a damn about our safety or survival.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

I received the news of the massacre at an elementary school in Uvalde,
Texas as I picked up my 6-year-old daughter from school.

Watching children exit school and reuniting with their parents after their
school day was gut wrenching. So many parents in Texas will never pick up
their child from school again.

We can’t keep accepting inaction. Every member of Congress who refuses to
act on common sense gun safety needs to resign right now.

There's no reason the Senate can’t pass gun safety legislation to protect
our children.

That’s why I’m running against Rand Paul, a Senator with a 92% NRA rating
who’s accepted more money from the gun lobby than any other Senate
candidate this year. Rand Paul has made it clear that he will always vote
to please his friends from the gun lobby and make reform untenable.

He’s previously threatened to filibuster legislation banning assault
rifles, the weapon used in recent mass shootings in Uvalde and Buffalo.
Following Sandy Hook in 2012, Rand Paul went on national television and
spoke in opposition to background checks. This week is no different, as
Paul remains content using words, rather than power granted to him by the
people of Kentucky, to protect our children. His thoughts and prayers are
meaningless.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220526-2?refcode=em20220526-2-1976&t=1020&refcode2=1976_346206_fiMHIo&akid=1976%2E346206%2EfiMHIo ]Thoughts and prayers aren’t enough, and we don’t have to accept them
any longer. Will you help me retire Rand Paul this November by chipping in
today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220526-2?refcode=em20220526-2-1976&t=1021&refcode2=1976_346206_fiMHIo&akid=1976%2E346206%2EfiMHIo ]Contribute $5

Peter, I have
directly seen and felt the impact of gun violence. On Easter Sunday in
2016, my younger cousin TJ was shot and killed during an attempted
robbery. And since then, I’ve lost another cousin to gun violence each
year.

Guns are the leading cause of death for children in the U.S., and I’m
determined to dismantle the corrupt foundation that the gun lobby has
entrenched with Congressional Republicans. Now more than ever, legislative
and executive action is necessary to prevent future mass killings, of our
children or otherwise.

I believe we deserve to live in peace. I believe weapons of war should not
be in our classrooms or in our streets. But Rand Paul does not give a damn
about our safety or survival.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220526-2?refcode=em20220526-2-1976&t=1022&refcode2=1976_346206_fiMHIo&akid=1976%2E346206%2EfiMHIo ]Peter, we
don’t have to keep accepting inaction from Senate Republicans like Rand
Paul and Mitch McConnell. Will you chip in $5 right now to
show Rand Paul that this movement is rising up to end his political
career?

Thank you,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220526-1976-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1976_346206_fiMHIo&akid=1976%2E346206%2EfiMHIo

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1976%2E346206%2EfiMHIo

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

**Peter,****t****his can’t wait.** After the tragic mass school shooting in Uvalde — that killed 19 children and 2 teachers — we’re not going to accept inaction. The time to address the epidemic of gun violence in this country was a decade ago after Sandy Hook. The next best time is right now. Kyrsten Sinema made it clear yesterday, _less than a day after the Uvalde shooting_ , that she is still refusing to drop her support for the filibuster — effectively dooming our chances of passing critical gun violence legislation. [**_Please Peter, add your name to our petition and demand that Kyrsten Sinema drops her support for the filibuster. It’s going to take all of us to make it clear that she can’t keep getting away with this._**](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmw35G2snBkLVgBX_kTVLNjI2ALgak5T5niqZ6H4MkRXBW_5UR-iEd2seJlsLICdazFqG4xKyDxcLQc-_5H148tKTp_2RRDu5kNuJYRC0yhLvrzKUKn301oJy6Eodcz2yQYv0aJx3SyCVm68sEb38ErdRbjIjwO1HESbZRF9cA70-wfRqH2AY6p4Fuz5wx4vdnIxD2JGHAEzf6X7oG71VS59XfDux-5Gs9vcEIKw7D6Z30ZlvTPmq-1RBeQjwtbbX6N076fXKOnQMNMdNOHqaq-EI4WZZblFVW1wjd1ni-Ge1vCQoaWEJKakHzjtU-4kWk4GQFUaAlpslJcoJNnl4iSymXe0iSaKNo_vSIYS5CE62BYxn_2BKD1MMAyY-eRi3c7q9O4m39UuAM8pEAW_Wi72MAlpiwTpblLFHUS35yCzQ0IbOiWHkPrOcO9_eFQp0s/3md/XyQd0rTiRpKVWq1TK74B4w/h1/pCw1hCvzuJPbN1jpcLcOmHAn63wdoA3EMAFfjTu56LY) **[Add your name](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmw35G2snBkLVgBX_kTVLNjI2ALgak5T5niqZ6H4MkRXBW_5UR-iEd2seJlsLICdazFqG4xKyDxcLQc-_5H148tKTp_2RRDu5kNuJYRC0yhLvrzKUKn301oJy6Eodcz2yQYv0aJx3SyCVm68sEb38ErXRcqT_6I7gBF2Z4cRKrJr8X09PXrOkYqylOx6M6feGI6h1ja_Z_uVfsvsteooHkuQn49eSJdCAc3jQeRy-7eO3Ez5D_0T9KgF2YTmK-XxBIoUENC8U-nXT8zLBYQ3hXP-2YrpjGBduUs8BSmUgBHQqCIe5gTVZtea3xHLr69OBa--Es15rADSlHMx45D7U7XjWh6ctipNu8Q8A-3HpeNtdVAiI_QWwPLmQUDsii2QizY_iDfpeGoDEMOR19b7s0sz45VBa_F-fcgxjIY_XOAF6qgwlcqaElFasdF6Vp_RAA/3md/XyQd0rTiRpKVWq1TK74B4w/h2/2qM7v340B3u8qnCKRAbAVHdeqB8VrrFuJTdTjMQO5RY)** Once you’ve signed your name on the petition please share it with your friends and family ↓ | **_Peter: Please share our petition today._**

name: Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel
subject: Biden is becoming foolish
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
This is just another reason why this administration must be held accountable by a Republican House and Senate.
Fellow Conservative,

The President recently canceled a 1-million-plus acre oil lease in Alaska. That is tragic considering that gas prices are the highest they’ve ever been. **In 2022, there is absolutely no reason the United States should not be energy independent.**

We’re home to the most technologically innovative companies in the world and we can extract oil without harming the surrounding environment. President Biden owns these exorbitant gas prices - and no one else.

**While canceling an oil lease is unfortunate** , what’s shameful is that while he’s declaring U.S. energy off limits, he’s making a deal in Venezuela to import more than 1 million barrels of oil PER DAY.

Yep - you read that right **In March, President Biden sent members of his administration to Caracas Venezuela to make a deal with dictator Nicolas Maduro for oil that we don’t need.**

This is just another reason why this administration must be held accountable by a Republican House and Senate.

Yet despite the crazy chaotic way Democrats in Washington are running our country, their donors continue to help them outraise Republicans at every turn. [**That’s why we need your immediate help to level the playing field.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1633f754ddce4cbb9d3fb6541b4623ea&_e=9DPKkDvSQcGFOcSnd_BStqOx033DQefyIQUV_X_G-zlaiB8r30zTrBrYFn2T-Vzh_aq_sYmmGI5LIkGyR5XzHsl4JH6FyoaTHCjLI0K4bQbneV9dnralESV68J6HlZEVR381RJmU5uzRY4yoPbFjjJPXSjoaF1kXlV-aDWhUOSWHn26uFHqRq5kZFlSFBVBdbcrVkDyF4j7BUT4bpBySQ7qjsxZJlsOP23oWoCiDR3hBFijjfi-w3G3ZXc1BVZTfceURBOu8jRSiTcqENJko2OfEOZ8Lw3DkiplcNWbBwW7QY616Ky16f88kl0Nv1FURthEHqPVMTLG_W4PIhTs1HCTOtckg6axedAB59Sb67-y0xSyNvuoxeZLmXc7UZ-dsfgm8PkOeVilLlhQU1PYpEF5CqRbn_hTV_2fTn4vaARjMERFaCWBQuk6aK1BczX4OlKJH8GAgHGeqcZEDjbR5pPVCY-ihTko6SDjHwiWAGDJdmNR3HH2Fc7pcAb17MUpZCTcD_TAANo6VMyW54NDg6w%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative, The President recently canceled a 1-million-plus acre oil lease in Alaska. That is tragic considering that gas prices are the highest they’ve ever been. In 2022, there is absolutely no reason the United States should not be energy independent. We’re home to the most technologically innovative companies in the world and we can extract oil without harming the surrounding environment. President Biden owns these exorbitant gas prices - and no one else. While canceling an oil lease is unfortunate , what’s shameful is that while he’s declaring U.S. energy off limits, he’s making a deal in Venezuela to import more than 1 million barrels of oil PER DAY. Yep - you read that right In March, President Biden sent members of his administration to Caracas Venezuela to make a deal with dictator Nicolas Maduro for oil that we don’t need. This is just another reason why this administration must be held accountable by a Republican House and Senate. Yet despite the crazy chaotic way Democrats in Washington are running our country, their donors continue to help them outraise Republicans at every turn. Peter,

My name is General Mick McGuire and I’m running against Democrat Mark Kelly in Arizona’s critical Senate race.

Thanks to Kelly and the Senate Democrats woke mob agenda - Americans are suffering. Our border is wide open, violent crime has skyrocketed, Americans are paying $5 a gallon, and inflation is at a record high.

We are in the midst of a fight for our country and we need to elect proven leaders to lead us to victory.

Peter, as a two-star general I’ve fought many battles for our country and WON. I’ve had experience flying F-16s in combat over Baghdad, commanding over 8,300 Arizona National Guard Troops, and protecting our southern border.

When I see a problem, I run towards it, which is exactly why I joined this Senate race. **Mark Kelly** is no different. While he pledged to be YOUR independent voice in the Senate - he has instead chosen to vote strictly along party lines, voting 97.7% of the time with Biden’s agenda and continues to ignore the issues here in Arizona.

**Mark Kelly** voted for Justice Kentanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court - despite her lenient sentences for violent sex offenders.

**Mark Kelly** has ignored the crisis at our border which has allowed hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants to flood our communities and jeopardize our children’s safety.

**Mark Kelly** has refused to act while Americans are suffering from record unemployment and record inflation.

name: Alessandra Biaggi
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
Here’s why I’m running for Congress.
#

Friends -
In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign for Congress.
I’ll explain why this request is so important in just a minute, but if you’re ready to add your support now — of $3 or anything you can — please use this link:
[**https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/go/Contribute**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-may/?refcode=em220526-2-t1&refcode2=798_59515_YuIeqI&akid=798%2E59515%2EYuIeqI)
Here’s the truth: Since we launched our campaign against Sean Patrick Maloney on Tuesday morning, one of the questions I’ve been asked most is why I’m running.
It’s a fair question, for sure. Let me explain.
When I first ran for State Senate in 2018 against a seven-term fake Democrat and leader of the New York political machine, people thought I didn’t stand a chance.
I looked at leadership across the state, I didn’t see myself being represented by anyone. We didn’t have the kind of elected officials who truly understood what our communities needed, or what they deserved.
That’s why I decided to run — and I never shied away from the fight.
He had more money, more big endorsements, and the entire corporate establishment of New York state politics backing him. What he didn’t have was you, the people.
We fought and we won that race, and I’m so proud of the progress that our movement has made in New York since then. We’ve fought to make legal abortion the law of the land, and passed important tenant protection laws and landmark climate legislation.
Now, I’m taking our fight to Congress — because I see the same lack of representation in Washington today that I saw in Albany then.
Right now, across the country, there is a wave of young progressive leaders eager to step up and take bold, transformative action on the issues that define our time — combating the climate crisis, protecting abortion rights, passing gun safety legislation, guaranteeing health care as a human right, and so much more.
These are basic, popular, winning issues that we’re simply not moving fast enough on, and that’s thanks in large part to the current Democratic leadership.
That Democratic leadership includes my opponent, Sean Patrick Maloney.
Democrats control the House, the Senate, and the White House. We have all the power we need to do everything that we want, it’s simply a matter of political courage — something Sean Patrick Maloney entirely lacks.
It’s not enough just to vote blue and call it a day until the next election season rolls around. We need to elect bold, progressive leaders with the vision, the urgency, and yes — the courage — to get done what needs to be done.
That’s why I’m running for Congress.
I know that this race is not going to be easy — this time, we aren’t going to be able to take the special interests by surprise. They already know what we’re capable of when we stand together, and they’re going to do and spend whatever it takes to try and stop us.
[**Can you make a contribution — of $3 or anything you can — to our campaign for Congress? Your support in these early stages of this primary is so critically important to our success.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-may/?refcode=em220526-2-t1&refcode2=798_59515_YuIeqI&akid=798%2E59515%2EYuIeqI)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

I’ll explain why this request is so important in just a minute, but if you’re ready to add your support now — of $3 or anything you can — please use this link: Here’s the truth: Since we launched our campaign against Sean Patrick Maloney on Tuesday morning, one of the questions I’ve been asked most is why I’m running. It’s a fair question, for sure. Let me explain. When I first ran for State Senate in 2018 against a seven-term fake Democrat and leader of the New York political machine, people thought I didn’t stand a chance. I looked at leadership across the state, I didn’t see myself being represented by anyone. We didn’t have the kind of elected officials who truly understood what our communities needed, or what they deserved. That’s why I decided to run — and I never shied away from the fight. He had more money, more big endorsements, and the entire corporate establishment of New York state politics backing him. What he didn’t have was you, the people. We fought and we won that race, and I’m so proud of the progress that our movement has made in New York since then. We’ve fought to make legal abortion the law of the land, and passed important tenant protection laws and landmark climate legislation. Now, I’m taking our fight to Congress — because I see the same lack of representation in Washington today that I saw in Albany then. Right now, across the country, there is a wave of young progressive leaders eager to step up and take bold, transformative action on the issues that define our time — combating the climate crisis, protecting abortion rights, passing gun safety legislation, guaranteeing health care as a human right, and so much more. These are basic, popular, winning issues that we’re simply not moving fast enough on, and that’s thanks in large part to the current Democratic leadership. That Democratic leadership includes my opponent, Sean Patrick Maloney. Democrats control the House, the Senate, and the White House. We have all the power we need to do everything that we want, it’s simply a matter of political courage — something Sean Patrick Maloney entirely lacks. It’s not enough just to vote blue and call it a day until the next election season rolls around. We need to elect bold, progressive leaders with the vision, the urgency, and yes — the courage — to get done what needs to be done. That’s why I’m running for Congress. I know that this race is not going to be easy — this time, we aren’t going to be able to take the special interests by surprise. They already know what we’re capable of when we stand together, and they’re going to do and spend whatever it takes to try and stop us. If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thanks in advance for your donation today, and for the incredible support we’ve received this week. Let’s keep it going. \- Alessandra Biaggi Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9b9e82d22fb44f859c35fb6d05edd59a&_e=AIJBqSHPUZFFwPxpZpIw_u1EdpSeAmx9Hkp4iRXbDo4H5YxoP6sUiPA18dLG_JXF6V_l5TjjKlRh42fZkEp0yKWJ9PHeVn1-6c5uUO8XrUURJlIOUS7EXFH_upg1xGq069rx_9uKgrzlzbX7IuaXpPD0wVIrPCcc1Y99LVf3u7bMRfMDGrPy-Ra7SEHn3zZnP7-DK4SSpaphl7WMoyk6Km7UUAjObNCLvwDS3k7tdVi9oiFtiPfKJEuzs7Q4oQMTvJ8V_B4fMqnYPzRs86clhk0uIdJ6zbp_z-ItnmqAAz9qr1g0g1UVLroZFMxvsnMZBG4u0j-M2lUG4wiIdda37AJgM1NvT3FzinKFJU4E2OI%3D)
---
Peter, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9b9e82d22fb44f859c35fb6d05edd59a&_e=AIJBqSHPUZFFwPxpZpIw_u1EdpSeAmx9Hkp4iRXbDo4H5YxoP6sUiPA18dLG_JXF6V_l5TjjKlRh42fZkEp0yKWJ9PHeVn1-6c5uUO8XrUURJlIOUS7EXFH_upg1xGq069rx_9uKgrzlzbX7IuaXpMFu18sEEl2SUe3NnrUuTIUUNBM7I6KKtOHPLuRZSKxxrXsvViB0Xc7x2j7nX2aN1rLyQ3esazkUvdEUUeE0b7MLU4ojI7KsG95Ivr63WYR7BpGWDeEULYDSbT2MRuOz4V3vvF6CMr0CcS9PKH0VmgeaGMEh93IheI-5GzuYxDZdsVOcv43Z9PSU-AKImbO6t2bosaACjvhxhX1B8Y5IzGc%3D)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9b9e82d22fb44f859c35fb6d05edd59a&_e=AIJBqSHPUZFFwPxpZpIw_u1EdpSeAmx9Hkp4iRXbDo4H5YxoP6sUiPA18dLG_JXF6V_l5TjjKlRh42fZkEp0yKWJ9PHeVn1-6c5uUO8XrUURJlIOUS7EXFH_upg1xGq069rx_9uKgrzlzbX7IuaXpPQqhzIXWQDwATZ4mIE1-S86cV1Rz9HbqxyDxkNS56g3OplO3PWB97VnwYyPw5nTGWTeZxpasLjWN-tPu5dXC8ChQCJnRy1u_9gNoe3IjnXzb1uIcRI1Q0qxQUSKbfDbqW_qzqIW59GSkMO9xmijKJrbfjkM_Fsue2kr7fq3zWYQZb8YdT9KTgRLvO5PEqkCck2fuIJ0qhoTK0qKvmhGW6Y%3D)

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9b9e82d22fb44f859c35fb6d05edd59a&_e=AIJBqSHPUZFFwPxpZpIw_u1EdpSeAmx9Hkp4iRXbDo4H5YxoP6sUiPA18dLG_JXF6V_l5TjjKlRh42fZkEp0yKWJ9PHeVn1-6c5uUO8XrUURJlIOUS7EXFH_upg1xGq069rx_9uKgrzlzbX7IuaXpKRPqLPaKB_PsmQ153fZ8z36f6TMfpC8W2UJU5JJKHaoPLQI1qFr4ocE9LSIDGPXto-kBqmO4CDT8QHD1jWdw5-xNlWwXgOWSPY1UnkLsr7IrcKJ16Pbjy-y1BtbnCQ-gZtoECyqKIvY1laMPdG1475YPfFg_dmbsImvaXNtqYSESvCA7wWPKMY-QTvwzFK28sJbg76lhDBwXQ2IIUhvSYc%3D)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9b9e82d22fb44f859c35fb6d05edd59a&_e=AIJBqSHPUZFFwPxpZpIw_u1EdpSeAmx9Hkp4iRXbDo4H5YxoP6sUiPA18dLG_JXF6V_l5TjjKlRh42fZkEp0yKWJ9PHeVn1-6c5uUO8XrUURJlIOUS7EXFH_upg1xGq069rx_9uKgrzlzbX7IuaXpIR4ZLyAarC1w7bZqh5Sg0DarXRwBiAnoWsoPfKWPeX1Y77hMhCrhGI46SEgjJnvhaDuAfSrF-6qLtIXG1Q07_ROwnWougp6QWFUuVp6AW9M4ICVI9AiV8wh7P7bg1_XBg6yd9Op7r8Df-EPeOgQmbesEM3pvPnF4GulpKptr6PT_sriI6mBYAJSfn4_9zYendHc_Q0rYLsOensWu_d2Kwc%3D)

---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.
